name: Financial Assistance to SC students appearing in the Mains Examination of UPSC
description: The scheme provides financial grants to the SC students for appearing in the UPSC Mains Exam. An amount upto ₹50,000/- is provided to each beneficiary, subject to budget provision. The assistance is extended depending on the applicant satisfying the eligibility criteria and the documents submitted.

name: Financial Incentive to SC Meritorious Girls Students
description: The scheme provides financial incentives worth ₹5,000/- to the meritorious girls from Scheduled Castes who have secured 80% or above marks in the HSLC (SEBA/CBSE/ICSE) examination. To objective is to motivate and encourage SC students to pursue higher studies and bring them at par with the rest.

name: Special Incentive to OBC Meritorious Students (Boys & Girls)
description: This scheme offers a financial incentive of up to ₹10,000/- to meritorious Other Backward Classes (OBC) students who have achieved 80% or higher marks in the HSSLC (SEBA/CBSE/ICSE) examination. The objective is to motivate and encourage OBC students to pursue higher education, thereby fostering thei

name: Anshadayee Yojana Ke Antargat Gramin Sadak Nirman Yojana
description: The scheme "Anshadayee Yojana ke Antargat Gramin Sadak Nirman Yojana" by the Government of Uttarakhand aims to facilitate the transportation of fresh sugarcane to mills. This scheme also provides road construction assistance to sugarcane farmers and associated institutions.

name: Niramaya Health Insurance Scheme
description: Niramaya Health Insurance Scheme ,launched by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, aims to provide affordable health insurance to the Persons with Disabilities (PwDs).

name: National Centre For Communication Security (NCCS) Internship Scheme
description: The National Centre for Communication Security (NCCS) Internship Scheme allows young talent to be associated with the NCCS work for mutual benefit. It will enable NCCS to interact with young scholars and to get fresh ideas and study/ research support from the field of academics.

name: National Centre for Communication Security (NCCS) Research Associates Scheme
description: NCCS engages young scholars as Research Associates  to contribute in development of Telecom Security eco system with in India by providing an opportunity to them to work in areas like Telecom Security Standard development, Lab recognition and Security Certification of telecom products.

name: Chanakya Scheme for Swayam Upadhi
description: The "Chanakya Scheme for Swayam Upadhi” to encourage Brahmin entrepreneurs in Andhra Pradesh. The grant will be given against relevant approved asset acquisition for setting up new business entities or expanding existing/diversifying business entities in different areas.

name: Rajya/Mukhyamantri Swarn/Rajat Padak Protsahan Puraskar
description: This scheme awards cash incentives to NCC cadets who demonstrate outstanding performance in the current year's RDC, TSC, VSC, or NSC camps, recognizing six gold medal recipients with ₹3,000/- and six silver medal recipients with ₹2000/-.

name: Mukhyamantri Chhatravritti Yojana
description: The "Mukhyamantri Chhatravritti Yojana" is a scholarship scheme for NCC cadets who have cleared 10th or 12th standard, completed two years of NCC training with 80% attendance, and are pursuing higher education.

name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Old Age Pension
description: ISSS-OAP is a State Sponsored Scheme by the Social Welfare Dept. of the Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir wherein financial assistance is provided to Old Age Persons who have meager support or no source of livelihood. A pension of ₹1000 per pensioner per month is deposited directly into their Bank Account.

name: Skill Development
description: The scheme "Skill Development" by the Wadia Institute of Himalayan Geology, aims to impart practical training to postgraduate students in various Earth Science disciplines, including structural and evolutionary geology, geochemistry, geomorphology, glaciology, magnetostratigraphy, etc.

name: Sugamya Pustakalaya
description: The scheme "Sugamya Pustakalaya" is a unique resource providing reading material in accessible formats (Braille, audio, large print, digital, e-books) to visually impaired and print-disabled individuals across India, offering both free individual membership and paid institutional membership.

name: Shilpi Gram Scheme (Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe)
description: The scheme aims to re-establish traditional artisan skills among SC/ST communities. It provides free training, infrastructure support, and marketing opportunities to artisans in selected artisan villages.

name: Livelihood Opportunity Promotion Scheme (Disabled)
description: The scheme aims to promote self-reliance among persons with disabilities through grants, term loans, and margin money assistance.

name: Livelihood Opportunity Promotion Scheme (Scheduled Tribes)
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among Scheduled Tribe individuals through financial support, including loans, margin money, and grants.

name: Livelihood Opportunity Promotion Scheme (Scheduled Caste)
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among Scheduled Castes. It provides financial aid, including loans, margin money, and grants, for livelihood projects.

name: Laado Protsahan Yojana
description: The scheme aims to encourage the birth of girl children in poor families and promote their holistic development. Under this scheme, financial support ₹1,50,000/- is provided in seven installments to the parents or guardians of girls born in Government/authorized Medical Institutions.

name: ICSSR International Collaboration
description: The Indian Council of Social scientific Research (ICSSR), under the Ministry of Education, offers a Travel Grant for participation in International Conference abroad. The aim of this programme is to assist invited social science scholars to make substantial contributions to international seminars/co

name: Stand-Up India
description: A scheme by Ministry of Finance for financing SC/ST and  Women Entrepreneurs by facilitating bank loans for setting up a greenfield project  Enterprise in manufacturing, services, trading sector and activities allied to agriculture.

name: Sugarcane Development Scheme
description: The "Sugarcane Development Scheme" by the Sugarcane Development and Sugar Industry, Govt of Uttarakhand, aims to support quality sugarcane cultivation. It provides subsidies to farmers for nursery development, seed/soil treatment, and sett treatment to manage pests and diseases.

name: Coaching Scheme for Divyang Students
description: The scheme "Coaching Scheme for Divyang Students" by the National Institute for the Empowerment of Persons with Visual Disabilities (NIEPVD), Dehradun, aims to support students with disabilities in preparing for competitive government examinations.

name: Braille Equipment Provision
description: The "Braille Equipment Provision" scheme aims to empower persons with visual disabilities to live independently by supporting their writing, computing, mobility, and entertainment needs. Through this scheme, Braille equipment is manufactured and made available to individuals and institutions.

name: Accessibility Services to Disabled People
description: The scheme "Accessibility Services to Disabled People" aims to provide suitable employment opportunities to unemployed visually impaired and low vision individuals. Through this scheme, assistance is provided in securing placements in the public and private sectors.

name: Skill Development and Economic Empowerment
description: The scheme "Skill Development and Economic Empowerment" aims to provide vocational training and skill enhancement for visually challenged individuals. Through this scheme, free education, food, accommodation, and training in various job-oriented fields are provided to eligible candidates.

name: Model School under School Education
description:
The scheme aims to provide inclusive quality education to children with visual disabilities from pre-school to senior secondary level.
Through this scheme, students receive free residential facilities, educational materials, assistive devices, and digital tools for a modern learning experience.

name: Provision of Special Assistance for Development of Low-Cost Educational Materials (SIPDA)
description: The scheme aims to provide financial support for the development and supply of low-cost educational materials for visually impaired students. Through this scheme, grants are provided to implementing agencies for purchasing and producing assistive learning devices.

name: Assistance to Disabled Persons for Purchase/Fitting of Aids and Appliances (NIEPVD Dehradun)
description: This scheme, implemented by NIEPVD Dehradun, provides free assistive devices and appliances to eligible persons with disabilities to enhance their independence and improve their quality of life.

name: Grant for Construction of Sports Infrastructure
description: The scheme "Grant for Construction of Sports Infrastructure" by the Department of Sports, Government of Uttarakhand, aims to provide financial assistance for building sports facilities. Through this scheme, up to ₹50,00,000/- or 25% of the project cost is granted.

name: Akhil Bharatiya Civil Services Pratiyogita
description: The scheme "Akhil Bharatiya Civil Services Pratiyogita" by the Dept. of Sports, Government of Uttarakhand, aims to encourage sports participation among government employees. Through this scheme, selected employees receive allowances and facilities for participating in national-level competition.

name: Financial Assistance to Sports Associations/ Clubs/ Committees of Uttarakhand
description: This scheme provides financial grants and assistance to recognized sports associations, clubs, and committees for organizing sports competitions at national, state, and district levels, and for purchasing sports equipment for selected players, benefiting around 20 sports bodies/players annually.

name: Provision of Sports Kits to Players Participating at the National Level
description: This scheme provides a sports kit worth ₹5000/- (including tracksuit, jersey, shorts, socks, etc.) to approximately 1000 players annually who participate in various sports at the national level, selected through their respective sports federations.

name: Contract Khel Prashikshakon Ki Niyukti
description: The scheme facilitates the annual appointment of contract-based sports trainers for conducting various local training camps across Uttarakhand, thereby promoting employment opportunities and strengthening grassroots sports infrastructure.

name: Fish Farming Diversification (Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe) Scheme
description: The scheme aims to promote sustainable livelihoods for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe communities through fishery-based diversified activities. Under this scheme, a 60% subsidy is provided to eligible fish farmers for pond renovation & integrated fish farming (duck/poultry/fruit plantation).

name: State Fisheries Input Scheme
description: Under this scheme, fish farmers who are already engaged in fish farming are provided a 50% subsidy on the total cost of fish inputs such as fish feed, medicines, and other essential materials required for fish farming.

name: Construction of Ideal Fish Pond Scheme in Hilly Areas
description: The scheme aims to promote sustainable fish farming through cluster-based pond development. It provides 50% subsidy for pond construction and first-year inputs to eligible individuals and groups.

name: Payment of Ex-Gratia Amount on Death of the UPNL Employee During Service
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to the legal dependent of the deceased UPNAL employee, who was duly nominated during the service period to receive the ex-gratia amount. Under this scheme, an ex-gratia amount of ₹1,00,000/- is provided from the UPNAL fund to eligible beneficiaries.

name: Sponsorship for Employment
description: The scheme aims to provide contractual employment opportunities. It supports ex-servicemen, their dependents, and widows by sponsoring them for contractual posts based on qualifications and district-wise vacancies.

name: Pre-Examination Coaching Scheme
description: Under this scheme, free coaching and monthly scholarships are provided to eligible Scheduled Tribe students appearing for exams like IAS, PCS, engineering, medical, NDA, Group ‘C’ exams and other competitive examinations.

name: Indira Gandhi Matritva Poshan Yojana
description: Under the scheme, women who conceive their second child and fulfill the prescribed conditions will receive cash assistance of ₹6,000/-, paid in five installments.

name: Financial Assistance Scheme for Journalists and Litterateurs - Rajasthan
description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to journalists and litterateurs for the treatment of critical illnesses, medical emergencies and no source of income, unemployment, or advanced age.

name: Financial Assistance Scheme for Dependents of Deceased Journalists and Litterateurs - Rajasthan
description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to the dependents of deceased journalists and litterateurs in situations such as medical emergencies, unemployment, or when there is no other source of income.

name: Samuhik Kanya Vivah Sahayata Yojana (UKBOCWWB)
description: The scheme aims to support the marriage of daughters of construction workers by providing financial assistance of ₹61,000/- for their daughter’s marriage in a group marriage event.

name: Nikshay Poshan Yojana
description: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India has announced the scheme for incentives for nutritional support to TB patients. This scheme will be called “Nikshay Poshan Yojana”.

name: Research Fellowship Scheme for Scheduled Tribe Candidates
description: The scheme aims to support the Scheduled Tribe candidates from Scheduled Areas and the Saharia Area of Rajasthan to register themselves as research scholars with all recognized Central/State/Deemed/Private University located in any part of India for pursuing Ph.D. Programme.

name: Operation of Ashram Hostels
description: Under this scheme, free accommodation, nutritious meals, educational materials, uniforms, personal hygiene items, and other facilities are provided to Scheduled Tribe (ST) students residing in ashram hostels operated by the Tribal Area Development Department.

name: Cash Amount for Encouraging Scheduled Tribe Sportsperson Students
description: Under this scheme, cash awards, certificates, and mementos are provided as a form of encouragement to Scheduled Tribe  sportsperson students who secure the top three positions in national and international sports events.

name: Jan Samuh Bima Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Sahariya families in the event of the death of the heads of the families. Under this scheme, a one-time financial assistance of ₹25,000/- is provided by the insurance company to the deceased's family to help reduce their economic burden.

name: Prakashan Sahayata Yojana
description: The scheme aims to support original literary/research work related to tribal communities. Authors are provided financial assistance of ₹6,000 to ₹12,000 for publication.

name: Hostel Rent Assistance Scheme for Tribal Students
description: The scheme provides financial assistance towards hostel rent for Scheduled Tribe students pursuing undergraduate and postgraduate courses in government colleges, who are staying in rented accommodation for the purpose of regular studies.

name: Operation of Sports Hostels
description: The scheme aims to encourage tribal students to participate in sports and prepare them for national & international competitions. Tribal students from Classes 6 to 12 are provided with free accommodation, specialized training, nutritious meals & other necessary facilities in the sports hostels.

name: Maa-Badi / Maa-Badi Day-Care Centre Scheme
description: The scheme aims to impart basic education, nutrition, and awareness to tribal children aged 6–12. The scheme offers meals, learning material, and other support through community-run centres.

name: Free Coaching Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide good coaching quality for DNT candidates to enable them to appear in competitive examinations and succeed in obtaining an appropriate job in the Public/Private Sector.

name: Awarding Teleeducation Scholarships To Afghan Students
description: The "Awarding Teleeducation Scholarships To Afghan Students" scheme under e-VidyaBharati Network Project, launched by the Ministry of External Affairs, offers 1000 annual scholarships to Afghan students for UGC-approved online UG and PG programs from Indian universities.

name: Assistance Program for the Cultivation of Lotus Fruit (Dragon Fruit)
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers to support the cultivation of dragon fruit (lotus fruit), with higher benefits for SC/ST and priority for small-scale and women farmers.

name: Construction of Water Storage Tanks for Drip Irrigation
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers across Gujarat for constructing water storage tanks to support drip irrigation, with cost-sharing benefits based on farmer category.

name: Gargi Sanskrit Girl Student Scholarship Scheme
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to girl students from Class 6 to 12 studying in Sanskrit institutions in Uttarakhand to promote Sanskrit education among female students.

name: Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar Sanskrit Scholarship Scheme for Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Students
description: This scheme provides financial assistance to Scheduled Caste (SC) and Scheduled Tribe (ST) students studying in Sanskrit schools from Class 6 to 12 in Uttarakhand to promote Sanskrit education among disadvantaged communities.

name: Akhilbhartiya Sanskrit Kavi Sammelan Yojana
description: The "Akhilbhartiya Sanskrit Kavi Sammelan Yojana" invites and honors Sanskrit poets who can compose and recite poetry in Sanskrit by providing them a monetary honorarium for participating in state-organized events, especially on national or state festivals in Uttarakhand.

name: Shodhgrantha Chayan Yojana
description: The scheme provides financial honorarium and free copies to authors of research manuscripts related to Sanskrit literature and allied disciplines for publication purposes.

name: Antyeshthi Sahay Yojana
description: The "Antyeshthi Sahay Yojana" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, provides financial assistance of ₹5,000 to the heir of a deceased senior citizen who was receiving old age assistance.

name: Pandit Dindayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana (Developing Caste Welfare) (EBC)
description: The scheme aims to support Economically Weaker Sections (EWS) by offering financial aid up to ₹1,20,000/- for house construction. This scheme also ensures that Economically Weaker Sections receive support in securing shelter.

name: Saraswati Sadhana Yojana to Socially and Educationally Backward Girls studying in Class 9th
description: Under this scheme, free bicycle assistance is provided to Socially and Educationally Backward class girls studying in Class 9 in government and grant-in-aid schools across Gujarat.

name: 100% State Government Divyangjan Term Loan Yojana
description: The scheme provides provide financial support to native residents of Gujarat who have a disability of 40% or more. The eligible individuals can avail of a term loan ranging from ₹50,000/- to ₹1,00,000/- at a concessional interest rate of 6% per annum for a repayment period of five years.

name: Loan for Training of Commercial Pilot (GUEEDC)
description: The scheme "Loan for Training of Commercial Pilot (GUEEDC)" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, provides financial loan assistance of up to ₹25,00,000/- at 4% simple interest per annum is provided to Unreserved category candidates for pursuing commercial pilot training.

name: Financial Assistance to Destitute Elderly and Disabled Person
description: The scheme "Financial Assistance to Destitute Elderly and Disabled Person" provides monthly financial aid to elderly individuals (60+) and severely disabled persons who meet specific income and dependency criteria.

name: Passenger Auto Rickshaw Loan Scheme (DAADC)
description: The "Passenger Auto Rickshaw Loan Scheme" introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department offers financial assistance in the form of loans to Scheduled Caste individuals from Antyodaya families to purchase passenger auto rickshaws and enhance their livelihood opportunities.

name: Samaveshit Shiksha Yojana
description: "Samaveshit Shiksha Yojana"  aims to provide inclusive education support and special facilities to children with special needs aged 6 to 18 years studying in government schools from Classes 1 to 12.

name: Nishulk Ganvesh Yojana
description: Under "Nishulk Ganvesh Yojana", students of classes 1 to 8 enrolled in government or government-aided schools in Uttarakhand receive free school uniforms or equivalent financial assistance through DBT/SMC.

name: Gunwatta Evam Navachar Nishulk Pathya Pustak Yojana
description: Under "Gunwatta Evam Navachar Nishulk Pathya Pustak Yojana", free textbooks are provided to all boys and girls studying from Class 1 to 8 in government and government-aided schools and recognized madrasas that implement the state-prescribed curriculum.

name: Rani Lakshmi Bai Atma Raksha Prashikshan Yojana
description: The "Rani Lakshmi Bai Atma Raksha Prashikshan Yojana" provides free self-defense training to girl students studying in government upper primary and secondary schools across Uttarakhand.

name: Chief Minister's Higher Education Research Promotion Scheme
description: The scheme aims to promote high-quality, interdisciplinary research in higher education institutions across the state. Under this scheme, a one-time research grant of up to ₹15 lakhs (extendable to ₹18 Lakhs in special cases) is provided, alongwith a monthly stipend of ₹5,000 for research assistant.

name: Natural Death Assistance for the Construction Workers (UKBOCWWB)
description: “Natural Death Assistance for the Construction Workers’’ is a social security scheme that provides financial assistance of ₹2,00,000/- to the nominee or dependent of a deceased registered construction worker in the event of their natural death.

name: Family Pension for the Construction Workers (UKBOCWWB)
description: “Family Pension for the Construction Workers’’ is a social security scheme that provides monthly pension of ₹500/- per month or 50% of the pensioner's pension whichever is higher to the spouse of the registered worker, who is a pensioner in case of death of the construction worker.

name: Old Age Pension for the Construction Workers (On Completion Of 60 Years) (UKBOCWWB)
description: “Old Age Pension for the Construction Workers (On Completion Of 60 Years)’’ is a social security scheme that provides a monthly pension of ₹1,000 per month to the beneficiaries who have completed 60 years of age.

name: Award Scheme for Candidates Selected in NDA, IMA, OTA, INA, IAF
description: Under this scheme, a one-time award of ₹50,000/- is given to each candidate from Uttarakhand who has been selected for service at premier defence academies such as the NDA, IMA, OTA, INA, and IAF, and is either undergoing training or has been formally inducted into service.

name: Old Age Pension for the Construction Workers (On Completion Of 65 Years) (UKBOCWWB)
description: “Old Age Pension for the Construction Workers (On Completion Of 65 Years)’’ is a social security scheme that provides a monthly pension of ₹1,500/- per month to the beneficiaries to the eligible workers of the board who have completed 65 years of age.

name: Scheme for Construction of Toilet (UKBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to registered eligible construction workers (considering the family as one unit) for the construction of toilets.

name: Special Financial Assistance Scheme for Meritorious Students of the State for Preparation of Competitive Examinations
description: The scheme aims to provide financial support of ₹50,000/- to meritorious students who have cleared the preliminary examination conducted by the State or Union Public Service Commission for Group 'A' and 'B' services, or the written examination for the Armed Forces (e.g., NDA, CDS, OTA, etc.).

name: Assistance for Daughters’ Marriage of the Construction Workers (UKBOCWWB)
description: “Assistance for Daughters’ Marriage of the Construction Workers” is a social security scheme that aims to provide financial assistance for the marriage of the female workers and their daughters.

name: Disability Pension for the Construction Workers (UKBOCWWB)
description: “Disability Pension for the Construction Workers’’ is a social security scheme that aims to provide a monthly disability pension on permanent disability due to paralysis, leprosy or accident etc to the registered eligible workers of the board.

name: Mukhyamantri Alpshankhyak Medhwi Balikha Protsahan Yojana
description: “Mukhyamantri Alpshankhyak Medhwi Balikha Protsahan Yojana” is a social security scheme that provides incentives to meritorious girl students belonging to minority communities based on their merit in higher secondary or equivalent and intermediate level.

name: Maulana Azad Education Finance Foundation Scheme
description: “Maulana Azad Education Finance Foundation Scheme” is a social security scheme by the Minority Welfare Department, Government of Uttarakhand, that provides interest-free loans for higher education and overseas studies to the  minority students.

name: Scholarship for Engineering and Medical Education
description: The scheme aims to support the higher education of dependents of ex-servicemen by providing financial assistance for pursuing engineering, medical, and PhD courses. Under this scheme, annual scholarships are awarded to beneficiaries based on their course of study.

name: Chief Minister Hunar Yojana
description: “Chief Minister Hunar Yojana” is a social security scheme by the Minority Welfare Department, Government of Uttarakhand, that provides free of cost training and stipend to the minority community to enhance their skills and knowledge.

name: Uttarakhand Shaheed Kosh Anudan Yojana
description: The scheme provides a one-time grant of ₹10,00,000 to widows/dependents of martyred soldiers or paramilitary personnel.

name: Minority Self-Employment Scheme
description: “Minority Self-Employment Scheme” is a social security scheme by the Minority Welfare Department, Government of Uttarakhand, that provides financial assistance through facilitating loans to the minority community to build their own employment.

name: Eja-Boi Shagun Yojana
description: Under this scheme, a cash gift of ₹2,000 /- would be paid to those women who ensured 48 hours stay for delivery of their child in the government hospitals or health care centres.

name: Assistance to Pilgrims for Kailash Mansarovar Yatra - Rajasthan
description: The objective of this scheme is to provide financial support to residents of Rajasthan who successfully complete the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra organized by the Ministry of External Affairs, Govt. of India. Under this scheme, each pilgrim is granted financial assistance of up to ₹1,00,000/-.

name: Sindhu Darshan Pilgrimage Scheme - Rajasthan
description: The objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to pilgrims undertaking a pilgrimage to the Sindhu River in the Ladakh region of India. Under this scheme, selected beneficiaries receive reimbursement of their travel expenses, up to a maximum of ₹10,000/- per pilgrim.

name: Financial Assistance/Pension to Former Renowned Sportspersons
description: The scheme aims to provide monthly support of ₹4,000 to ₹10,000 for life to financially weak former athletes of the state.

name: Government-Run Old Age and Infirm Homes
description: Under this scheme, free residential, food, clothing, and healthcare are provided to destitute elderly individuals above 60 years in state-run residential facilities.

name: Parityakta Pension Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension to Abandoned married women, mentally ill husband/wife & destitute unmarried women in the state. Under this scheme, beneficiaries receive a pension of ₹1,200/- per month, & in case of mental disability (spouse), the amount is ₹1,400/- per month.

name: Award Scheme to Encourage Entrepreneurs
description: The scheme aims to encourage and recognize the exceptional craftsmanship and weaving skills of registered artisans and weavers in the state. It provides awards at both the state and district levels to outstanding performers in the handicrafts and handloom (cotton and woolen textile) sectors.

name: Uttarakhand State Shilp Ratna Award
description: Under this scheme, every year, 25 artisans of Uttarakhand are honored. The award includes a cash prize of ₹1,00,000, a certificate of appreciation, a memento, an angavastra (ceremonial stole), and a citation letter.

name: Special Incentive Scheme for Women of Tharu, Boksa and Other Tribes (For Training and Marketing)
description: The scheme aims to empower tribal women artisans of Tharu, Boksa and Other Tribal Communities through specialized training and marketing opportunities and ensures the provision of financial assistance for travel, logistics, and stall rent for participating artisans.

name: Assistance Scheme for Handloom Spinning-Weaving Women Workers
description: Under this scheme, provide financial support for traditional women artisans engaged in spinning and weaving. They promote traditional weaving by providing handloom equipment worth up to ₹25,000 with a 90% departmental subsidy.

name: Pension Scheme for Artisans
description: Under this scheme, an additional monthly incentive of ₹400/- is provided to senior artisans aged 60 or above who are already receiving old-age pension and belong to below-poverty-line (BPL) families.

name: ICSSR Doctoral Fellowship
description: The Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR) offers Doctoral Fellowships to support full-time Ph.D. scholars engaged in high-quality research in the field of social and human sciences. These fellowships are awarded to Indian research scholars registered in Ph.D. programs at UGC-recognized u

name: ICSSR Senior Fellowship
description: The Indian Council of Social scientific Research (ICSSR), under the Ministry of Education, offers a Senior Fellowship Scheme designed to assist accomplished Indian researchers in conducting advanced social science research.

name: ICSSR Post-Doctoral Fellowship
description: The Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR) offers Postdoctoral Fellowships to encourage original and quality research by young and mid-career scholars in the field of social sciences. It is designed for researchers who have just finished their Ph.D. in advanced social science research.

name: Rythu Bima Scheme
description: Rythu Bandhu Farmer Group Life  Insurance Scheme for Farmers” is a life insurance scheme by the Government of Telangana that provides insurance coverage to the nominee of a farmer in case of the farmer’s death. It is free for farmers and is implemented through LIC.

name: Saraswati Sadhana Yojana to Economically Backward Class Girls studying in Class 9
description: Under this scheme, free bicycle assistance is provided to economically backward class girls studying in Class 9 in government and grant-in-aid schools across Gujarat.

name: Passenger Vehicle/Loading Vehicle Loan Scheme (DAADC)
description: The "Passenger Vehicle/Loading Vehicle Loan Scheme" introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department provides financial support to unemployed individuals from Antyodaya Caste for purchasing passenger or freight vehicles.

name: Pashupalan Dhiran Yojana
description: "Pashupalan Dhiran Yojana" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department provides loan assistance for animal husbandry to Rabari and Bharwad castes from the socially and educationally backward classes.

name: Pandit Dindayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana (Developing Caste Welfare) (NT-DNT)
description: The "Pandit Dindayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana (Developing Caste Welfare) (NT-DNT)" provides financial assistance of up to ₹1,20,000/- to the people belonging to Nomadic Tribes and Denotified Tribes.

name: Mahila Adhikarita Yojana (Gujarat Safai Kamdar Development Corporation)
description: "Mahila Adhikarita Yojana" introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, is a centrally sponsored financial support scheme offering loans of ₹20,000/- at a subsidized interest rate to women sweepers and their dependents to promote self-reliance and upliftment.

name: Pandit Dindayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana-Developing Caste Welfare
description: The "Pandit Dindayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana-Developing Caste Welfare" provides financial assistance of up to ₹1,20,000/- to socially and educationally backward classes, economically backward classes, and nomadic exempted castes for constructing houses across Gujarat.

name: Nalanda Award
description: The "Nalanda Award" implemented by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, recognizes organizations for exceptional work in the field of social welfare, particularly for the socially and educationally disadvantaged sections.

name: Palak Mata-Pita Yojana
description: The "Palak Mata-Pita Yojana" introduced on 29th August, 2009 by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, provides a monthly assistance of ₹3000 to foster parents raising orphaned children or children whose mother has remarried after the father's death.

name: Scheme to Provide Electric Scooter to Disabled Person
description: The "Scheme to Provide Electric Scooter to Disabled Person" provides financial assistance of up to ₹25,000 for the purchase of electric scooters to eligible persons with orthopedic disabilities.

name: Kaidi Sahay Yojana
description: The "Kaidi Sahay Yojana" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, provides financial assistance of ₹25,000/- to the family of a prisoner who is the sole or main earner, to support them through self-employment.

name: Assistance for Area Expansion of Spice Crops
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers for the area expansion of spice crops, including seed and rhizomatic spices, to enhance spice production in Gujarat.

name: Assistance Program for Expansion of Fruit Crop Cultivation
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers in Gujarat for expanding fruit crop cultivation like mango, banana, papaya, etc., through intensive and ultra-intensive farming methods.

name: Assistance in Packing Materials under Post Harvest Management of Horticultural Produce
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers to procure packing materials like corrugated and wooden boxes for post-harvest management of horticultural produce.

name: Agro Service Provider Scheme
description: The "Agro Service Provider Scheme" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, aims to support farmers by providing subsidies for acquiring agricultural implements.

name: A Scheme to Provide Assistance for Building E-Market Facilities in Market Committees
description: This scheme provides financial assistance to market committees in Gujarat to establish e-market facilities, aligning with the National Agriculture Market Policy for a unified national e-market.

name: Scheme to Encourage Farmers to Add Value to Crops
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers across Gujarat in adding value to their crops by providing financial assistance for purchasing machinery.

name: Capital Subsidy Scheme for Setting Up Solar Plant in Milk Cooperatives in Gujarat State (Tribal Area)
description: The scheme aims to promote renewable energy and reduce electricity expenses. Through this scheme, a 75% subsidy is provided for setting up solar plants (1KW to 40KW) in milk cooperative societies in tribal areas.

name: Atma Nirbhar Pashu Palan Yojana
description: The scheme aims to enhance rural livelihoods, promote sustainable animal husbandry practices, & contribute to self-reliance in livestock sector. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to unemployed individuals, SHGs, cooperative societies, etc. for livestock rearing & allied activities.

name: Atma Nirbhar Plantation Yojana
description: The scheme aims to promote self-reliance in the agriculture sector through sustainable plantation activities across the state. Under this scheme, support in the form of plantation assistance and allied resources is provided to individual farmers, Self-Help Groups & Farmer Producer Organizations.

name: Assistance Program for Planting in Floriculture
description: The scheme offers financial assistance to farmers in Gujarat for the cultivation of floriculture crops, including loose, cut, and tuberous flowers, based on crop type and farmer category.

name: Assistance for Cultivation of Medicinal/ Aromatic Crops
description: The scheme provides financial assistance up to 75% of the cost or ₹11,250/- per hectare (whichever is lower) to farmers in Gujarat cultivating medicinal or aromatic crops on land between 0.20 and 4 hectares.

name: Grant for Purchase and Repair of Various Assistive Devices/Equipment for Persons with Disabilities
description: Under this scheme, a grant of up to ₹3,500 is provided for the purchase of individual aids, which may be increased to a maximum of ₹7,000 in special cases. Additionally, ₹500 is provided for the repair of prosthetic limbs and other assistive equipment.

name: State Level Awards for Divyang Persons
description: Under this scheme, a cash prize of ₹8,000, along with a medal and a certificate of appreciation, is awarded to outstanding individuals in categories such as disabled employees, outstanding sportspersons, and best self-employed service providers.

name: Free Pre-Recruitment Training
description: “Free Pre-Recruitment Training” is a social security scheme that provides free of cost pre-recruitment training to the sons of the ex-servicemen for the recruitment in Army/Para-Military Forces and Police Forces.

name: Free Computer Training
description: “Free Computer Training” is a social security scheme that provides free of cost computer training to widows, dependents of the ex-servicemen and soldiers.

name: Housing Assistance Grant
description: “Housing Assistance Grant” is a social security scheme that provides financial assistance for the construction/ repair of houses to the widows, dependents of martyred soldiers, and those soldiers who have become physically disabled in various wars, border skirmishes, and internal security.

name: One-Time Grant Money To Soldiers Conferred With Gallantry Medal Award
description: “One-Time Grant Money To Soldiers Conferred With Gallantry Medal Award” is a social security scheme that provides financial assistance to serving soldiers, and former soldiers of the state who have been conferred with the “Gallantry Medal Award”.

name: One-Time Grant Money To Soldiers Conferred With Vishisht Seva Medal Award
description: “One-Time Grant Money To Soldiers Conferred With Vishisht Seva Medal Award” is a social security scheme that provides financial assistance to serving soldiers, former soldiers of the state who have been conferred with “Vishisht Seva Medal Award”.

name: Atal Awas Yojana - Uttarakhand
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹1,30,000 is provided for constructing houses in hilly areas and ₹1,20,000 for plain areas to homeless Scheduled Caste families who are below the poverty line (BPL) or fall within a defined income limit.

name: Rajasthan Varishth Patrakar Samman Yojana
description: Under this scheme, a monthly financial assistance of ₹15,000/- is provided to full-time accredited journalists who are 60 years of age or older & have served continuously for at least 20 years in daily, weekly, fortnightly newspapers, independent publications, electronic media, or news agencies.

name: PM – Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana
description: PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana is a government scheme that aims to provide free electricity to households in India.

name: Incentive Scheme for Meritorious Students of Economically Backward Class of General Category
description: Under this scheme, a one-time financial assistance of ₹15,000/- along with a certificate of appreciation is awarded to top 100 meritorious students of Class 10 & each stream of Class 12, who are listed in state-level merit list of Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education, Ajmer.

name: Chief Ministers’ Education Assistance Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from economically weaker sections, marginalized communities & specially-abled students. Under this scheme, students receive financial aid for pursuing education within & outside the state, abroad, & in registered coaching institutions.

name: Hon’ble Chief Minister’s Merit Scholarship Scheme-Sikkim
description: This scheme aims to provide free education up to the Graduation level to talented and deserving children from underprivileged families with an opportunity to study in reputed public schools both within and outside the state.

name: A Program to Provide 90 Percent Assistance in Planting Material of Horticultural Fruit Crops
description: This scheme offers 90% financial assistance to farmers for purchasing planting materials of fruit crops to promote horticulture.

name: Crop Input Subsidy to the Farmers for Crop Loss Due to Natural Calamities
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers in Gujarat who suffer crop losses due to natural calamities, based on crop damage surveys conducted by the district administration.

name: To Provide Financial Assistance to the Farmers Practicing Natural Farming Under the Completely Chemical Free Dang District
description: This scheme provides financial assistance to farmers practicing natural farming in the completely chemical-free Dang district to promote sustainable agriculture, increase productivity, and ensure environmental conservation.

name: Pradhan Mantri Vidyalaxmi (PM-Vidyalaxmi) Scheme
description: The "Pradhan Mantri Vidyalaxmi (Pm-vidyalaxmi) Scheme" aims to provide financial support for higher education through education loans. Under this scheme, financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- is provided to meritorious students seeking admission to domestic institutions.

name: Atma Nirbhar Matsya Palan Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide a 45% subsidy with credit linkage for fishery infrastructure to ST individuals, SHGs, and FPOs engaged in aquaculture.

name: Free Coaching for SCs, OBCs and beneficiaries of PM CARES Children Scheme
description: To provide high-quality free coaching to economically disadvantaged Scheduled Castes (SCs), Other Backward Classes (OBCs), and eligible beneficiaries of the PM CARES Children Scheme for competitive exams in public and private sector employment and admission into professional courses.

name: Arunachal Pradesh State Stipend Scheme
description: Under this scheme, provide financial support to scheduled tribe (ST) students pursuing higher and technical education through stipends and book grants.

name: Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (Scheduled Caste Category)
description: The scheme "Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (Scheduled Caste Category)" provides 150 kg of BIS Type II concentrate feed to Scheduled Caste Category livestock owners after parturition to support cattle health, increase milk production, and enhance calf development.

name: COP-5 Financial Assistance to Agricultural Credit Co-operative Banks (PACS/LAMPS) for Reconstruction and Reestablishment (General/Tribal Area)
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to Primary Agricultural Credit Societies (PACS) and Large-sized Agricultural Multi-Purpose Societies (LAMPS) in General and Tribal areas to strengthen their economic viability and ensure their continued contribution to the cooperative credit structure.

name: Skilled Youth Startup Scheme
description: Sikkim Skilled Youth Startup Scheme was launched in 2020 and is implemented by the Department of Commerce & Industries which aims at assisting the educated unemployed youth in setting up a myriad of enterprises through loans with back-ended financial subsidy assistance.

name: Trainning Scheme for Horticulture Skill Development to Landless farm labour at Centre of Excelence of Department
description: The "Training Scheme for Horticulture Skill Development to Landless Farm Labour at Centre of Excellence of Department" aims to provide skill development training in horticulture to landless farm labourers through the Centres of Excellence.

name: Scheme on Promotion of Use of Liquid Fermented Organic Manure (LFOM) for Increasing Organic Carbon in Soil
description: The "Scheme on Promotion of Use of Liquid Fermented Organic Manure (LFOM) for Increasing Organic Carbon in Soil" offers financial assistance to promote the use of Liquid Fermented Organic Manure (LFOM) and enhance organic carbon levels in soil.

name: Scheme of Production of Domestic Indigenous Certified Seed of Cotton Varieties
description: The "Scheme of Production of Domestic Indigenous Certified Seed of Cotton Varieties"  introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, aims to promote the cultivation and production of local cotton seed varieties across Gujarat.

name: Fellowship for the Post-Graduate Students in Various Faculties Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University
description: The scheme "Fellowship for the Post-Graduate Students in Various Faculties Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University" provides a monthly fellowship to meritorious Post-Graduate students across various faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University.

name: The Scheme for Fellowship to Under Graduate Students for Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University
description: "The Scheme for Fellowship to Under Graduate Students for Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University" provides monthly fellowship to meritorious undergraduate students across various faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University.

name: Planning for Best Livestock Keeper's Award Function
description: The "Planning for Best Livestock Keeper's Award Function" scheme by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department honors outstanding pastoralists in Gujarat by awarding them at Taluka, District, and State levels for their excellence in animal husbandry.

name: Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for Post Graduate Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University
description: The "Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for Post Graduate Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University" provides monthly scholarships to students pursuing Post Graduate in various faculties at Junagadh Agricultural University.

name: Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for the Under Graduate Meritorious Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University
description: The "Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for the Under Graduate Meritorious Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University" provides monthly scholarships to students pursuing Under Graduate in various faculties at Junagadh Agricultural University.

name: Scheme for Awarding Fellowships for Undergraduate and Postgraduate Students
description: The "Scheme for Awarding Fellowships for Undergraduate and Postgraduate Students" provides financial support in the form of monthly scholarships to students pursuing higher education in various faculties at Anand Agricultural University.

name: Mukhya Mantri Agricultural Mechanization Scheme
description: The "Mukhya Mantri Agricultural Mechanization Scheme" launched by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, offers financial assistance ranging from ₹1,200/- to ₹11,00,000/- to farmers in Gujarat for purchasing agricultural machinery and farm equipment.

name: Construction of Dudhghar/ Godown (Scheduled Caste Area)
description: The scheme "Construction of Dudhghar/ Godown (Scheduled Caste Area)" provides financial assistance for the construction of Dudhghar (milk storage unit) and Godown (cattle feed storage) for Village Milk Producer Co-operative Societies in Scheduled Caste areas of Gujarat.

name: Construction of Dudhghar/ Godown (Scheduled Tribe Area)
description: The scheme "Construction of Dudhghar/ Godown (Scheduled Tribe Area)" provides financial assistance for the construction of Dudhghar (milk storage unit) and Godown (cattle feed storage) for Village Milk Producer Co-operative Societies in Scheduled Tribe areas of Gujarat.

name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (Maharashtra)
description: "Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (Maharashtra)" is a scheme by the Social Justice & Special Assistance Dept, Govt of Maharashtra. In this scheme, widows aged 40 to 79 years who are from a BPL family receive a pension of ₹1500/- per month.

name: National Family Benefit Scheme (Maharashtra)
description: The scheme "National Family Benefit Scheme (Maharashtra)" is a social welfare scheme by the Social Justice & Special Assistance Department, Government of Maharashtra. Under this scheme, ₹20,000/-. is provided to the family in the event of the death of their primary breadwinner.

name: Mukhyamantri Rajya Bridhhabasta Pension Yojana
description: “Mukhyamantri Rajya Bridhhabasta Pension Yojana” is a Social Security Scheme by the Department of Women, Child Development & Social Security, Government of Jharkhand. The scheme provides financial asistance to the age group of 60 years and above.

name: Mukh‍yamantri Janakal‍yaan (Sambal 2.0) Yojana (Asangathit Karmakaar Man‍da)
description: The Mukhyamantri Jan Kalyan (Sambal 2.0) Yojana is a initiative of Madhya Pradesh government. The scheme will provide much-needed social security to unorganized workers in the state and help them live a dignified life.

name: Jan Nayak Pustakalaya evam Digital Adhyan Kendra
description: "Jan Nayak Pustakalaya evam Digital Adhyan Kendra" scheme aims to develop all Jannayak Karpoori Thakur Hostels, other backward class welfare hostels, and OBC girls’ hostels across the state.

name: Anya Pichhda Varg Kalyan Chhatravaas
description: The Scheme "Anya Pichhda Varg Kalyan Chhatravaas" under the BC & EBC Welfare Department, Bihar. under this scheme, provied ₹1,000/- per month hostel grant is provided for each student and 15 kg of free food grains per month (9 kg rice + 6 kg wheat).

name: Mukhyamantri Pichhda Varg Evam Ati Pichhda Varg Kaushal Vikas Prashikshan Yojana
description: The scheme aims to improve employability through free skill training for youth of backward and extremely backward communities.

name: Establishment of Goat Unit (10 +1)
description: The "Establishment of Goat Unit (10+1)" scheme by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to promote the social and economic upliftment of goat breeders by encouraging goat breeding and genetic improvement through pure breeding.

name: Subsidy Scheme on Establishment of 25 R.I.R. Bird’s Unit, 100 Broiler Bird’s Unit and Stipend for Poultry Farming Training for Scheduled Caste People
description: The scheme aims to support Scheduled Caste individuals by providing financial assistance for poultry farming.

name: Nagaland Stipend for Girls of Secondary Students
description: The scheme aims to encourage girl students of class IX & X studying at Govt. High Schools & Govt. Higher Secondary Schools who belong to economically weaker families. Under this scheme, a stipend will be provided to two girls from each class, nominated by Headmaster/Principal of concerned school.

name: Stipend To Students Studying at Govt. Hindi Institute Dimapur
description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to students enrolled at the Government Hindi Institute, Dimapur. Under this scheme, a monthly stipend of ₹400/- is given to student every year from the allocated scholarship fund provided by the State Government.

name: Scheme to Provide Assistance in Cow Maintenance Expenses to Farmers Practicing Completely Natural Farming Based on Indigenous Cows
description: This scheme provides financial assistance for the maintenance of one indigenous cow to farmers who practice completely natural farming methods using native cows.

name: Scheme to Assist for Infrastructural Facilities for Gaushalas & Panjrapole
description: "Scheme to Assist for Infrastructural Facilities for Gaushalas & Panjrapole" aims to support animal welfare organizations like gaushalas and panjrapoles by offering financial assistance for the development and construction of essential infrastructure.

name: Fodder Development Scheme For Gram Panchayat, Gaushala And Panjarpol Having Gauchar Land
description: This scheme provides financial assistance for the development and improvement of gauchar (pasture) land to promote green fodder cultivation and ensure better health and productivity of cattle.

name: Mukhyamantri Atyant Pichhda Varg Medhavriti Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide ₹10,000/- as a one-time scholarship to extremely backward class students passing class 10th in the first division from the Bihar School Examination Board.

name: Scheme to Give Incentive-Prize to Gaushala/ Panjrapole
description: The "Scheme to Give Incentive-Prize to Gaushala/ Panjrapole" focuses on enhancing the management and operation of Gaushalas and Panjrapoles by offering incentive prizes to the top performers.

name: Scheme of Assistance for Management of Stray Cattle
description: This scheme provides financial support to local self-government bodies and registered Panjrapoles to reduce or eradicate the problem of stray cattle by encouraging their maintenance and proper care.

name: Scheme for Management and Purchase of Bulls Provided for Breeding of State Gir/ Kankarej Breed
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to registered Gaushalas for rearing purebred Gir or Kankrej male cow calves with high genetic quality to promote pure breeding in indigenous cattle.

name: Scheme for Rearing Purebreed Gir/ Kankarage Male Cow Calves with Excellent Genetic Quality
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to registered Gaushalas for rearing purebred Gir or Kankrej male cow calves with high genetic quality to promote pure breeding in indigenous cattle.

name: Scheme for Supply of Improved Seeds for Fodder
description: The "Scheme for Supply of Improved Seeds for Fodder" aims to supply improved quality fodder seeds to registered Gaushalas and Panjarapols to ensure round-the-year green fodder availability for livestock.

name: Managerial Assistance Scheme for Appointment of Veterinarian
description: The "Managerial Assistance Scheme for Appointment of Veterinarian" provides financial support to registered Panjrapols for appointing a qualified veterinarian to ensure proper medical care, vaccination, and scientific record-keeping for animals housed in Gaushalas/ Panjrapols.

name: Chief Minister's Micro Finance Initiative
description: The scheme aims to promote access to credit for economic activities undertaken by individual farmers, entrepreneurs, Self-Help Groups (SHGs), and Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs) in the state of Nagaland.

name: To Provide Interest Subvention to Fishermen of the State at the Rate of 4% to the Beneficiaries Kishan Credit Card
description: The scheme aims to provide 4% interest subvention to the fishermen in Gujarat on timely repayment of short-term loans taken through the Kisan Credit Card.

name: To Provide Interest Subvention to Animal Husbandry of the State at the Rate of 4% to the Beneficiaries Kisan Credit Card
description: The scheme aims to provide 4% interest subvention to cattle breeders in Gujarat on timely repayment of short-term loans taken through the Kisan Credit Card for animal husbandry activities.

name: COP-34 Financial Assistance to Farmer for Interest Subvention (Kishan Credit Card Interest Asst.)
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance in the form of interest subvention is provided to farmers who repay their crop loans on time, helping them improve their agricultural productivity and economic well-being.

name: Finance Assistant to PACS for Computerization and Integration of PACS through Core Banking System with District Cooperative Banks
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to Primary Agricultural Credit Societies (PACS) for computerization and integration with District Cooperative Banks (DCCBs) through a Core Banking System (CBS), enhancing rural banking infrastructure and digital access.

name: Bhajan Pakhawaj Workshops
description: The objective of the scheme is to provide knowledge of appropriate and traditional Bhajan Singing and Pakhawaj playing to Bhajan performers through experts from the respective field. Applications are invited by announcement in local print & electronic media. Certificates are awarded to participants.

name: Theatre Workshop
description: The objective of the scheme is to provide scientific knowledge of theatre to upcoming theatre artistes through an expert theatre personality. The workshops are organised on the written request of institutions working in the field of theatre and educational institutions for their students.

name: Tiatr Script Writing Workshop
description: The scheme's objective is to enrich and promote the writing skills of Tiatr playwrights and to have a healthy and constructive discussion on various aspects of Tiatr script writing amongst the Tiatr writers, participating institutions and artistes. Lunch & refreshments are provided to participants.

name: Travel Grants To Goan Authors
description: The objective of the scheme is to enable the Goan writers to come in close contact with the senior writers of a language-region other than their own within India to acquaint them with the writers and the people of that region, and to widen their awareness and sensibility about the country.

name: Scholarship to Undergo Advanced Training in the Field of Art
description: The objective of the scheme is to provide facilities to Goan talented students to undergo advanced training in the field of various disciplines of Art, i.e. Indian Classical Music and Dance, Drama, Western Music, Folk Art, Puppetry, Painting, Sculpture, etc.. Scholarship of ₹3,000/- per month.

name: All Goa Classical Dance Competition
description: The scheme "All Goa Classical Dance Competition" is open for Bharatnatyam and Kathak disciplines. Only solo dance will be considered for the competition. Costumes and accompanists are to be arranged by the participants at their own cost. Open to local students between 12 to 20 years of age.

name: Children's Drawing Painting Competition
description: The "Children's Drawing and Painting Competition", organized by the Art, Culture and Museums Department, Goa, aims to encourage creativity and artistic expression among Goan children and to develop a healthy competitive spirit at a young age.

name: Bhajan Competition
description: The scheme "Bhajan Competition" is a Cultural scheme to preserve and promote the tradition of Bhajan singing.  Competition is organized at the Regional level and the selected group from this competition will participate at the State Level. Entries are invited through local press notes.

name: Tiatr Cantaram Singing Competition
description: The "Tiatr Cantaram Singing Competition", organised by the Kala Academy under the Department of Art, Culture and Museums, Government of Goa, aims to promote singing talent, preserve and revive the tradition of Tiatr songs, and encourage both traditional and new compositions that reflect Goa.

name: One Act Play competition at High School, Higher Secondary School and College level (Konkani, Marathi & English)
description: The "One Act Play Competition" is a Cultural Scheme by the Department of Art, Culture and Museums, Government of Goa, encouraging students' personality development through theatre, with participation open to all Goan schools and colleges, and transport assistance provided as per government norms.

name: Tiatr Competition
description: The "Tiatr Competition" aims to encourage and promote the unique Goan theatre form of Tiatr. Participation in this scheme is open to Goan institutions registered under the Societies Registration Act, 1860 (with renewed registration). Entries are invited through press notes in local dailies.

name: Konkani Drama Competition
description: The "Konkani Drama Competition" is a cultural scheme by Kala Academy under the Dept. of Art and Culture, Govt. of Goa. It is held annually to promote theatre among the institutions. Eligible participants are those registered under the Societies Registration Act, 1860, with renewed registration.

name: Assistance of Concentrate Feed for Pregnant Animals (Scheduled Tribe Category)
description: This scheme provides free BIS type II concentrate feed to pregnant cattle owned by Scheduled Tribe Category livestock owners in Gujarat to ensure their good health, boost immunity, prevent metabolic diseases, and enhance milk production.

name: Assistance of Concentrate Feed for Pregnant Animals (Scheduled Caste Category)
description: This scheme provides free BIS type II concentrate feed to pregnant cattle owned by Scheduled Caste Category livestock owners in Gujarat to ensure their good health, boost immunity, prevent metabolic diseases, and enhance milk production.

name: Assistance of Concentrate Feed for Pregnant Animals (General Category)
description: This scheme provides free BIS type II concentrate feed to pregnant cattle owned by General Category livestock owners in Gujarat to ensure their good health, boost immunity, prevent metabolic diseases, and enhance milk production.

name: Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (Scheduled Tribe Category)
description: The scheme "Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (Scheduled Tribe Category)" provides 150 kg of BIS Type II concentrate feed to Scheduled Tribe Category livestock owners after parturition to support cattle health, increase milk production, and enhance calf development.

name: Samajik Sewa Bhatta Scheme
description: The scheme aims to support traditional faith healers by providing a monthly pension. Under this scheme, ₹1,500 is provided to each eligible traditional healer across the state.

name: Mukhyamantri Asahaya Punarwas Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and rehabilitation support to destitute individuals who are orphaned, abandoned by their parents, or have no one to care for them. Beneficiaries receive one-time financial aid and support for admission to day-care centers or old-age homes.

name: Mukhyamantri Hunar Vikas Yojana- Self-Employment/Business
description: Under this scheme, eligible boys and girls receive financial assistance in two installments - 60% initially and 40% later, to establish self-employment or business ventures. The support is specifically linked to the training course completed by the beneficiary.

name: Mukhyamantri Hunar Vikas Yojana- Higher Education/Technical Education
description: Under this scheme, the State Government provides financial assistance to eligible boys and girls enrolled under the Palanhar Scheme to pursue higher or technical education, based on their qualifications and interest in employment-oriented courses.

name: Mukhyamantri Hunar Vikas Yojana- Professional/Technical Training
description: Under this scheme, vocational/technical training is provided to Palanhar beneficiary boys & girls through recognized training providers such as the Rajasthan Skill & Livelihood Development Corporation, Rajasthan Knowledge Corporation Ltd., it is etc. recognized by the State or Central Govt.

name: Land Ports Authority Of India (LPAI) Internship Scheme
description: The Land Ports Authority of India (LPAI) is pleased to announce its annual internship program for the academic year 2025-26. This program provides a unique opportunity for students and research scholars from BBIN countries (Bhutan, India, Nepal, and Bangladesh) to gain practical experience in LPAI

name: Marathi Drama Competition ‘A' & ‘B' Group
description: The scheme "Marathi Drama Competition 'A' & 'B' Group" is a state-level initiative by the Kala Academy, under the Department of Art and Culture, Government of Goa. It provides a platform to urban and rural theatre groups and offers transport assistance for artistes and stage material as per govt.

name: National Family Benefit Scheme (Punjab)
description: The scheme "National Family Benefit Scheme (Punjab)" by the Department of Social Security and Development of Women and Children, Government of Punjab, provides a lump sum assistance of ₹20,000/- is provided to the bereaved household in the event of the death of their breadwinner.

name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (Punjab)
description: The "Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (IGNDPS)" provides ₹300/- per month to disabled persons (80% or more disability) aged 18 and above. After age 80, the amount increases to ₹500/-. Dwarfs are also eligible.

name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (Punjab)
description: "Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (IGNWPS)" provides a pension of ₹300/- per month to widows aged 40 years and above. After attaining the age of 80 years, the pension amount increases to ₹500/- per month.

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (Punjab)
description: In this scheme, persons aged between 60 and 79 years receive a pension of ₹200/- per month, while those aged 80 years and above receive ₹500/- per month. The scheme applies only to persons belonging to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category.

name: Merit cum Means Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions
description: "Merit cum Means Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions" is a scholarship scheme by the Technical Education Department, Government of Chhattisgarh. The scheme provides ₹600/- per month to eligible students for pursuing education from recognized Polytechnic Institutions in Chhattisgarh.

name: Merit cum Means Scholarship: Engineering University
description: "Merit cum Means Scholarship: Engineering University" is a scholarship scheme by the Technical Education Department, Government of Chhattisgarh. The scheme provides ₹1,000/- per month to eligible students for pursuing education from recognized engineering universities in Chhattisgarh.

name: Merit Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions
description: "Merit Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions" is a scholarship scheme by the Technical Education Department, Government of Chhattisgarh. The scheme provides ₹600/- per month to eligible students for pursuing education from recognized polytechnic institutions in Chhattisgarh.

name: BPL (Below Poverty Line) Student Welfare Scholarship - Technical Education
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance in the form of scholarships to the economically weaker students studying in government engineering and polytechnic colleges of Chhattisgarh.  The scheme offers financial aid to students enrolled in professional courses.

name: Scholarship for C.G. Domicile Students Pursuing Engineering Courses Outside Chhattisgarh State
description: The scheme supports students in their first year and fills vacant awards in subsequent years (II/III/IV). Key benefits include financial aid to cover educational expenses and encouragement for students to pursue quality education. Eligible applicants must be Chhattisgarh domicile.

name: Merit Scholarship: Engineering University
description: The scheme provides ₹1000/- per month to eligible students for pursuing B.E. from a recognized engineering college in Chhattisgarh.  The applicants can either be students who have passed their 10th and 12th standard examinations, or Diploma holders newly admitted to the second year of B.E.

name: Scholarship for Chhattisgarh Students Studying Outside the State
description: The scheme aims to support native Chhattisgarh students pursuing engineering degrees outside the state by providing a monthly scholarship of ₹2,000/-. This initiative benefits meritorious students enrolled in recognised engineering colleges outside Chhattisgarh.

name: Nawabihan Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide support and assistance, including legal aid and shelter, to women who are victims of domestic violence, as mandated by the Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act 2005. This scheme ensures that affected women receive the necessary resources for their well-being.

name: Mahtari Vandan Yojana
description: The scheme aims to eliminate discrimination and inequality against women, improve their health and nutrition, promote economic independence and empowerment, and strengthen their decision-making role in the family.  It offers financial assistance to eligible married women to support their well-being.

name: Noni Suraksha Yojana
description: The scheme aims to improve the educational and health status of girls, lay the foundation for their bright future, prevent female feticide, promote a positive attitude towards the birth of girls, and prevent child marriage.  It provides financial benefit to girls who remain unmarried until 18 years.

name: Krishak Bandhu Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide financial security to farmers through direct income support and death/disability benefits. It benefits small and marginal farmers with annual assistance of ₹5,000/- per acre and a one-time payout of ₹2,00,000/- in case of death.

name: Marriage Assistance Scheme (MPBOCWWB)
description: The scheme provides financial assistance for the marriage of a registered female worker herself (including one-time remarriage) and for up to two daughters of a registered worker. The scheme applies to the marriage of the female beneficiary herself and the legal, adopted, or stepdaughter of worker.

name: Aapki Beti Yojana
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹2,100/- per year is provided to girls studying in Class 1 to 8 in government schools, belonging to families living below the poverty line (BPL) and whose both or one parent has passed away. Girls studying in Class 9 to 12 receive ₹2,500/- per year.

name: Free Scooty Distribution for Girls (GEN-CATEGAORY-EWS)
description: Under this scheme, meritorious girl students from government and private schools who have scored 85% or above in the Class 10th and 12th (Arts, Commerce, Science streams) examinations are provided with a free scooty, along with a helmet and petrol.

name: Kasturba Gandhi Special Term Deposit Receipt Scheme
description: Under this scheme, girls who pass Class 8 from Kasturba Gandhi Schools, secure at least 50% marks in Class 10, & enroll in Class 11 receive an STDR of ₹2,000/- (5-year term). Those who score 50% in Class 12 and enroll in graduation receive an STDR of ₹4,000/- (3-year term).

name: Bicycle Distribution Scheme for Girl Students of Economically Weaker Section
description: Under this scheme, free bicycles will be distributed to 5,800 girl students belonging to the Economically Weaker Section (EWS), who are studying in government schools from Class 6 to Class 8, to facilitate their commute between home and school.

name: Free Bicycle Distribution to Students of Vimukt, Ghumantu and Ardhghumantu Communities
description: The scheme aims to provide free cycles to students studying in classes 6th to 11th in government and recognized private educational institutions and belonging to Denotified Tribes, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic Tribes communities of Rajasthan.

name: Mukhyamantri Shiksha Alankar Yojana for Students of Economically Weaker Section
description: Under the scheme, a cash award of ₹50,000 will be given to students studying in government schools affiliated with the Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education, Ajmer, who secure the highest marks in the EWS category in the Class 10th and Class 12th examinations (Arts, Commerce, and Science streams).

name: Employees' Pension Scheme
description: The scheme ensures retirement security for employees covered under the EPF Act, offering monthly pensions, family pensions, and withdrawal benefits. It targets workers in organised sectors, providing financial support post-retirement, during disability, or to dependents after the member’s death.

name: The Goa State Photo Contest And Exhibition Scheme
description: The scheme aims to encourage local youths in photography and photojournalism, providing cash prizes and exhibition opportunities. The scheme offers cash prizes of ₹20,000/-, ₹16,000/-, and ₹12,000/- in each category. Entries from applicants born and residing in Goa are preferred.

name: The Goa State Journalist Awards Scheme
description: "The Goa State Journalist Awards Scheme" aims to encourage journalists to publish commendable news items, articles, or reports, fostering mass awareness. It provides awards, including a cash prize of ₹10,000/-, to eligible journalists in Goa.

name: Digital India Internship Scheme
description: An opportunity for a student to secure practical work experience under the guidance of a qualified and experienced Supervisor/Mentor in Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) in the form of Digital India Internship Scheme.

name: Valmiki Chhatravritti Yojana
description: The "Valmiki Chhatravritti Yojana" by the Department of Higher and Technical Education, Government of Jharkhand, aims to provide financial assistance and encouragement to orphaned and differently-abled students to pursue higher education and benefits include full tuition fee reimbursement.

name: Sishu Saathi
description: “Sishu Saathi”, a scheme of the Health and Family Welfare Department, Government of West Bengal as part of the Rastriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK) under National Health Mission is meant to treat Indian children of 0-18 years age group with zero out of pocket expenditure.

name: Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (General Category)
description: The scheme "Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (General Category)" provides 150 kg of BIS Type II concentrate feed to General Category livestock owners after parturition to support cattle health, increase milk production, and enhance calf development.

name: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter scheme
description: The "Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, is designed to help farmers reduce fodder wastage and improve their dairy farming efficiency.

name: Supply of Fodder Minikit
description: The "Supply of Fodder Minikit" scheme introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to provide improved varieties of fodder seeds to farmers.

name: Assistance for Cattleshed, Gaman, Water Tank and Bucket
description: The scheme "Assistance for Cattleshed, Gaman, Water Tank and Bucket" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat, aims to support livestock farmers by offering financial assistance for essential infrastructure such as cattle sheds, gaman, water tanks, and buckets.

name: Incentive to Owners of A.I. Born Female Calf through Pure Breeding in Indigenous Cow Across the State
description: The scheme aims to support livestock owners in maintaining and increasing the population of indigenous cattle breeds like Gir and Kankrej.

name: Compensation in Animal Death
description: The "Compensation in Animal Death" scheme introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, provides financial assistance to animal breeders who suffer livestock losses due to natural disasters, diseases, or poisoning.

name: Establishment of Poultry Valley (Poultry Farming)
description: Under this scheme, poultry farmers are supported in rearing 750 chicks annually in three phases. Each year, 500 one-day-old chicks will be provided to farmers by the Animal Husbandry Department from the State Sector Budget through MPACS, while the remaining 250 chicks will be arranged by the farmer.

name: Mahila Bakri Palan
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of up to ₹35,000/- is provided by the State Government to eligible beneficiaries (Abandoned, widowed, destitute, single, and disaster-affected women) for the purchase of one unit of goats (comprising 3 females and 1 male), aged between 12 to 18 months.

name: Gau Palan Yojana
description: The scheme aims to promote cow rearing by providing financial support for the purchase of a milch cow. Through this scheme, a subsidy of ₹36,000 is given to SECC beneficiaries from SC/ST communities.

name: Bakri Palan Yojana
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided by the State Government to eligible beneficiaries for purchasing goats to establish a goat-rearing unit comprising 10 female goats and 1 male goat, for a duration of 10 to 14 months.

name: Bhed Palan Yojana
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among marginalized communities through sustainable sheep rearing practices. Through this scheme, a sheep-rearing unit consisting of 10 female sheep and 1 male sheep (aged between 10 to 14 months) is provided to eligible beneficiaries.

name: Rajya Pratibha Khoj Pariksha Chhatravriti Yojana
description: Under this scheme, students are provided with scholarships or a one-time incentive for pursuing education up to the postgraduate level, after being selected through the State Talent Search Examination organized by the Board of Secondary Education Rajasthan, Ajmer.

name: Indira Priyadarshini Award
description: The scheme aims to promote academic excellence among girl students by providing one-time financial rewards to those securing the first position in Class 8th, 10th, and 12th examinations, along with vocational & Swami Vivekanand Government Model Schools achievers at the district and state levels.

name: Scheme for Additional Interest Subsidy over and above RIPS 2024 and Reimbursement of Annual Credit Guarantee Fee
description: As per the MSME Policy 2024, it supports the establishment of new MSMEs and the expansion, diversification, or modernization of existing ones by offering interest subsidies and reimbursement of guarantee fees to ease access to finance and reduce the cost of credit.

name: Assistance Towards Expenses Incurred for Raising of Funds through NSE’s/ BSE’s SME Exchange Platform
description: Under this scheme, the Govt. of Rajasthan will provide one-time support up to a maximum of ₹15,00,000/- towards expenses incurred for raising of funds through NSE’s/ BSE’s SME exchange platform after successful raising of equity.

name: Subsidy for School Uniforms to the Students
description: The scheme aims to provide cash subsidies for school uniforms to students from Nursery to Class XII in government and aided schools. Benefits include annual payments ranging from ₹1,100/- to ₹1,500/-, ensuring financial support for all eligible students.

name: Free Supply of Text Books
