description: The scheme provides textbooks or cash subsidies for textbooks and writing materials to students of Government and Aided Schools. Benefits include financial assistance ranging from ₹550/- to ₹830/- per annum, with additional support for geometry boxes. All students from Nursery to 12th are eligible.

name: BSR Scheme
description: The Research Fellowship in Sciences for meritorious students BSR scheme of the UGC is open to candidates who are selected for registering for the Ph.D. program of the university through a procedure outlined already in the UGC notification by a regular admission procedure.

name: Patrakar Kritadnyata Nidhi Scheme (Journalist Benevolent Fund)
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to journalists in Goa for emergencies like medical treatment, marriage, and education. Benefits include aid up to ₹2,00,000/and scholarships for dependents. Eligible journalists must be registered and working in Goa for at least three years.

name: Goa State Working Journalists Welfare Scheme
description: "Goa State Working Journalists Welfare Scheme" aims to improve the welfare of working journalists retired from service in Goa and their families. It provides a monthly welfare fund of ₹ 7,500/- and family pension benefits for eligible journalists and their dependents.

name: Subsidy to Purchase E-Bike for Journalists
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to journalists in Goa for purchasing e-bikes at a subsidised rate. The benefits include making it more convenient for journalists to gather and disseminate news, with the intended beneficiaries being eligible Goa-based journalists.

name: National Awards to Teachers
description: "National Awards to Teachers" aims to celebrate the contributions of outstanding teachers and enhance the quality of school education. This award provides public recognition and honours the commitment of teachers, benefiting meritorious teachers working in primary, middle, and secondary schools.

name: Scholarship/Merit scholarship to OBC/MIN/SC/ST students from Class I to XII
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from SC/ST/OBC/Minority communities studying in classes I to XII in government or recognised schools in Delhi. The scheme offers varying scholarship amounts based on class and academic performance, ensuring support for education.

name: Scholarship/Merit Scholarship Schools SC/ST/OBC/Min (Studying in College/Technical/ Professional Institutions)
description: The scheme provides monthly financial aid to SC/ST/OBC/Minority students pursuing higher education. Benefits include scholarships for hostellers and day scholars, with eligibility based on academic performance and income criteria.

name: Self-Employment Scheme: Transport/ Logistics/ Travels/ Food Court Wyaaj Sahaay
description: "Transport/ Logistics/ Travels/ Food Court Wyaaj Sahaay" is a component under the "Self-Employment Scheme" that provides 5% interest subsidy on a bank loan of ₹6,00,000/- for purchasing vehicles and setting up the required infrastructure.

name: Technology Acquisition Assistance
description: The scheme aims to support Micro and Small enterprises in state to acquire advanced technology/ software related to their production/ manufacturing processes through assistance towards cost incurred for technology/ software acquisition.

name: Eklavya Prashikshan Yojana
description: The "Eklavya Prashikshan Yojana" by the Directorate of Higher Education, Government of Jharkhand, aims to provide free coaching and financial aid for competitive exam preparation. Eligible students receive free coaching and ₹2,500/- monthly assistance during the coaching period.

name: Scheme for Assistance to MSMEs for Market Development
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to MSMEs participating in national and international fairs/exhibitions/buyer-seller meets, etc., under the Rajasthan MSME Policy 2024.

name: Dr. Ambedkar Foundation Essay Competition Scheme for Class 10th-12th & Colleges/Universities/Institutions Students in 22 Indian Languages and English
description: The scheme aims to encourage school, college & university students of 10th and 12th standards to write on the contribution of Babasaheb, particularly on his thoughts on social justice, empowerment of the depressed section, removal of caste-based discriminations, national integration, etc.

name: Establishment of 12 Milch Animal Farm
description: The "Establishment of 12 Milch Animal Farm" scheme introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, supports livestock owners in establishing dairy farms with up to 12 milch animals.

name: Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm
description: The "Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm" scheme introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, provides financial assistance in the form of an interest subsidy to livestock farmers to take up animal husbandry as a sustainable business.

name: Establishment of 50 Milch Animals Dairy Unit
description: The "Establishment of 50 Milch Animals Dairy Unit" scheme introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to provide financial aid to livestock owners for setting up dairy farms, ensuring sustainable dairy production.

name: Intensive Castration Scheme
description: The "Intensive Castration Scheme" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to control the stray animal population by castrating male calves and helps in reducing accidents caused by stray male animals in rural and urban areas.

name: Subsidy Scheme on Establishment of 25 R.I.R. Bird’s unit 40 R.I.R. Bird’s Unit and Stipend for Poultry Farming Training
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance and training to economically weaker sections and Divyang individuals in Gujarat for poultry farming.

name: Subsidy Scheme on Establishment of 25 R.I.R./Kadaknath & 1000 Broiler Bird’s Unit and Stipend for Poultry Farming Training for Scheduled Tribes People of the State
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance and training stipends to Scheduled Tribe (ST) individuals in Gujarat for poultry farming.

name: Providing Navigational Aids and Other Infrastructure Facilities
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to support fishermen by providing financial assistance for purchasing essential fishing equipment, life-saving gear, and infrastructure to enhance safety, efficiency, and fish preservation.

name: Development of Brackish Water Aquaculture
description: The scheme "Development of Brackish Water Aquaculture" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to support the development of brackish water aquaculture through financial assistance for infrastructure, equipment, and modern shrimp farming techniques.

name: Diesel VAT Relief Scheme for Fishermen
description: The "Diesel VAT Relief Scheme for Fishermen" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to provide financial assistance by subsidizing the VAT levied on high-speed diesel used in fishing boats.

name: Assistance to OBM Boat Owner Fishermen on Purchase of Kerosene
description: The "Assistance to OBM Boat Owner Fishermen on Purchase of Kerosene" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to offer monetary aid to fishermen who use kerosene or petrol for their small boats operated by OBM.

name: Fishermen Accident Relief Scheme
description: The "Fishermen Accident Relief Scheme" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to support the families of Gujarat's active fishermen by offering monetary compensation in case of accidental fatalities.

name: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Equipment in Non-Tribal Areas
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to enhance fish seed production and promote inland fisheries in non-tribal areas.

name: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Equipment in Tribal Areas
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to enhance fish production and provide employment opportunities to Scheduled Tribes (ST) individuals engaged in inland fisheries.

name: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to enhance fish production and provide employment opportunities to Scheduled Caste (SC) individuals engaged in inland fisheries.

name: Coconut Development Scheme
description: The "Coconut Development Scheme" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to support farmers by providing quality coconut saplings and financial assistance for coconut cultivation.

name: Devnarayan Pratibhawan Chhatra Protsahan Yojana
description: The scheme aims to encourage academic excellence among students belonging to Special Backward Classes (SBC). It provides an annual financial incentive of ₹3,500/- to students pursuing education from Class 10th to postgraduate level in government schools or colleges.

name: Assistance for Digitization of Business Processes and Adoption of eCommerce
description: The scheme offers MSMEs up to 75% reimbursement (max ₹50,000) for software/equipment costs for digitization, plus 75% of e-commerce platform fees (excl. shipping), also up to ₹50,000. Reimbursement is allowed for one e-commerce platform per MSME only.

name: Assistance for Quality Enhancement
description: The scheme aims to support micro and small enterprises in obtaining quality and system certifications or IPRs. It offers up to 50% reimbursement of certification costs with a ceiling of ₹3,00,000.

name: Leather Training Scheme - Rajasthan
description: The scheme aims to promote leather industry, improve production & quality of leather products, develop new designs, & generate self-employment. Under this scheme, training is provided in latest techniques for leather dyeing, Nagara Jooti, leather goods, etc. through District Industry Centers.

name: Financial assistance to Meritorious Scheduled Tribe Students who have Passed First Division from Board and University
description: The objective of the scheme is to motivate meritorious Scheduled Tribe students of Rajasthan by providing one-time financial assistance of ₹3,500/- to those pursuing regular college courses and achieving first division.

name: Distance Education Scheme for Girls
description: The scheme aims to support girls' higher education through distance learning by reimbursing their course fees for UG, PG, Diploma, Certificate, and PG Diploma undertaken by girls through distance education in Rajasthan.

name: Urdu Scholarship- Rajasthan
description: The scheme aims to promote the Urdu language among female students at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Under this scheme, a monthly scholarship is provided to undergraduate and postgraduate students who are studying Urdu as an optional subject.

name: Grant on Passing the Written Examination of Competitive Examinations for Recruitment in Armed Forces
description: Under this scheme, a grant of ₹15,000/- is provided from the Amalgamated Fund to the children of ex-servicemen who pass the written examination of CDS, NDA, IMA, OTA, Air Force, or Naval Academy, for the purpose of coaching.

name: Scholarship for Children of Ex-Servicemen for Vocational and Technical Education
description: Under this scheme, a scholarship of ₹15,000 per year is provided to the children of ex-servicemen, from the rank of Sepoy to Havildar, who are pursuing vocational & technical education & have not received scholarship assistance under the Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme or from any other source.

name: World War II Pension
description: The aim of the scheme is to provide lifelong financial assistance of ₹15,000/- per month as a measure of relief to World War II ex-servicemen and their widows who are not receiving any pension or financial assistance from any other source.

name: Samman Bhatta to War Widows and Parents of Martyrs
description: The scheme aims to provide lifelong financial assistance of ₹5,000/- per month to war widows and parents of unmarried martyrs who sacrificed their lives in various wars, counter-insurgency operations, and aid to civil authorities before 31st March 1999.

name: Financial Assistance for the Treatment of Blind, Disabled, Deaf, Dumb, or Mentally Challenged Ex-Servicemen and their Dependents (Wife and Children)
description: The scheme aims to provide monthly financial assistance for the treatment of ex-servicemen and their dependents (wife & children) who have a disability of 40% or more and are suffering from serious illnesses such as cancer, leprosy, tuberculosis, kidney and cardiac ailments, paralysis, etc.

name: Assistance for Daughter's Marriage
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹25,000/- per girl is provided for a maximum of two marriageable daughters of widows of ex-servicemen up to the rank of Havaldar, who are not receiving a Marriage Grant from the Kendriya Sainik Board.

name: Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana
description: The KVPY is a national fellowship program in basic sciences, initiated and funded by the Department of Science and Technology to attract exceptionally motivated students to pursue basic science courses and a research career in science.

name: West Bengal Incentive Scheme for Approved Industrial Park (SAIP) for MSMEs: Incentive for Common Effluent Treatment Plant (CETP)
description: The “Incentive for Common Effluent Treatment Plant (CETP)” under the “SAIP for MSMEs” scheme, aims to provide reimbursement for installation of CETP, wherever applicable, based on land area of AIP.

name: West Bengal Incentive Scheme for Approved Industrial Park (SAIP) for MSMEs: Reimbursement of Stamp Duty
description: “Reimbursement of Stamp Duty” under the “SAIP for MSMEs” scheme, aims to provide reimbursement of stamp duty paid by the SPV for registration of land documents.

name: West Bengal Incentive Scheme for Approved Industrial Park (SAIP) for MSMEs: Construction of Approach Road
description: The “Construction of Approach Road” under the “SAIP for MSMEs” scheme, facilitates the Private Industrial Park in provision with Approach Road catering to the AIP.

name: West Bengal Incentive Scheme for Approved Industrial Park (SAIP) for MSMEs: Incentive for Setting up a Power Sub Station
description: The “Incentive for Setting up a Power Sub Station” under the “SAIP for MSMEs” scheme, facilitates the Private Industrial Park in the provision of quality power.

name: West Bengal Incentive Scheme for Approved Industrial Park (SAIP) for MSMEs: Incentive for Basic and Essential Common Infrastructure Facilities
description: The “Incentive for Basic and Essential Common Infrastructure Facilities” under the “SAIP for MSMEs” scheme, aims to provide one time back-ended incentive for development of Basic and Essential Common Infrastructure Facilities based on land area.

name: Old Age Pension To Handloom Weavers Under Coop. Fold
description: The “Old Age Pension To Handloom Weavers” scheme implemented by the MSME and Textiles Dept., aims to provide monthly financial assistance in the form of pension to a weaver member of a handloom cooperative society.

name: The West Bengal Incentive Scheme: Tourism Promotion Assistance in lieu of Interest Subsidy
description: “Tourism Promotion Assistance in lieu of Interest Subsidy” incentive under the “The West Bengal Incentive Scheme” aims to provide Tourism Promotion Assistance for SGST irrespective of the location of the project, which will be in lieu of interest subsidy.

name: The West Bengal Incentive Scheme: Capacity Utilisation
description: “Capacity Utilisation” incentives under the “The West Bengal Incentive Scheme” implemented by the Dept. of Tourism, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide additional Floor Area Ratio (FAR) over and above the maximum permissible FAR as may be fixed by the competent authority.

name: Jan-Nayak Karpoori Thakur Kalyan Hostel Scheme
description: The "Jan-Nayak Karpoori Thakur Kalyan Hostel Scheme" by the BC & EBC Welfare Department, Bihar provides hostel facilities for students near Saharsa District with food grains (9 kg rice, 6 kg wheat) and ₹1000/- per month as a grant.

name: Internship Programme At Serious Fraud Investigation Office
description: The Internship Programme at SFIO was started in 2017 to provide a platform for the interaction of talented and young scholars and researchers from reputed academic institutions who are pursuing Post-Graduation/Research Programs in Economics/ Commerce/Law/ Management and Computer Forensics, etc.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC students (Delhi)
description: The scheme "Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students" aims to support SC students financially for post-matriculation studies. Benefits include fee reimbursement and monthly allowances. Intended beneficiaries are SC students with a family income below ₹2,50,000/- annually.

name: Financial Assistance to SC Students for Pursuing Higher Studies Abroad
description: The scheme aims to support SC students for higher education abroad in fields like Engineering, Sciences, and Humanities. Benefits include up to ₹20,00,000/- for Ph.D. and ₹10,00,000 for Masters, with eligibility criteria including residency and income below ₹8,00,000/-.

name: Reimbursement of Tution Fee for SC/ST/OBC/Min students in Public Schools in Class I to XII
description: The scheme aims to provide financial support by reimbursing tuition and compulsory fees for SC/ST/OBC students from low-income families (below ₹3,00,000/- per annum) studying in recognized schools in Delhi. Beneficiaries must meet academic and attendance criteria.

name: Incentive for Inter-Caste Marriage Scheme
description: "Incentive For Inter Caste Marriage" aims to promote inter-caste marriages between SC and non-SC communities to combat casteism. The scheme provides a financial incentive of ₹50,000/- to eligible couples, with either spouse being a permanent resident of NCT of Delhi.

name: BC & EBC Girls Residential +2 High School
description: The scheme aims to provide quality education and holistic development opportunities for girls from backward and extremely backward classes. Free education, accommodation, study material, medical support, and skill development programs are provided.

name: Chief Minister BC & EBC Chhatravas Anudan Yojana
description: The "Chief Minister BC & EBC Chhatravas Anudan Yojana", implemented by the Backward Classes and Extremely Backward Classes Welfare Department, provides financial assistance to students from Backward Classes (BC) and Extremely Backward Classes (EBC) residing in government hostels.

name: Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme-1
description: In this scheme, ₹ 25,000/- and an 8-gram gold coin is given to brides who have studied Class 10th. This scheme is only applicable for the marriage conducted from 17th May 2011 onwards. The objective of the scheme is to help financially poor parents in getting their daughters mar

name: Maternity Benefit Scheme (APB&OCWWB)
description: The Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh has proposed and implemented the scheme “Maternity Benefit Scheme” for Registered Workers of Arunachal Pradesh Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (APB&OCWWB).

name: Chhattisgarh Mukhyamantri Kanya Vivah Yojana
description: In view of the difficulty faced by poor families regarding the marriage of the girl child, the Mukhyamantri Kanya Vivah Yojana has been implemented.

name: Scholarships For Higher Education Abroad To Meritorious Boys And Girls From Open Category
description: The scheme “Scholarships for Higher Education Abroad to Meritorious Boys and Girls from open category” was launched by the Department of Higher and Technical Education, Government of Maharashtra on 4th October 2018.

name: Home for Mentally Challenged Children
description: The scheme "Home for Mentally Challenged Children" by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry, aims to provide care for children facing mental challenges, i.e. low Intelligence Quotient (IQ). The scheme offers free boarding and lodging, uniform sets, daily living needs, etc.

name: Shagun Yojana
description: The "Shagun Yojana" aims to assist BPL families with financial aid for the marriage of their daughters. A grant of ₹31,000 is provided to the girl/women.

name: Bidya Lakshmi Loan
description: "Bidya Lakshmi" aims to provide education loans for higher studies to children of Assam State Government employees. Benefits include loans up to ₹10,00,000/- at 4% interest, with subsidies for eligible candidates.

name: Chief Minister EBC Civil Seva Protsahan Yojana
description: The Bihar Government provides incentives to individuals belonging to the EBC Categories upon passing the preliminary examination of various competitive exams such as UPSC, BPSC, NDA, CDS, Banking, Railway, SSC, etc., to support their further preparation for the main examination/interview.

name: Vishesh Yogyajan Chhatravriti Yojana
description: Under this scheme, scholarships and tuition fee reimbursement are provided to specially-abled students belonging to families with an annual income not exceeding ₹2.00 lakh, who are regularly studying in government and recognized educational institutions.

name: Use of Advanced Drone Technology (Agriculture Aircraft) in Agriculture Sector
description: The scheme "Use of Advanced Drone Technology (Agriculture Aircraft) in Agriculture Sector" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat, aims to promote the use of advanced drone technology for spraying crop protection chemicals and bio-fertilizers, etc.

name: Millet Development Scheme
description: The "Millet Development Scheme" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat, aims to promote millet cultivation in Gujarat by organizing promotional activities, expos, processing units, demonstrations(seed/input kit ), and taluka-level melas.

name: Farmers Accidental Insurance Scheme
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to the families of registered farmers in the event of accidental death or disability.

name: Farm Storage Structure Scheme
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to help farmers to protect their harvested crops from damage due to natural calamities and store them safely for better financial returns by selling at optimal prices.

name: Scheme of Providing Assistance to Encourage Farmers for Adoption of Organic Farming
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to promote organic farming by providing financial assistance to farmers for certification, input subsidies, and residue testing.

name: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to Farmers for Purchasing Sanedo Agricultural Equipment
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing Sanedo (Mini Tractor) equipment, which enhances efficiency and reduces labor dependency in farming operations.

name: Scheme for Assistance on Purchase of Smartphone by the Farmers
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing smartphones, enabling them to access agricultural technology, weather updates, pest control techniques, and government assistance.

name: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to Purchase Solar Power Unit/Kit for Solar Fencing around the Farm
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing solar power units/kits for solar fencing around their farms to protect crops from damage caused by wild and stray animals.

name: Incentive Assistance to Scheduled Caste Farmers to Increase the Area, Production and Productivity of Sugarcane Farming
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to SC farmers to increase sugarcane production and productivity through quality seeds, modern farming practices, and agricultural mechanization.

name: Incentive Assistance to Scheduled Tribe Farmers to Increase the Area, Production and Productivity of Sugarcane Farming
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to ST farmers to increase sugarcane production and productivity through quality seeds, modern farming practices, and agricultural mechanization.

name: To Assist the Farmers for Construction of Community Base Water Tank/Storage Structure for Efficient Use of Water Through Drip Irrigation
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for constructing community-based water tanks/storage structures to ensure efficient water use through drip irrigation.

name: Promoting to Farmer for Post Harvesting & Management (Value Addition)
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to support farmers in setting up crop value addition units using post-harvesting technology and management concepts.

name: Kisan Parivahan Yojana
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing medium-sized goods vehicles to facilitate the transportation of agricultural produce.

name: AGR-61 Agro Service Providers for the Purpose of Making Farming More Profitable With the Help of Farm Mechanization
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to support farmers in Gujarat by facilitating access to farm implements and mechanization.

name: Assistance to Farmers to Purchase Heavy Farm Equipment (Tractor)
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing tractors, promoting farm mechanization and increasing farm power availability.

name: Marriage Assistance to Person with Disability / BPL
description: The scheme aims to support differently-abled brides/bridegrooms from BPL families by providing financial assistance to meet marriage-related expenses. Under this scheme, an amount of ₹30,000/- is provided to Scheduled Tribe, differently-abled brides/bridegrooms for their first marriage.

name: National Livestock Mission: Establishment of Entrepreneurship for Breed Development of Rural Poultry
description: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship in rural poultry farming. Through this scheme, a 50% capital subsidy is provided for establishing Parent Farms, Rural Hatcheries, and Brooder cum Mother Units.

name: National Livestock Mission: Genetic Improvement of Pig breeds - Establishment of Pig Semen Collection and Processing Lab
description: The Scheme aims to enhance per-animal productivity, reduce inbreeding, and minimize sexually transmitted diseases in pigs. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided for establishing semen processing labs at government pig farms.

name: National Livestock Mission: Genetic Improvement of Pig Breeds - Import of Exotic Pig Germplasm
description: The scheme aims to enhance indigenous pig productivity through genetic upgradation. The scheme supports the establishment of pig semen collection and processing labs and the import of exotic pig germplasm.

name: National Livestock Mission: Establishment of State Semen Bank
description: "Establishment of State Semen Bank (Genetic Improvement of Sheep and Goat breeds)" aims at the genetic improvement of sheep/goat breeds through selective breeding by propagation of superior male germplasm through artificial insemination.

name: National Livestock Mission: Promotion of Piggery Entrepreneur
description: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship in pig farming by providing a one-time capital subsidy of up to ₹30 lakh to eligible entrepreneurs and organizations to establish breeder farms.

name: Ashadeepa Scheme
description: The scheme was introduced by the Government of Karnataka in the 2017-18 budget to encourage private sector industries and companies to provide employment opportunities to persons belonging to the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe categories, ensuring social justice.

name: Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme for the Children of Parents/Guardians Engaged in Unclean and Hazardous Occupations - Goa
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to children whose parents belong to Other Disadvantaged Categories, supporting their education at pre-matric level. This initiative seeks to enhance student participation & reduce dropout rates, particularly during the transition from primary to upper

name: Scheme of Internship of Students to DRDO Labs/Estts for Project Training
description: The scheme aims to provide an opportunity and exposure to future graduates and postgraduates in Engineering and General Sciences to the research and development activities carried out by DRDO in state-of-the-art technology in fields relevant to the defense sector.

name: Financial Assistance For Marriage (APB&OCWWB)
description: The scheme “Financial Assistance for Marriage” was started by the Department of Labour and Employment, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh for the registered workers of Arunachal Pradesh Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (APB&OCWWB).

name: Ladli Social Security Allowance Scheme
description: Launched on 1st January 2006, the “Ladli Social Security Allowance Scheme” is a flagship social-security scheme by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of Haryana. The family receives ₹2,750/- per month for 15 years after either of the two parents completes 45 years of age.

name: Aapki Beti Hamari Beti
description: The scheme “Aapki Beti Hamari Beti” was launched by the Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Haryana on 24th August 2015.

name: Incentive To Girls
description: Rajasthan State started a scheme "Incentive for Girls" for state students.

name: Financial Assistance On Marriage Of Children (HBOCWWB)
description: The scheme “Financial Assistance on Marriage of Children (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

name: Maternity Benefit Scheme (HBOCWWB)
description: The scheme “Maternity Benefit Scheme (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

name: Paternity Benefit Scheme (HBOCWWB)
description: The scheme “Paternity Benefit Scheme (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

name: Marriage Assistance
description: The Government of Tamil Nadu introduced "Marriage Assistance"  for the employees or their Son/Daughter who legally attain the age of marriage.

name: Marriage Assistance For Legally Married Transgender Couples
description: The scheme “Marriage Assistance for Legally Married Transgender Couples” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala. This scheme is intended to help deprived transgender individuals who are planning to get married legally to lead a steady normal family life.

name: Financial Aid For Providing Hostel Facility To Transgender Students
description: The scheme “Financial Aid for Providing Hostel Facility to Transgender Students” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

name: Saphalam Scheme For Transgender Students Pursuing Professional Courses
description: The scheme “Saphalam Scheme for Transgender Students Pursuing Professional Courses” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

name: Scholarship For Transgender Students
description: The scheme “Scholarship for Transgender Students” was launched by the Social Justice Department, Government of Kerala for providing scholarships to Transgender students from 7th standard onwards studying in State Government/ Government aided/ Self Financing schools.

name: Marriage Assistance To Daughters Of Differently Abled Parents (Parinayam-I)
description: The scheme “Marriage Assistance to Daughters of Differently Abled Parents (Parinayam-I)” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

name: Theka Shramik, Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Evan Hamaal Shramik Ke Bachcho Hetu Chhaatravrtti Yojana
description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Theka Shramik, Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Evan Hamaal Shramik Ke Bachcho Hetu Chhaatravrtti Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

name: Mahila Kamgar Kaushal Unnayan Evan Theka Shramik, Hamaal Tatha Ghareloo Mahila Kamgaar Parivar Sashaktikaran Yojana
description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Mahila Kamgar Kaushal Unnayan Evan Theka Shramik, Hamaal Tatha Ghareloo Mahila Kamgaar Parivar Sashaktikaran Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

name: Theka Shramik, Hamaal Shramik Evan Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Gambhir Bimaari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana
description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Theka Shramik, Hamaal Shramik Evan Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Gambhir Bimaari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 05 June 2018.

name: Hamaal Hetu Joota, Huk Evan Mahila Hamaal Hetu Soopa Aur Tokari Sahaayata Yojana
description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Hamaal Hetu Joota, Huk Evan Mahila Hamaal Hetu Soopa Aur Tokari Sahaayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

name: Assistance For Delivery / Miscarriage Of Pregnancy / Termination Of Pregnancy To Female Differently Abled Person
description: The Government of Tamil Nadu introduced "Assistance for Delivery/Miscarriage of Pregnancy/Termination of Pregnancy to Female Differently Abled Person.

name: Widow B.Ed Scheme-Rajasthan
description: In 2015-16, Rajasthan State started the "Widow B.Ed Scheme" for Widow/abandoned women.

name: Chief Minister Ladli Behna Yojana
description: In 2023, Madhya Pradesh State Government started "Chief Minister Ladli Behna Yojana" for women empowerment

name: Ladli Laxmi Yojana
description: Ladli Lakshmi Yojana has been started in Madhya Pradesh for Girl Child in 2007.

name: Economic Help To Sahariya Tribal Girl Students (Class 11 And 12)
description: Rajasthan Government started a scholarship for Sahariya tribal girls' higher education (Class 11 and 12).

name: Economic Help To Tribal Girls For Higher Education (College Level)
description: Rajasthan Government started a scholarship for tribal girls higher education (College Level) In the year 1994-95.

name: Economic Help To Tribal Girls For Higher Education (Class 11 & 12)
description: Rajasthan Government started a scholarship for tribal girls higher education (Class 11 & 12) In the year 2011.

name: National Awards For Empowerment Of Persons With Disabilities: National Awards For Institutions Engaged In Empowering Persons With Disabilities: Divyangjanon Ke Sashaktikaran Men Karyrat Sarveshrestha Sansthan (Private Organization, NGO)
description: The "Divangjano ke Shashaktikaran Mein Karyrat Sarveshrestha Sansthan" award is given by DoEPwD to an organization working for the empowerment of Persons with Disabilities for a minimum period of 10 years after registration under Society Act/ Trust Act / Section 8 of Companies Act 2013.

name: Marriage Incentive Reward Scheme
description: The Marriage Incentive Reward scheme for the marriage of disabled persons by the Government of Uttar Pradesh is being operated by the department since the year 1997.

name: Incentive To Owners Of Artificial Insemination Born Female Calf Through Pure Breeding In Indigenous Cow
description: The scheme “Incentive to Owners of Artificial Insemination Born Female Calf through Pure Breeding in Indigenous Cow” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

name: Agricultural Skill Development Training Programme For Women Farmers And Farmers
description: The scheme “Agricultural Skill Development Training Programme for Women Farmers and Farmers” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

name: Marriage Grant Scheme
description: In Uttar Pradesh State, a scheme for the marriage of girls from economically weaker families of the state.

name: Mentally Retarded Children Benefit Scheme (P.B.O.C.W.W.B)
description: The "Mentally Retarded Children Benefit Scheme'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Department of Labour, Punjab, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for the care of mentally retarded children (son/daughter) of construction workers.

name: Maternity Benefit/Delivery Assistance (K.B.O.C.W.W.B)
description: The "Maternity Benefit/Delivery Assistance'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Department of Labour, Karnataka, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to registered women construction workers for the birth of upto two (2) children.

name: Kanya Sumangala Yojana
description: Various schemes are run by the government for the purpose of providing social security to women, Kanya Sumangala Yojana is one such scheme.

name: National Award For Senior Citizens (vayoshreshtha Samman): Iconic Mother
description: The award is conferred to the eminent and outstanding senior citizens and institutions/organizations involved in rendering distinguished service for the cause of elderly persons, especially indigent senior citizens. The awards are conferred on 1st October every year by the Hon’ble President of India

name: Subsidy Scheme For Establishment Of Goat Unit (10+1) For Scheduled Tribe Women
description: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme for Establishment of Goat Unit (10+1) for Scheduled Tribe Women” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to uplift Economically poor livestock breeders of Gujarat State.

name: Chief Minister Kanya Utthan Yojana
description: A Scheme Chief Minister Kanya Utthan Yojana started under the Social Welfare Department by Bihar State Government for the social empowerment of females.

name: Savitribai Phule Scholarship For V.J.N.T And S.B.C Girls Students Studying In 8th To 10 Std
description: Savitribai Phule Scholarship is a Scholarship Scheme by the Social Justice and Special Assistance Department, Govt. of Maharashtra, to encourage enrollment and to decrease the dropout ratio of Girls in education.

name: Gaon Ki Beti
description: MP Gaon Ki Beti Yojna 2022-23 is a scholarship provided by the Madhya Pradesh government. The MP state government has started this scheme to encourage the higher education of girl children in remote areas in 2005.

name: Girl Students Health & Hygiene Scheme
description: The scheme “Girl Students Health & Hygiene Scheme” was announced by the Department of School Education, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh in 2013 for the girl students studying in classes 6-12. The scheme's focus was to retain, maintain hygiene, and continue education throughout the year.

name: Transgender Pension Scheme
description: The Transgender Pension Scheme is a welfare initiative launched by the Government of Himachal Pradesh for the upliftment and support of transgender persons.

name: Mukhya Mantri Kanyadaan Yojana
description: Under Mukhyamantri Kanyadaan Yojana, the daughters of below poverty line families or widows or destitute or family earning less than Rs. 35000-/ year are given finacial help for their marriage by Government of Himachal Pradesh.

name: Sikkim Grant Of Award To Transgender
description: The scheme “Sikkim Grant of Award To Transgender (SGATT)” was launched in 2013 by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim. Under this scheme, the state government provides financial assistance to transgender belonging to a household of the Below Poverty Line category.

name: Scheme for Providing (Golden Jubilee) One Time Grant-In-Aid in Memory of Blessed Mother Tereza
description: The scheme aims to protect and support the thousands of children living in slums and on the streets of Goa, also orphans and runaways escaping poverty, neglect or abuse. These children are often at great risk from malnutrition, illness and neglect, and need a helping hand in healthcare, shelter etc.

name: Opening and Maintenance of Boys and Girls Hostels
description: The scheme "Opening and Maintenance of Boys and Girls Hostels” by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Dept, Government of Puducherry, provides boarding/lodging and hostel facilities to Scheduled Caste students in pursuance of their education and to dissuade dropping of education at school and college level.

name: Grant Of Incentive For Marriage Between Differently Abled Person And Normal Persons
description: “Grant Of Incentive For Marriage Between Differently Abled Person And Normal Persons” by the Dept of Social Welfare, Govt of Puducherry supports marriages between differently-abled individuals and those without disabilities. An incentive of ₹1,00,000/- is provided (₹20,000 as cash, and ₹80 as NSC).

name: Grant of Incentive to the Family having One Girl/Two Girl Children and Parents who have undergone Family Planning
description: This scheme aims to create awareness among parents about the desirability of the girl child and elevate the status of the girl child in the family. The scheme provides an amount of ₹30,000/- deposited in the name of the girl child, and in the case of two girl children, ₹15,000/- is deposited.

name: Grant of Financial Assistance to the Poor Parents Having Only One Girl Child Who is Studying 8th to 10th Standard
description: This scheme was introduced to promote small family norms, uplift the welfare of girl children, and ease the financial burden on parents during their daughter's marriage. The scheme provides ₹25,000/- financial assistance for single girl children studying in 8th to 10th standard.

name: Saraswati Vidya Yojana: Reimbursement of Fees for Diploma/Graduation and Post-Graduation Professional Courses
description: “Reimbursement of Fees for Diploma/ Graduation and Post-Graduation Professional Courses'' under “Saraswati Vidya Yojana”, implemented by the Directorate of Education,  Of DNH & DD, aims to provide financial assistance to girl students pursuing higher education in professional courses.

name: Saraswati Vidya Yojana: Free Distribution of Bicycles
description: “Free Distribution of Bicycles'' under “Saraswati Vidya Yojana”, implemented by the Directorate of Education, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide bicycles free of cost to all the girl students, studying in class VIII(8) in the Govt. & Govt. aided schools/ Institutes.

name: Pension Scheme to Widow
description: The scheme is implemented by the Social Welfare Department, aims to provide financial assistance to widows aged between 18-59 years. The scheme offers ₹1,000/- per month to help meet their basic needs, ensuring public assistance for widows in need of support to maintain a dignified life.

name: Pension Scheme to Disabled Persons (Divyangjan)
description: The scheme is implemented by the Social Welfare Department to provide financial assistance to individuals with disabilities. The primary objective is to provide financial benefits to eligible Divyangjan to cater to their basic needs. The scheme is targeted at Divyangjan aged between 18 to 59 years.

name: Swabhimaan Scheme
description: The Union Territory of Daman & Diu and Dadra & Nagar Haveli has successfully launched the “Swabhimaan Scheme” scheme to tackle the problems of Malnutrition, Anemia, and other relevant issues.

name: Pension Scheme to Old Age Persons (Senior Citizen)
description: The objective of this scheme is to provide financial support to eligible senior citizens to cater to their basic needs. The scheme benefits senior citizens aged 60 years and above, providing a monthly pension of ₹1,500/- for those aged 60–69 years and ₹2,000/- for those aged 70 years and above.

name: Health and Maternity Cover for the Construction Workers
description: The "Health and Maternity Cover for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides maternity benefits in the form of financial assistance to the eligible registered women members of the board.

name: Distribution of Female Menstrual Hygiene Kit for the Construction Workers
description: The "Distribution of Female Menstrual Hygiene Kit for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides Menstrual Hygiene Kit to registered female beneficiaries.

name: Skill Development for the Construction Workers
description: The "Skill Development for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance in the form of stipend to the workers who attend the training programs under “Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana”.

name: Financial assistance for Marriage for the Construction Worker
description: The "Financial Assistance for Marriage for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for marriage of self and for children (upto 2 children) of the building workers.

name: Grant for the Purchase of Tools/ Protective Gear for the Construction Workers
description: The "Grant for the Purchase of Tools/ Protective Gear for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to the eligible registered member for purchase of tools.

name: Promoting Registration for the Construction Workers
description: The "Promoting Registration for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, U.T. of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides sleeping mat/ blanket/ mosquito net to registered construction workers, in order to encourage construction workers to register with the Board.

name: Bus Passes for the Construction Workers
description: The "Bus Passes for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides 50% reimbursement of the travelling cost of registered construction workers who travel by bus from various villages in search of work.

name: Retirement Relief in Quitting Service for the Construction Workers
description: The "Retirement Relief in Quitting Service for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides a certain amount to the eligible registered worker on quitting service after attaining age of 60 years.

name: Self Education for the Construction Workers
description: The "Skill Development for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides reimbursement of the course fees for distance education from and an incentive for each degree.

name: Insurance Scheme for the Construction Workers
description: The "Insurance Scheme for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme through which beneficiaries shall be enrolled under the “Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojna” and “Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojna”.

name: Shram Yogi Prasad Scheme
description: The "Shram Yogi Prasad Scheme'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides mid day meal and breakfast to the BOCW registered construction workers.

name: Ex-gratia for Death for the Construction Workers
description: The "Ex-gratia for Death for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for death to the nominees/ dependents of a deceased registered member.

name: Payment of Funeral Assistance for the Construction Workers
description: The "Payment of Funeral Assistance for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for funeral expenses to the nominees/ dependents of a deceased registered member or their spouse.

name: Pension for the Construction Workers
description: The "Pension for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides a monthly pension after completion of 60 years to the eligible registered member.

name: Financial Assistance for Education for the Construction Workers
description: The "Financial Assistance for Education for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides reimbursement for education of up to two children of the members.

name: Medical Assistance and Wage Loss for the Construction Workers
description: The "Medical Assistance and Wage Loss for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, U.T. of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides medical expenses for injuries sustained during employment and will pay half-monthly wages during the period of disablement to the eligible worker.

name: Ex-gratia for Permanent Disability/ Chronic Diseases/ Surgery/ Operation for the Construction Workers
description: "Ex-gratia for Permanent Disability/ Chronic Diseases/ Surgery/ Operation for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Dept.,  U.T. of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for Permanent Disability/ Chronic Diseases/ Surgery/ Operation of the workers.

name: Grant of Token Amount for Construction of House for the Construction Workers
description: The "Grant of Token Amount for Construction of House for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to the eligible registered member for construction of house.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) For Cottage Industries: Financial Assistance To Cottage Industries
description: “Financial Assistance To Cottage Industries'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)”, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide financial assistance to Cottage Industries on the term loan taken through banks.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance of Interest Subsidy
description: “Assistance of Interest Subsidy” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide Interest Subsidy on the term loan on equipment/machinery etc and furniture’s / fixtures (except land and building).

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) For Handicraft Artisans: Assistance For Capital Investment For The Handloom And Handicrafts Artisans Of The U.T. Requiring Financial Assistance For Purchase Of Machinery Or Raw Materials
description: This is a sub-scheme under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)”, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, that aims to provide financial assistance for purchase of machinery or raw materials for development of their business.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS): Environment Protection Infrastructure Subsidy
description: “Environment Protection Infrastructure Subsidy'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)”, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to promote Installation of Environment Protection Infrastructure for a cleaner environment.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS): Scheme For Reimbursement Of Stamp Duty
description: “Scheme For Reimbursement Of Stamp Duty'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)”, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide reimbursement on Stamp duty to the new units as well as the units undertaking expansion/ diversification.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for Thrust Sectors: Scheme For Vaccine Manufacturing Units
description: “ Scheme For Vaccine Manufacturing Units'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for Thrust Sectors, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide Interest Subsidy to Vaccine Manufacturing Units.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for Thrust Sectors: Scheme For Marine Products Processing Units
description: “Scheme For Marine Products Processing Units'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for Thrust Sectors, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, aims to provide Interest Subsidy to the Establishment /Expansion of Marine products processing industries.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for Thrust Sectors: Scheme For Food Processing Industries
description: “Scheme For Food Processing Industries'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for Thrust Sectors, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide Interest Subsidy to the Establishment /Expansion of Food processing industries.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance of Fixed Capital Investment Subsidy
description: “Assistance of Fixed Capital Investment Subsidy” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of  DNH & DD, aims to provide subsidy for the investment made in Gross Fixed Capital investment (GFCI).

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance To Small And Medium Enterprises (SME) For Raising Of Capital Through SME Exchange
description: “Assistance SME For Raising Of Capital Through SME Exchange” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide One-time assistance of expenditure incurred on raising of fund through SME Exchange.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for Thrust Sectors: Scheme For Medical Equipment And Accessories, Medical Diagnostics And Ayush Products Manufacturing Units
description: “Scheme For Medical Equipment And Accessories, Medical Diagnostics And Ayush Products Manufacturing Units'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for Thrust Sectors, by the Dept. of Industries, DNH & DD, aims to provide subsidy to Medical Equipment and AYUSH Products Manufacturing Units.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for Thrust Sectors: Assistance For Marble, IT & ITES, Electric Vehicles & Spare Parts, Toys Units And Semi-Conduct or Industries Sectors
description: “Assistance For Marble, IT & ITES, Electric Vehicles & Spare Parts, Toys Units And Semi-Conduct or Industries Sectors'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for Thrust Sectors, by the Dept. of Industries,  DNH & DD, aims to promote industries through providing various types of subsidy.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for Thrust Sectors: Assistance For Furniture Sector
description: “Assistance For Furniture Sector” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for Thrust Sectors, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to promote Furniture industries through providing various types of subsidy.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for Textile Sector: Assistance Of Interest Subsidy For Textile Sector
description: “Assistance Of Interest Subsidy For Textile Sector” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for Textile Sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide credit linked interest subsidy for Textile and Technical Textile sector.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Awards For MSMEs
description: “Awards For MSMEs” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to facilitate the best MSMEs with awards for their achievements in different aspects.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Incentive For Local Employment
description: “Incentive For Local Employment” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide One-time recruitment incentive to the Industrial Units for generating employment for local residents.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance For Participation In Industrial Exhibitions Abroad
description: “Assistance For Participation In Industrial Exhibitions Abroad” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, by the Dept. of Industries, DNH & DD, aims to promote the Products and Services of the territory abroad and their businesses to expand  the customer base all over the world.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance For Capital Investment In Solar Power Generation
description: “Assistance For Capital Investment In Solar Power Generation” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, by the Dept. of Industries, DNH & DD, aims to encourage MSMEs to use Solar Power through providing Capital subsidy for setting up of Solar Power Plant for generation of power.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Reimbursement Of Free On Board (FOB) Expenses
description: “Reimbursement Of Free On Board (FOB) Expenses” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims for boosting exports in the Food/ Marine Food Processing Sector.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Incentives For Doubling Of Export Values
description: “Incentives For Doubling Of Export Values” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to extend support to MSMEs to increase exports and enhance export values.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance For Entrepreneurship Under Skill Development
description: “Assistance For Entrepreneurship Under Skill Development” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, DNH & DD, aims to provide assistance to budding entrepreneurs and their staffs to undergo Entrepreneurship /Management training.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance For Saving In Consumption Of Energy And Water
description: “Assistance For Saving In Consumption Of Energy And Water” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, DNH & DD, aims to provide assistance to the existing/ new Enterprise for taking action for saving in consumption of Energy and Water.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance For Zed Certification
description: “Assistance For Zed Certification” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, was introduced to urge industries, especially (MSMEs), to manufacture goods in the country with “Zero Defects”.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance For Patent Registration /Trade Mark Registration
description: “Assistance For Patent Registration/ Trade Mark Registration” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to extend support for obtaining Patent Registration/ Trade Mark Registration.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for MSME Sector: Assistance For Quality Certification
description: “Assistance of Interest Subsidy” under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for MSME sector, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD,  aims to extend support to MSME to get quality certification to introduce quality products in competitive markets.

name: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) For Handicraft Artisans: Assistance For Capital Investment To Uplift The Economic Condition Of Artisans/ Persons
description: This is a sub-scheme under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)”, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, that aims to provide additional tools/equipment to SC/ST/OBC/EWS communities to generate adequate income and self-employment.

name: Pre Matric Scholarship For Minorities
description: A scholarship scheme by Ministry of Minority Affairs for students from minority communities studying in Class 1st to Class 10th in India in a government or private school, including such residential Government institutes and eligible private institutes selected and notified in a transparent manner.

name: Post Matric Scholarship For Minorities
description: A scholarship scheme by Ministry of Minority Affairs for students from minority communities pursuing a post-matric course from a notified institution in India in a government or private school. A total of five (5) lakh scholarships are targeted to be distributed as ‘Fresh’ Scholarships.

name: Mukhyamantri Mahila Udyami Yojana
description: This is a flagship scheme of the Bihar government aimed at promoting entrepreneurship and self-employment among the youth by providing financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- for setting up businesses.

name: West Bengal Transport Workers’ Social Security Scheme: Assistance for Marriage
description: The scheme provides financial aid for the marriage of eligible beneficiaries or their dependent sons/daughters (up to two marriages).

name: West Bengal Transport Workers’ Social Security Scheme: Maternity Benefit
description: This scheme provides financial assistance to a beneficiary on successful delivery of a child or miscarriage by such beneficiary or his wife.

name: Financial Assistance to Newlyweds under Kanyadan Yojana (Vijabhaj)
description: "Financial Assistance to Newlyweds under Kanyadan Yojana (Vijabhaj)" was launched by the Dept of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt of Maharashtra. The scheme aims to reduce the economic, social, and educational backwardness of Scheduled Castes, Freed Castes, Nomadic Tribes, etc.

name: Wire Fencing Around the Farm for Crop Protection
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to protect farmers' crops from damage caused by wild and stray animals by providing financial assistance for wire fencing around farms.

name: Scheme to Provide Assistance to Processing Units in State Market Committees
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to support market committees in Gujarat by providing financial assistance for the establishment of processing units.

name: Scheme to Provide Assistance to Sate Market Committees as well as Taluka-District Co-operative Purchase and Sale Union to Construct Large Size Warehouse Godowns
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to State Market Committees and Taluka-District Co-operative Purchase and Sale Unions for constructing large-sized warehouse godowns

name: Scheme to Provide Assistance for Setting Up Farmer Support Centers in State Market Committees and for Computerization of All Market Committees
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to establish farmer support centers at market committee levels and computerize all market committees in Gujarat.

name: Creation of Modern Facilities in Market Committee: Scheme to provide assistance foe setting up modern facilities in Market Committee
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to Market Committees for setting up modern facilities, improving agricultural infrastructure, and enhancing the competitiveness of agricultural markets.

name: Scheme to Provide Assistance for Construction of Retail Outlets/ Agricultural Malls in State Market Committees
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to support market committees in constructing retail outlets and agricultural malls to facilitate direct selling of farmers' produce, ensuring better pricing and increasing farmers' income.

name: State Government Share Capital Contribution to Co.operative Sugar Factories (Normal Area) (Tribal Area)
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance in the form of a 30% share capital contribution by the State Government for setting up new sugar cooperative factories in Gujarat.

name: Interest Subvention against long terms loan to the Co-operative sugar societies (Normal Area) (Tribal Area)
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide interest subvention on long-term loans taken by sugar cooperative societies for payment of sugarcane arrears for the year 2018-19.

name: Package for strengthening to sugar co-operatives as may be policy decided by the State Government
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to support sugar co-operatives by providing financial assistance for modernization, diversification, organic fertilizer production to enhance sugarcane farming and the sugar industry.

name: Shahari Waqf Sampatti Vikas Yojana
description: Under the scheme, interest free loan to Waqf Boards (WBs)/waqf institutions is granted to various Waqf Boards and Waqf Institutions in the country for construction of economically viable buildings on the Waqf land, such as commercial complex, marriage halls, hospitals, cold storage etc..

name: Construction of Hostels for OBC Boys and Girls
description: The Scheme aims at providing hostel facilities to students belonging to socially and educationally backward classes, especially from rural areas, to enable them to pursue secondary and higher education.

name: Maternity Benefit (CBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance shall be given to the spouse of registered beneficiary woman employee after the delivery of child.

name: Kanyadaan Scheme (CBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance will be granted to the workers who are registered under the CBOCWWB on the eve of the marriage of his/her daughter and self-marriage of female registered workers.

name: Soft Loan Scheme for Women Entrepreneurs
description: The scheme “Soft Loan Scheme for Women Entrepreneurs” was started under Kerala Startup Mission to support women startups with a soft loan of an amount limited to ₹15 Lakhs as working capital for implementing works & projects received from Govt. departments and Public Sector Undertaking in Kerala.

name: Coir Vikas Yojana-Skill Upgradation and Mahila Coir Yojana
description: The scheme “Skill Upgradation and Mahila Coir Yojana” is a component of “Coir Vikas Yojana” and the scheme was launched by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Government of India.

name: Additional Pension to Widow of Ex-Serviceman having Children
description: The scheme is implemented by the Sainik and Ardh Sainik Welfare Department, Government of Haryana. Under the scheme, an additional amount, in addition to the pension, is provided to the widow of an ex-serviceman who dies while in service but not in any battle.

name: Mahila Samridhi Yojana under NSKFDC- Haryana
description: This scheme offers loans up to ₹1,00,000/- to women Safai Karamcharis or their dependents for economic development through self-employment initiatives, such as establishing cloth shops, dairies, tea shops, bangle shops, beauty parlours, papad making, basketry, tailoring shops, etc.

name: Mahila Samiriddhi Yojana for Minority Community
description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under this scheme, loans up to ₹1,00,000/- per beneficiary are provided only to women entrepreneurs of the target group, either directly or through Self-Help Groups.

name: Financial Assistance on Marriage of Sons- Haryana Silicosis Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹11,000/- is provided to workers suffering from silicosis, as confirmed by the Silicosis Diagnosis Board, Haryana, for the marriage of up to two of their sons.

name: Divyang Boys/ Girls Marriage Incentive Grant
description: “Divyang Youth / Girl Marriage Incentive Grant” is a social security scheme by the Social Welfare Department, Government of Uttarakhand, that provides financial assistance to a couple when a young woman or young man marries a Divyang (person with disability) partner.

name: Grant Scheme for Marriage of SC and ST Girls
description: “Grant Scheme for Marriage of SC and ST Girls” is a social security scheme by the Social Welfare Department, Government of Uttarakhand, that provides financial assistance to the SC and ST girls to cover the expenses of marriage.

name: Financial Assistance as Shagun in Marriage of Man Workers or Son of Workers - Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: This scheme was started by the Haryana Labour Welfare Board (HLWB), Labour Department, Government of Haryana on 15.01.2019. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹21,000/- will be provided as Shagun for the marriage of workers' sons and unmarried male workers themselves.

name: Ashirwad
description: The Punjabi government has established the Punjab Ashirwad Scheme to offer financial support for a girl's marriage.

name: Marriage Assistance - Folk Artist
description: The scheme "Marriage Assistance" was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. This scheme provides financial assistance for the marriage of registered folk artists, or their son or daughter. The assistance aims to support the cultural community by helping with marriage.

name: Family Pension (DBOCWWB)
description: The scheme "Family Pension" was launched by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. In this scheme, upon the death of the pensioner, the surviving spouse is provided 50% of the pension amount or ₹1500/-, whichever is higher.

name: Special Jobs to PwDs - Clerical Assistant
description: The scheme aims to provide employment opportunities to Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) to enhance their financial independence and social inclusion. Through this scheme, PwDs are employed as Clerical Assistants for 89 Days under the District Panchayat offices of their respective islands.

name: Special Jobs to PwDs - Helper
description: Under this scheme, three PwD candidates are employed as Helpers with a monthly salary of ₹9,900/- on an 89-day rotational basis in the District Panchayat offices of their respective islands to address issues related to disabled persons and other associated matters.

name: Nari Adalat
description: Nari Adalat, a component of the "Sambal" sub-scheme under Mission Shakti, it aims to provide women with an alternate Grievance Redressal Mechanism for resolving cases of petty nature (harassment, subversion, curtailment of rights or entitlements) faced by them at Gram panchayat level.

name: Union Territory of Lakshadweep Pension Scheme for Widows
description: The scheme aims to provide monthly financial assistance of ₹1,500/- to widows in the Union Territory of Lakshadweep. It covers widows who have not remarried and have no source of income.

name: Union Territory of Lakshadweep Pension Scheme for Abandoned Ladies/Destitute
description: The scheme aims to provide monthly financial assistance of ₹1,500/- to abandoned ladies & destitute women in the UT. The scheme covers women who have been divorced or abandoned by their husband or relatives, have not remarried, & are without any source of income or have only a nominal income.

name: Union Territory of Lakshadweep Pension Scheme for Old Age
description: The scheme aims to provide monthly financial assistance of ₹1,500/- to senior citizens in the UT. The scheme covers persons above 60 years of age who do not have any source of income.

name: Pashudhan Mitra Scheme
description: Launched on 20th June 2013, the scheme "Pashudhan Mitra Scheme1" by the Animal Husbandry Department, Govt of Chhattisgarh, aims to expand veterinary and breeding services, strengthen service delivery, and provide incentive honorariums to Pashudhan Mitras for livelihood support.

name: Union Territory of Lakshadweep Pension Scheme for Specially Abled Persons
description: ​The scheme aims to provide a monthly financial assistance of ₹1,500 to persons with disabilities, including those who are deaf, mute, blind, intellectually disabled, or orthopedically impaired, with a disability level of 40% or more and without any source of income.

name: Mother Teresa Asahay Matri Sambal Yojana
description: The main purpose of the Scheme to encourage under this Yojana, women who are helpless in upbringing their children (like widows, and destitute) are provided with financial assistance per child per annum for two children.

name: Jiyo Parsi Scheme – Health of the Community
description: This scheme provides financial assistance to eligible Parsi couples to support their dependent elderly family members & children. The benefit is given only to couples who have a child after introduction of this component in 2017-18 & have an annual family income of less than ₹15 lakh from all source

name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana
description: This is a micro-financing programme aiming towards the empowerment of women from underprivileged backgrounds or economically backward areas. Through this scheme, these women can apply for a loan at a nominal interest rate to fulfil their dreams and goals and gain financial independence.

name: Jiyo Parsi Scheme – Medical Assistance
description: This scheme provides financial support to the Parsi couples for fertility treatments, including Assisted Reproductive Technologies (ART) such as In-Vitro Fertilization (IVF) and Intra Cytoplasmic Sperm Injection (ICSI), along with other methods, including surrogacy, wherever required.

name: Self-Employment Scheme: Nana Vyavasay Mate Loan Yojana
description: "Nana Vyavasay Mate Loan Yojana" is a component under the "Self-Employment Scheme" that provides financial assistance in the form of a loan to establish or expand small businesses such as grocery shops, medical stores, bookstores, etc.

name: Self-Employment Scheme: Vahan Loan Sahay Yojana
description: "Vahan Loan Sahay Yojana" is a component under the "Self-Employment Scheme" that provides on-road unit cost to self-employed individuals for purchasing vehicles such as rickshaws, loading rickshaws, Maruti cars, and jeep taxis.

name: Interest Help Scheme For Graduate Doctor-Lawyer-Technical Graduate
description: The "Interest Help Scheme for Graduate Doctor-Lawyer-Technical Graduate" aims to provide financial assistance in the form of interest subsidy on loans to the non-reserved category professionals in Gujarat.

name: Training Assistance for Competitive Examinations
description: The "Training Assistance for Competitive Examinations" scheme provides financial assistance to non-reserved category students who are undergoing training in recognized institutions for competitive recruitment examinations.

name: Food Bill Assistance
description: The "Food Bill Assistance" scheme provides financial support to non-reserved category students pursuing graduate-level medical, dental, technical, and para-medical courses.

name: Coaching Help Scheme
description: The "Coaching Help Scheme" provides financial support to non-reserved category students pursuing science in Standard-11 and Standard-12 by covering additional tuition costs.

name: Foreign Education Scheme
description: The "Foreign Education Scheme" provides financial assistance for non-reserved category students pursuing higher education abroad after Standard 12.

name: Educational Study Scheme
description: The "Educational Study Scheme" provides financial assistance in the form of loans for self-supporting graduate-level courses in professional fields such as Medical, Dental, Engineering, Technology, Pharmacy, Architecture, Nursing, Homeopathy, Veterinary, and similar disciplines.

name: Scheme for assistance for Start Ups/ Innovation: Sustenance Allowance
description: The "Scheme for Assistance for Start Ups/ Innovation" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy, aims to drive economic growth by generating jobs, fostering competition, and introducing next-gen solutions.

name: Scheme for assistance for Start Ups/ Innovation: Seed Support
description: The "Scheme for Assistance for Start Ups/ Innovation" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy, aims to drive economic growth by generating jobs, fostering competition, and introducing next-gen solutions.

name: Group Insurance Scheme for Powerloom Weavers
description: The basic objective of this scheme is to provide insurance cover to the powerloom weavers in the case of natural death, accidental death as well as partial and permanent disability due to accident.

name: Women Helpline
description: Women Helpline provides 24X7 emergency and non-emergency response through telephonic short-code 181 to women

name: Arka Vertical Garden
