description: "Arka Vertical Garden" aims to promote vertical gardening in urban and peri-urban areas to increase self-sufficiency and produce pesticide-free vegetables. The scheme provides subsidized vertical garden structures to help families grow their choice of vegetables using vertical space.

name: Incentive Scheme For The Electricity Consumers Under Various Categories In Andaman & Nicobar Islands
description: "Incentive Scheme For The Electricity Consumers Under Various Categories In Andaman & Nicobar Islands" aims to reduce power consumption through demand side management and promote green energy adoption. The scheme offers monetary incentives to consumers who achieve at least 30% energy savings.

name: Mobility Scheme
description: The Mobility Scheme is aimed to provide an opportunity to women scientists who are facing difficulties in their present job due to relocation (marriage, transfer of husband to any other location within the country, attending ailing parents, and accompanying children studying in different city).

name: Prime Minister Early Career Research Grant
description: This programme is initiated by the Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF) to assist researchers to initiate their research career in a new institution with a flexible budget and progressive initiatives for ease of doing research.

name: Integrated Horticulture Development Plan Scheme for Scheduled Caste Families
description: Under this scheme, Scheduled Caste farmers will be provided with quality planting material and other inputs for mushroom cultivation, bamboo stacking in vegetables, and protected cultivation with a subsidy of up to 90%. Additionally, training will be offered on various aspects of these practices.

name: Bhavantar Bharpai Yojana
description: The scheme is implemented by the Department of Horticulture, Government of Haryana, aims to protect horticultural farmers from market price fluctuations and compensate them if they receive low prices for their produce in the market.

name: Promotion of Science Education (POSE) Scholarship Scheme
description: The scheme aims to encourage meritorious students to pursue higher studies in Basic and Natural Science subjects, such as B.Sc., B.S., B.Stat., B.Math., Integrated M.Sc., or M.S., in India. The scheme is implemented by the Haryana State Council for Science, Innovation & Technology.

name: HSCST Fellowship Programme
description: In order to attract talented & meritorious students, HSCSIT is offering research fellowships in various fields of Science & Technology & Medical Sciences. The fellowships will involve full time research work leading to Ph.D. degree from any of the Institute/University in Haryana.

name: Vishesh Yogyajan Sukhad Dampatya Jeevan Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to specially-abled individuals to support a happy married life after marriage. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹50,000/- per couple is provided.

name: Assistance to Persons with Disabilities for Purchase/Fitting of Artificial Limbs/Appliances
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹10,000/- to specially-abled individuals for self-employment and the purchase of artificial limbs/equipment to overcome physical disabilities.

name: Motorized Tricycle Yojana
description: Under this scheme, motorized tricycles are provided to specially-abled individuals with 50% or more locomotor disability to support self-employment and pursuing higher education from Senior Higher Secondary onwards.

name: Aastha Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide BPL-equivalent benefits to families with two or more specially-abled members. Under this scheme, eligible families receive free medical treatment, ration supplies, and other welfare benefits.

name: Mukhyamantri Vishesh Yogyajan Swaraozgar Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to specially-abled individuals for self-employment. Under this scheme, a loan of ₹5,00,000/- will be provided to specially-abled individuals in the state whose annual family income does not exceed ₹2,00,000/-, enabling them to start their own business.

name: Bunkar Parivar Ke Pratibhavan Chatra-Chatraon Ko Protsahan Puraskar Yojana
description: "Bunkar Parivar Ke Pratibhavan Chatra-Chatraon Ko Protsahan Puraskar Yojana" aims to motivate and encourage children of weaver families for higher education. Monetary rewards are given to talented students who score well in 10th/12th board exams.

name: Bunkar Parivar Sahayata Yojana
description: "Bunkar Parivar Sahayata Yojana" aims to provide immediate financial assistance to families of weavers in case of sudden death. The scheme benefits the families of working weavers who are members of primary weaver cooperative societies by providing financial support of ₹20,000/-.

name: Mukhyamantri Shiksha Protsahan Yojana
description: The "Mukhyamantri Shiksha Protsahan Yojana" by the Directorate of Higher Education, Department of Higher and Technical Education, Government of Jharkhand, aims to provide free coaching and financial assistance to students prepare for national level competitive examinations like JEE, NEET, CLAT, NHMC

name: Varishtha Bunkar Samman Yojana
description: "Varishtha Bunkar Samman Yojana" aims to encourage senior weavers in the handloom sector. The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹11,000/- to active weaver members who are 60 years or older and have produced the maximum cloth in their district.

name: Uchch Shiksha Puraskar Yojana
description: "Uchch Shiksha Puraskar Yojana" aims to encourage and motivate students from weaver families to pursue higher education. ₹20,000/- is provided to talented students from weaver families who get admission in first year of Engineering/Medical/CA/MBA courses in any government college in Chhattisgarh.

name: Vahli Dikri Yojana
description: The Vahli Dikri Yojana by the Government of Gujarat under the Women and Child Development Department . The scheme supports girl children by providing financial aid, free education, and insurance, encouraging higher education and reducing dropout rates.

name: Coaching Help Scheme for JEE-GUJCET-NEET Exams
description: The "Coaching Help Scheme for JEE-GUJCET-NEET Exams" scheme provides financial assistance to non-reserved category students from the science stream who are getting coaching in institutions with three years or more experience.

name: Market Development Assistance to MSMEs: Assistance to Organizers for Organizing Industrial Exhibitions in Gujarat
description: The scheme "Assistance to Organizers for Organizing Industrial Exhibitions in Gujarat" under the "Market Development Assistance to MSMEs" aims to provide financial assistance to organizers of industrial exhibitions in Gujarat.

name: Market Development Assistance to MSMEs: Assistance to MSME Manufacturing Sector Participation in the Exhibition (National and International)
description: The scheme "Assistance to MSME Manufacturing Sector Participation in the Exhibition (National and International)" under the "Market Development Assistance to MSMEs" aims to offer reimbursement for stall rent, product literature, and display materials to MSMEs participating in exhibitions.

name: Gadiya Lohar Maharana Pratap Bhawan Nirman Yojana
description: This scheme provides financial assistance of ₹1,20,000/- in three instalments to Gadiya Lohar families in Rajasthan for the construction of permanent houses and ensuring their settlement.

name: Gadiya Lohar Raw Material Purchase Grant-in-aid Scheme
description: Under this scheme, the state government provides financial assistance of ₹10,000/- as a one-time grant to the Gadia Lohar community of Rajasthan for purchasing raw materials and making themselves self-reliant in their business.

name: Kisan Vriksha Mitra Yojana
description: The scheme aims to promote commercial tree plantation on private lands, ensuring buyback of produce, increasing farmers' income, and generating employment. The scheme benefits farmers, private institutions, and other stakeholders by providing financial assistance for plantation.

name: Grant of Financial Incentives for Hotels, Resorts, and Tourism Projects
description: The scheme aims to promote tourism infrastructure by providing financial incentives to hotels, resorts, heritage hotels, and other tourism projects. The scheme offers capital grants and subsidies to eligible applicants who have invested in and developed tourism-related projects.

name: Prime Minister’s Internship Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide internship opportunities to one crore youth in top 500 companies in five years. Through this Scheme, youth will gain exposure for 12 months to real-life business environment, across varied professions and employment opportunities.

name: Scheme for Awards to MSMES
description: The Government of Gujarat has introduced the "Scheme for Awards to MSMEs" under the Industrial Policy 2020. This scheme aims to recognize and reward Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) for their outstanding achievements in production, quality improvement, innovation, and entrepreneurship.

name: Shilp Guru Award
description: The “Shilp Guru Award” for master craftspersons was introduced by the Ministry of Textiles to honor legendary master craftspersons of handicrafts whose work and dedication have contributed not only to the preservation but also to the promotion of the rich and diverse craft heritage of the country.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Assistance to SHG for Job Work (Fiscal Incentives to Labour Intensive Unit)
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Power Tariff Subsidy (Fiscal Incentives to Labour Intensive Unit)
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Payroll Assistance (Fiscal Incentives to Labour Intensive Unit)
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: Interest Subvention Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide institutional credit for capital investments at reasonable interest rates and is implemented through the Karnataka State Financial Corporation (KSFC) in the state.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Interest Subsidy (Fiscal Incentives to Labour Intensive Unit)
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Capital Subsidy (Fiscal Incentives to Labour Intensive Unit)
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Assistance for Technology Acquisition
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: ICAR - Post Matric Scholarship For Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribes Candidates
description: The scheme "Post-Matric Scholarship to Scheduled Castes / Scheduled Tribes Candidates" was introduced by ICAR, Dept. of Agricultural Research and Education, to enable the students belonging to the weaker sections of society to complete undergraduate courses.

name: Interest Subsidy Scheme for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe Entrepreneurs
description: The scheme aims to encourage SC/ST entrepreneurs to establish micro or small-scale service enterprises & to expand, diversify, or modernize their existing units. Under this scheme, a loan amount ranging from a min. of ₹20.00 lakhs to a max. of ₹1,000.00 lakhs is provided at an interest rate of 4%.

name: Devnarayan Gurukul Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide free residential education to students from Special Backward Classes. Under this scheme, selected students receive free education, accommodation, meals, uniforms, books, and study materials in government-approved schools.

name: Mukhya Mantri Sarvajan Uchcha Shiksha Chhatravriti Yojana
description: This scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from all sections of Rajasthan who are pursuing higher education at IITs, IIMs, and other national-level institutions. Under this scheme, 50% of the non-refundable fees are reimbursed to eligible students.

name: Additional Financial Assistance for the Children of Persons Engaged in the Cleaning Profession
description: This scheme aims to provide additional financial assistance of ₹500/- per month to children of individuals working in cleaning/sanitation profession. This assistance is given to students already receiving a scholarship under Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme, ensuring their continued education.

name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - College/Higher/Technical Educational Fees Refund for Transgender Students
description: The scheme aims to promote higher and technical education among transgender individuals by providing financial assistance for their educational expenses. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a refund of their school, college, higher, or technical education fees.

name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender
description: The scheme aims to support transgender students pursuing post-matric education. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a monthly scholarship of ₹1,000/- to cover educational expenses for their post-matric studies.

name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Pre Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender
description: The scheme aims to support transgender students by providing scholarships to encourage their education and social upliftment. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a monthly scholarship of ₹225/- per month to cover educational expenses from primary to pre-matric levels.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Capital Subsidy
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Training Programme for Transgender
description: The scheme aims to support the socio-economic development of transgender individuals by providing financial assistance, skill training, and employment opportunities.

name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Self Employment Programme for Transgender
description: The scheme objective is to provide financial assistance to transgender individuals for self-employment/business establishment. Eligible beneficiaries can receive up to ₹50,000/- or 25% of the project cost.

name: Transgender Utthan Kosh – Identity Card for Transgender
description: This scheme aims to identify transgender persons and issuing identity cards to them. This certificate/identity card will be valid for all government purposes, including obtaining a ration card, Aadhaar card, birth certificate, etc.

name: Financial Assistance for Private Self-Financed Technical Institutions
description: The "Financial Assistance for Private Self-Financed Technical Institutions" scheme by the Higher, Technical Education & Skill Development Department, Government of Jharkhand, provides grants to private engineering and polytechnic institutions for infrastructure enhancement and quality education.

name: Birsa Harit Gram Yojana
description: The "Birsa Harit Gram Yojana" by the Rural Development Department, Government of Jharkhand, promotes afforestation while generating sustainable livelihoods. It supports SC, ST, and landless families through plantation activities under MGNREGA, ensuring income and environmental sustainability.

name: Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme
description: "Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme" provides financial assistance for the education and training of differently-abled children, who are regular students in a school or college. The application needs to be submitted to the District Office, Panchayat and Social Welfare / Janpad Panchayat Office.

name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Financial Assistance for Studying Bisexual Children
description: The scheme objective is to provide financial assistance of ₹6,000 per month for up to 12 months to transgender students from Class 6 and above for accommodation and daily needs if they live away from their homes for education.

name: Griha Lakshmi Scheme
description: The scheme "Griha Lakshmi" aims to provide financial assistance to women heads of households in Karnataka. The scheme offers a monthly benefit of ₹2,000/- to eligible women, helping them manage household expenses and improve their economic stability.

name: Ambedkar DBT Voucher Scheme
description: The scheme aims to support students from SC, ST, OBC, MBC, and EWS categories by providing financial aid for accommodation. The students receive ₹2,000/- per month for up to 10 months per academic year.

name: Vishesh Yogyajan Palanhar Yojana
description: Under this scheme, children receive monthly financial support based on their age to ensure their well-being and education. To be eligible for assistance, the child must attend an Anganwadi/school between the ages of two to five years and study in school after the age of 6 years.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Assistance for Quality Certification
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Assistance to SHG for Job Work
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Payroll Assistance
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Power Tariff Subsidy
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: Gujarat Textile Policy: Interest Subsidy
description: The "Gujarat Textile Policy" introduced by the Industries and Mines Department aims to create a vibrant Textile Sector ecosystem and generate enormous employment opportunities in the State.

name: Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME): Assistance in Rent to MSEs
description: The "Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)" launched by the Industries and Mines Department aims to position Gujarat as a global business hub, promoting sustainable manufacturing, MSME growth, and export competitiveness.

name: Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME): Assistance for Power Connection Charges

description: The "Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)" launched by the Industries and Mines Department aims to position Gujarat as a global business hub, promoting sustainable manufacturing, MSME growth, and export competitiveness.

name: Punjabi Language Scholarship Scheme
description: This scheme awards scholarships to students based on their merit in the Punjabi subject in the 8th and 10th class examinations conducted by the Haryana Board of School Education, provided they continue studying the Punjabi subject in the 9th and 11th classes.

name: Rajiv Gandhi Scholarship Scheme
description: The scheme aims to encourage brilliant students and inculcate a spirit of competition among them. Under this scheme, scholarships/incentives are provided to meritorious students studying in Class VI to Class XII in government schools.

name: Haryana State Merit Scholarship Scheme
description: The scheme aims to support meritorious students from economically backward sections in pursuing higher education. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to students pursuing Degree, Post-Graduate, and Doctorate courses.

name: Maternity Benefits Scheme (BBOCWWB)
description: "Maternity Benefits Scheme" provides an amount equivalent to 90 days of the minimum wages set by the State Govt. for unskilled workers at the time of childbirth. The applicant should be a female construction worker who has completed one year of membership with the Board.

name: Financial Assistance for Cremation (BBOCWWB)
description: The scheme "Financial Assistance for Cremation" by the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Resources Department, Government of Bihar, provides financial assistance of ₹5,000/-to the dependents of the deceased worker for performing cremation.

name: Paternity Benefit Scheme (BBOCWWB)
description: The "Paternity Benefit Scheme" by the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers' Welfare Board, Labour Resources Department, Government of Bihar, provides ₹6,000/- per childbirth to the male workers, provided that their wife is not registered with the Board.

name: Family Pension (BBOCWWB)
description: The scheme "Family Pension" by the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (BBOCWWB), Labour Resources Department, Government of Bihar, provides pension to the dependent of the deceased pensioner of the Board.

name: Annual Medical Assistance Scheme (BBOCWWB)
description: The "Annual Medical Assistance Scheme" by the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Resources Department, Government of Bihar, provides a yearly financial assistance of ₹3,000/- to the construction workers who are registered with the Board.

name: Free Passport Scheme
description: The scheme aims to facilitate higher education and global career opportunities for students by covering the cost of passport issuance. Under this scheme, final-year UG and PG students in government colleges receive reimbursement for passport application fees.

name: Schemes for welfare of School Children belonging to BPL and BC(A) families: Monthly Stipend for BPL Students
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from BPL students to support their education. Under this scheme, a monthly stipend is provided to students studying in classes 1 to 12 in Haryana Government schools.

name: Schemes for welfare of School Children belonging to BPL and BC(A) families: Monthly Stipend for BC-A Students
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from Backward Classes (BC-A) families to support their education. Under this scheme, eligible students studying in Classes 1 to 12 in Haryana Government schools receive a monthly stipend.

name: e-Adhigam Scheme - Free Tablet
description: This scheme was launched with objective of promoting digital education & providing online learning to children from poor & needy families, proving to be a boon for them. Under this scheme, free tablets are provided to students, enabling access to state-of-the-art software & learning materials.

name: National Overseas Scholarship For Scheduled Caste Etc. Candidates
description: A scholarship scheme by MoSJE for regular, full-time students from Scheduled Castes, Denotified Nomadic and Semi Nomadic Tribes, Landless Agricultural Labourers and Traditional Artisans; to obtain higher education viz., Master degree or Ph.D courses by studying abroad

name: Reimbursement of Tuition Fee and Transport Facility to Scheduled Castes Students Studying in Technical Institutions in Haryana
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Scheduled Castes students pursuing AICTE-approved technical courses. Under this scheme, eligible students receive tuition fee reimbursement and transport facility benefits.

name: Cash Prizes Scheme (BBOCWWB)
description: "Cash Prizes Scheme" was launched by the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. Students securing 60% or more in the 10th and 12th exams receive cash prizes of up to ₹25,000/- per year. Upto two children of a registered construction worker are eligible.

name: IT Saksham Yuva Scheme
description: The Haryana Government is to provide employment opportunities to youths (graduate/post-graduate applicants) from engineering and IT backgrounds who shall undertake the Haryana IT Program (specially designed short-term courses) for the duration of a minimum of 3 months offered.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Antyodaya Parivar Suraksha Yojana (DAYALU-II)
description: The aim of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to residents of Haryana in case of accidental death or permanent disability occurred due to stray cattle/animal such as such as cow, bull, oxen, donkey, dog bite, mule, nilgai and buffalo that roam freely.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Antyodaya Parivar Suraksha Yojana (DAYALU)
description: The objective of this scheme is to provide socio-financial security to eligible residents of Haryana. The scheme provides financial assistance in the event of death (natural/accidental) or permanent disability (caused by an accident) of a family member whose annual income is less than ₹1.80 lakh.

name: Scheme for Relief and Rehabilitation of Women Acid Victims
description: Under the scheme, the acid attack victim is entitled to receive 100% free medical treatment from government or government-approved hospitals. Additionally, an ad-hoc relief of ₹1.00 lakh is provided to the acid attack victim, which is later reimbursed by the Women and Child Development Department.

name: The Mizoram Provisional Employees Savings Scheme
description:
This scheme laid out to allow the members to make defined contribution towards planned savings thereby securing the future in the form of pension. This Scheme shall be compulsory for all Provisional Employees whose
engagement is duly approved by DP&AR and Finance Department, Government of Mizoram.

name: Death Assistance Scheme (BBOCWWB)
description: The "Death Assistance" scheme provides financial assistance to the legal heir in the case of natural death or accidental death of the registered worker. If the death occurs during a disaster and a grant has already been given by Disaster Management, only ₹1,00,000/- will be payable by the Board.

name: Consolidated Stipend Scheme for Scheduled Caste Students Pursuing Higher Education
description: The scheme was launched by the Department of Higher Education, Government of Haryana, on 1st July, 2008, with the aim of attracting SC students towards higher education. Under this scheme, SC students studying in Govt. Colleges will receive a stipend of ₹1,000 per month.

name: Antheyesthi Anudan Yojana
description: The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹5,000/- to NGOs for performing the last rites of any unclaimed or destitute person of any age/caste/class, who has died either naturally or due to an accident within Rajasthan or outside the state, provided that the cremation is conducted in Rajasthan.

name: Grant-in-Aid Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to the Mahila Mandals
description: "Grant-in-Aid Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to the Mahila Mandals" aims to provide financial assistance to Mahila Mandals for training and self-employment activities. The scheme benefits registered Mahila Mandals in Goa, encouraging women's socio-economic development.

name: Devnarayan Chhatra Cycle Scheme
description: The scheme provides free bicycles to girl students studying in Class 9 in government schools of Rajasthan who belong to the Special Backward Classes or specific communities such as Banjara, Baldia, Labana-Gadiya Lohar, Gadolia, Gujar Gurjar, Raiko, Rebari (Debasi).

name: One Time Settlement (O.T.S.) Scheme
description: "One Time Settlement (O.T.S.) Scheme" aims to recover outstanding electricity dues from defaulting consumers by offering a waiver of delayed payment charges. Beneficiaries can pay only the principal amount in a lump sum, applicable to consumers with arrears up to ₹20,000/- as of 31-3-2008.

name: Share Capital to Local Entrepreneurs and Self Employed Scheme, 2008
description: The "Share Capital to Local Entrepreneurs and Self Employed Scheme, 2008" aimed to encourage local youths to start income-generating activities and promote self-employment. The scheme provided financial support for individuals and groups, covering 50% of the project cost.

name: Ambedkar Fellowship Scheme
description: The objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to meritorious students from the Scheduled Caste category for research at the Ph.D. level. The selected students receive a monthly fellowship grant to support their research in specific subjects.

name: Grant to Jharkhand State Unaided Educational Institutions
description: The "Grant to Jharkhand State Unaided Educational Institutions" scheme by the Department of School Education and Literacy, Jharkhand Government provides financial assistance to unaided educational institutions for infrastructure and educational development.

description: The scheme "Scheme for Assistance to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME)" launched by the Industries and Mines Department aims to position Gujarat as a global business hub, promoting sustainable manufacturing, MSME growth, and export competitiveness.

description: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

description: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

name: Goa State Employment Subsidy Scheme for the Industries, 2008
description: "Goa State Employment Subsidy Scheme for the Industries, 2008" aimed to promote industrial growth, revive sick units, and provide employment to local youths. Additional subsidies and incentives were given to eligible manufacturing units, with a focus on local employment and industrial development.

name: Incentives to Women Entrepreneurs Scheme, 2008
description: "Incentives to Women Entrepreneurs Scheme, 2008" aimed to encourage women entrepreneurship and promote self-employment by providing additional incentives such as interest subsidies and preferential treatment under capital contribution schemes. The scheme benefited women-owned industrial units.

name: Free Books Scheme for Scheduled Caste Students Pursuing Higher Education
description: The scheme was launched by the Department of Higher Education, Govt. of Haryana, on 1st July, 2008, with the aim of attracting SC students towards higher education. Under this scheme, SC students studying in govt. colleges will receive ₹2,000/- per annum for purchasing books.

name: Interest Subsidy Scheme, 2008
description: "Interest Subsidy Scheme, 2008" boosted economic growth by providing interest subsidies to Micro and Small Enterprises. The scheme offered financial incentives to new enterprises, making their operations more viable and promoting industrial growth.

name: Haryana Gaurav Samman Scheme for Padma Awardees
description: The scheme seeks to honour the exceptional achievements of citizens of Haryana who have excelled in fields of sports, arts, literature, education, public affairs, social work, science, technology, medicine, industry and other domains of public life.

name: Goa State Export Market Development Scheme, 2008
description: The scheme "Goa State Export Market Development Scheme" encouraged Goan industries to improve export markets and support them in establishing their goods firmly in the export market. It provided interest-free loans up to ₹5,00,000/- for participating in exhibitions and market study tours abroad.

name: Financial Assistance to Widower and Unmarried Persons Scheme : For Unmarried
description: The aim of the scheme is to provide Social Security to Unmarried Persons who are unable to sustain themselves from their own sources and are in need of financial assistance from the State.

name: Financial Assistance to Widower and Unmarried Persons Scheme : For Widower
description: The aim of the scheme is to provide Social Security to Widowers who are unable to sustain themselves from their own sources and are in need of financial assistance from the State.

name: Incentives to Encourage Consumption of Local Raw Material Scheme, 2008
description: "Incentives to Encourage Consumption of Local Raw Material Scheme, 2008" promoted the use of local raw materials, supporting local manufacturers and village economies. It offered Sales Tax reimbursement and subsidies on power and water bills to eligible Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises.

name: Goa State Financial Incentives to the Industries for Certification and Patenting Scheme, 2008
description: "Goa State Financial Incentives to the Industries for Certification and Patenting Scheme" aimed to encourage industrial units to obtain certifications and patents for quality standards. It provided financial assistance up to ₹2,00,000/- to eligible industries and service sectors.

name: Artisan Promotion
description: The scheme "Artisan Promotion" by the DSFDC provides artisans with opportunities to participate in national fairs and exhibitions. It offers financial support for participation fees, lodging, boarding, and stipends, benefiting artisans from Scheduled Castes, Other Backward Classes, Minorities.

name: Big Loan Scheme
description: "Big Loan Scheme" aims to provide term loans up to ₹5,00,000/- for income-generating activities to eligible applicants from specific targets groups like SC, OBC, Minorities, Safai Karamcharis, and PwDs. The scheme is implemented by DSFDC in collaboration with National Apex Corporations.

name: Education Loan Scheme - Delhi
description: "Education Loan Scheme" provides financial assistance to the SC/ST/OBC/PwD students for pursuing professional and technical education in India and abroad, with loan limits of ₹7,50,000/- and ₹15,00,000/- respectively. Delhi residents with an annual family income below ₹5,00,000/- are eligible.

name: Transport Loan Scheme
description: "Transport Loan Scheme" aims to promote self-employment among target groups by providing term loans for Light Motor Vehicles. The scheme benefits Scheduled Castes, Other Backward Classes, Minorities, and Safai Karamcharis with financial assistance up to ₹5,00,000/-.

name: Dilli Swarojgar Yojna
description: "Dilli Swarojgar Yojna" provides loans up to ₹5,00,000/- at 6% interest for income-generating activities. The scheme targets individuals from SC, ST, OBC, and Minority communities. The loans are disbursed for activities such as vegetable/fruit/flower shops, dairy products, tailoring shops, etc.

name: Composite Loan Scheme
description: "Composite Loan Scheme" aims to provide need-based financial support to individuals from Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, Other Backward Classes, Minorities, and PwDs to help them pursue various income-generating activities. The scheme encourages self-employment and entrepreneurship.

name: Goa Mediclaim Scheme
description: “Goa Mediclaim Scheme” provides financial assistance to avail super-speciality treatments that are not available in the Government Hospitals of Goa, such as dialysis, plastic surgery, ICU care, angiography and angioplasty, open-heart surgery, kidney transplantation, neurosurgery, etc.

name: Disabled Marriage Incentive Scheme
description: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance for marriage with a view to social rehabilitation of persons with disabilities who do not fall under the category of income tax payers.

name: Jharkhand Mukhyamantri Shramik Yojana
description: The "Mukhyamantri Shramik Yojana" scheme by the Urban Development & Housing Department, Government of Jharkhand aims to provide guaranteed employment to unskilled urban workers. It offers up to 100 days of employment in urban development projects.

name: Integrated Fisheries Scheme
description: The "Integrated Fisheries Scheme" by the Fisheries Division, Government of Jharkhand, aims to promote fish-duck farming and increase fish farmers' income. The scheme provides financial assistance of up to 80% for eligible SC/ST/women beneficiaries and 70% for others.

name: Feed Based Fisheries Scheme
description: The "Feed Based Fisheries Scheme" by the Agriculture, Animal Husbandry & Cooperation Department, Government of Jharkhand aims to enhance fish production through feed-based fisheries. This scheme provides financial assistance to fish farmers in the form of grants for fish feed to improve production.

name: Rearing Pond Construction Scheme
description: The "Rearing Pond Construction Scheme" by the Department of Agriculture, Animal Husbandry, and Cooperation, Government of Jharkhand, aims to promote fish farming by providing financial aid for constructing rearing ponds. Beneficiaries receive up to 80% government assistance for Scheduled Castes (SC)

name: Fish Marketing Scheme
description: The scheme "Fish Marketing Scheme" by the Fisheries Division, Government of Jharkhand, provides financial support for fish marketing and transportation. Beneficiaries receive subsidies for four-wheeler transport vans and equipment for aquarium shops.

name: Fish Extension, Research, and Training Scheme
description: The Fish Extension, Research, and Training Scheme by the Department of Fisheries, Government of India aims to promote sustainable fishing practices and improve fish production. Through this scheme, financial and technical assistance are provided to fish farmers and others in the fisheries sector.

name: Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana: Financial Support to MSMEs in ZED Certification
description: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

description: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.

description: The scheme "Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Udyog Uday Yojana" aims to support SC/ST entrepreneurs and strengthen MSMEs, making them globally competitive.
