description: The scheme is implemented by the Higher Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh, offers financial support for PhD research work to SC/ST students. Eligible students receive ₹16,000/- per month, totaling ₹1,92,000/- per year, which is directly transferred to their bank accounts.

name: Sanskrit Scholarship
description: Under this scheme, students studying Sanskrit at various levels—Post Graduate (M.A. Classic), Acharya, Graduate (B.A. Classic), Shastri, Uttar Madhyama, Purva Madhyama, and Prathama—in any government or aided non-government college receive a monthly scholarship of ₹300/- for 10 months.

name: Matsya Pokhari Yojana
description: The "Machha Chasa Pain Nua Pokhari Khola Yojana (Matsya Pokhari Yojana)" aims to boost fish production in Odisha by creating new water bodies through pond excavation. It targets income generation & employment via freshwater aquaculture. Subsidies are available for pond areas between 0.2 to 2 hectare

name: Research Scholarship for Disabled Students
description: The scheme is implemented by the Higher Education Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to provide financial support for PhD research to differently-abled students. Eligible candidates receive ₹16,000/- per month, which is directly transferred to their bank accounts.

name: Subsistence and Transport Allowance to Disabled Students for Pursuing Education in Computer and Management
description: The scheme was implemented by Higher Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh, aims to provide incentives to disabled students. This scheme benefits students pursuing computer/management courses at government colleges, provided their annual parental/guardian income does not exceed ₹1.00 lakh.

name: KALIA Scholarship
description: The objective of the scheme is to extend financial assistance to the children of the beneficiaries under KALIA for pursuing Professional/Technical courses in the State of Odisha.

name: Distribution of Free Books and Stationery to SC/ST Students
description: Under this scheme, free books and stationery are provided to Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe students who are pursuing undergraduate and postgraduate courses at government colleges. Eligible students receive books worth ₹1,500/- and stationery worth ₹500/- per year.

name: Hostel Scheme for Disabled Students
description: The objective of the scheme is to provide hostel facilities to such disabled students who are taking admission in class 11th and above on a regular basis and in case hostel facilities are not available in the schools/colleges, by renting private buildings.

name: Supply Free Laptops to Visually Impaired Students Pursuing Higher Education
description: The 'Supply Free Laptops to Visually Impaired Students Pursuing Higher Education' scheme is under the Social Security and Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Department, Government of Odisha. The scheme aims to provide free laptops to visually impaired students pursuing courses.

name: Integrated Scholarship Scheme
description: This scheme offers scholarships for PhD, M.Phil., Postgraduate (qualification-based and qualification cum instrument-based), and sports, as well as merit-based scholarships for graduates, ranging from ₹300/- to ₹600/- per month.

name: Financial Assistance for the Education of Children of the Beneficiary (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
description: The “Financial Assistance for the Education of Children of the Beneficiary” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Odisha, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for education to the children of the registered member of the board for a period of one year or more.

name: Marriage Assistance (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
description: The “Marriage Assistance” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Odisha, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for marriage of self and for girl children (upto 2 children) of the registered female building workers.

name: Maternity Benefit (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
description: The “Maternity Benefit” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Odisha, is a welfare scheme that provides maternity benefits to the female beneficiaries subject to a maximum of two children who  are registered beneficiaries for a period of more than one year under the board.

name: Medical Expenses for Treatment of Major Ailments (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
description: The “Medical Expenses for Treatment of Major Ailments” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Odisha, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for the treatment of beneficiary or his/ her dependents suffering from major diseases.

name: Assistance in Case of Accidents (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
description: The “Assistance in Case of Accidents” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Odisha, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to the beneficiary in case of hospitalization and becoming disabled due to an accident.

name: Assistance for Funeral Expenses (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
description: The “Assistance for Funeral Expenses” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Odisha, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for funeral expenses to the nominees of a deceased registered member.

name: Death Benefit (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
description: The "Death Benefit'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour and Employment Department, Odisha, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to the nominee(s) of the beneficiary as death benefit.

name: Mukhyamantri Madad Yojana
description: Under this scheme, a Scheduled Tribe family receives 50kg of wheat or rice and cooking utensils from the Panchayat upon the birth of a child. In the event of a family member's death, the family is provided with 1 quintal of wheat or rice.

name: Mukhyamantri Baristha Bunakar and Karigara Sahayata Yojana
description: Mukhyamantri Baristha Bunakar and Karigara Sahayata Yojana is a welfare scheme initiated by the Handlooms, Textiles and Handicrafts Department, Government of Odisha to provide financial assistance to elderly individuals involved in weaving and craft work, who may face economic difficulties.

name: State Government ST Scholarship (Class 1 to 8)
description: The scheme was launched by the Tribal Affairs Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to give benefits for improving the educational status of scheduled tribe students. Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to Scheduled Tribe students in Classes 1 to 8.

name: Mukhyamantri Bayan Jyoti Yojana
description: The Scheme will be implemented "Mukhyarrantri Bayan Jyoti Yojana" (MBJY) under Chief Minister's Special Package for Handloom weavers.

name: Kanya Saksharta Protsahan Yojana (For Scheduled Caste Girls)
description: Under this scheme, Scheduled Caste girls who pass the Class 10th and enroll in the Class 11th at a government or recognized institution and study regularly are given an incentive of ₹3,000/- per year.

name: Encouragement Scheme for Taking Admission in Science and Contemporary Subjects
description: This scheme provides scholarships to Scheduled Tribe students who have passed Class 10 and enrolled in Class 11 Science stream, and to those who have passed Class 12 and enrolled in a B.Sc. course in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, or Biology.

name: State Government ST Scholarship (Class 9 to 10)
description: The scheme was launched by the Tribal Affairs Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to encourage education among Scheduled Tribe students and improve their educational status. This scheme provides scholarships to Scheduled Tribe students in Classes 9 and 10.

name: State Marriage Assistance Scheme
description: The 'State Marriage Assistance Scheme' offers one-time financial aid to female beneficiaries from families holding AAY or PHH ration cards, with the amount directly credited to their Aadhaar-linked bank accounts. Additionally, divyangjan beneficiaries also receive financial assistance.

name: Dr. Bhim Rao Ambedkar Meritorious Student Award Scheme
description: This scheme awards special prizes to meritorious Scheduled Caste students who secure the highest marks in the Class 10th and 12th board examinations conducted by the Board of Secondary Education, CBSE, and ICSE in the state.

name: International Centre for Environment Audit and Sustainable Development (iCED)
description: The "International Centre for Environment Audit and Sustainable Development (iCED)" scheme provides a platform to young students pursuing courses in Ocean Science, Environmental Science, Environment Management, Environment Audit, etc. to help develop awareness about the work of iCED with special.

name: Hostel Facility for Students Availing Education in Delhi
description: The objective of the scheme is to provide facilities for residential and other facilities such as water, reimbursement of electricity expenditure, scholarship etc. for scheduled caste students of Madhya Pradesh studying in higher institutions located in Delhi.

name: Digital J&K Internship Scheme
description: The "Digital J&K Internship Scheme" is an opportunity for the students to secure first-hand and practical work experience. It also aims at active participation in the learning process through experimentation and putting into practice the knowledge acquired in the studies.

name: Mukhyamantri Samekit Chaur Vikas Yojana
description: The "Mukhyamantri Samekit Chaur Vikas Yojana" under Seven Nishchay-2, aims to develop undeveloped and unutilized private land in Bihar for fish-based integrated aquaculture. With a budget of ₹2972.79 lakh, the scheme targets the sustainable development of 600 hectares of Chaur land, enhancing fish.

name: Pathari Kshetr Talab Nirman Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana
description: The "Pathari Kshetr Talab Nirman Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana" aims to promote fisheries by constructing ponds and setting up related supporting units in plateau-dominated districts. The initiative is designed to create new employment opportunities and provide a means of livelihood for farmers.

name: Niji Talabon Ka Jirnoddhar Ki Yojana
description: The government of Bihar launched the "Niji Talabon Ka Jirnoddhar Ki Yojana" scheme aims to enhance the water holding capacity of private ponds to boost fish productivity & production as well as provide benefits to private fish farmers through the expansion/renovation of their ponds.

name: Bhraman - Darshan Yojana
description: The "Bhraman-Darshan Yojana" was launched by the Animal and Fisheries Resources Department, Government of Bihar aims to educate fish farmers in Bihar about the latest fisheries techniques through organized excursions, enabling them to adopt and implement these technologies in their water source.....

name: Khule Jalsroto Mei Pen Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana
description: The "Khule Jalsroto Mei Pen Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana" objective of this scheme is to increase fish productivity and production through semi-intensive / intensive fisheries of large-scale available government wetland water sources (Man, Chaur and Lake etc.), strengthening aquaculture through

name: Pratibha Yojana
description: This scheme provides financial assistance to Scheduled Tribe students who have passed national competitive examinations such as JEE, NEET, CLAT, AIIMS, and NDA, and have taken admission in IIT, NIT, NLU, MBBS (government colleges located in Madhya Pradesh), AIIMS or NDA.

name: Student Welfare Scheme
description: The objective of the scheme is to provide assistance to economically weaker ST students to meet their emergency needs in special circumstances. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to ST students studying in Class 1 to 10 in cases of urgency or emergency.

name: Cycle Distribution Scheme
description: Under this scheme, tribal girl students in Class 11th who travel more than 2 km to reach school and did not receive a bicycle in Class 9th are given a cash amount equivalent to the cost of a bicycle.

name: Sudama Shishyavritti Scheme (Class 11th and 12th)
description: Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to students studying in Class 11 and Class 12 in government schools who reside in a hostel, have an annual family income of less than ₹1,00,000/-, and belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category.

name: Talab Matsyiki Vishesh Sahayata Yojana (Anusuchit Jaati/Janajati/Ati Pichhada)
description: The Bihar Government's Animal and Fisheries Resources Department has introduced the "Talab Matsyiki Vishesh Sahayata Yojana (Anusuchit Jaati/Janajati/Ati Pichhada)" aims to support fish farmers by providing financial and technical assistance for pond construction, installation of necessary equipment

name: State Government Backward Class Scholarship (Class 6 to 10)
description: The scheme is implemented by the School Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh, aims to ensure the continuity of education for students from the Backward Classes. Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to Backward Classes students studying in Classes 6 to 10.

name: Marketing Development Assistance Scheme
description: The Marketing Development Assistance (MDA) Scheme under the Overseas Promotion & Publicity (OPP) Scheme aims to support the promotion and marketing of Indian tourism in overseas markets.

name: Kanya Saksharta Protsahan Yojana
description: The scheme was launched by the Tribal Welfare Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh. The objective of the scheme is to motivate girls towards education. Under this scheme, girls in Class 11th who have passed their 10th class examination will receive ₹3,000/- per year as a monetary incentive.

name: Biju Patnaik Sports Award for Best Contribution to promotion of Sports and Games
description: The award is given the individuals who have substantially contributed in various ways such as Sports Administration & sports Support Staff (other than Coaches) and also to organizations that have substantially contributed by recruiting sportspersons, providing financial support to sportspersons etc.

name: Odisha State Treatment Fund
description: The Odisha State Treatment Fund will provide financial assistance for treatment of the poor patients suffering from life threatening disorders & diseases. The financial assistance will be released to the Medical Institutions where the patient undergoes treatment.

name: Biju Swasthya Kalyan Yojana
description: Biju Swasthya Kalyan Yojana (BSKY) has been launched by the Department of Health and Family Welfare, Government of Odisha as a path-breaking program to provide universal health coverage, with special emphasis on the health protection of vulnerable families and women.

name: Mamata Scheme
description: In order to improve the process in curbing the high rate of mortality and infant mortality rate, the Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Odisha introduced a scheme named "MAMATA" - a conditional cash transfer maternity benefit scheme.

name: Refund of Subscriptions for the Construction Workers
description: The “Refund of Subscriptions for the Construction Workers” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides reimbursement of the entire subscription, with 8% interest, to the beneficiary at age 60, after 3 years if they choose to leave the Board, or

name: Financial Assistance for Education of Self/ Children of Beneficiaries
description: The "Financial Assistance for Education of Self/ Children of Beneficiaries'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to the registered member or their children studying Higher Secondary and above.

name: Miscarriage Benefit
description: The "Miscarriage Benefit'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides financial benefits for miscarriage up to two times in a lifetime to the eligible female beneficiaries or the wives of male beneficiaries.

name: Medical Expenses-Treatment for Major Ailments Including Surgery
description: "Medical Expenses-Treatment for Major Ailments Including Surgery'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Dept.,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides medical expenses for the treatment of beneficiary or his/ her dependents suffering from Cancer, Heart disease, Kidney disease, T.B. etc.

name: Pension Benefit
description: The "Pension Benefit'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides a monthly pension after completion of 60 years to the eligible registered member.

name: Accidental Benefit
description: The "Accidental Benefit'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to the beneficiary in case of hospitalization and disability due to an accident.

name: Death Benefit
description: The "Death Benefit'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to the nominee(s) of the beneficiary as death benefit.

name: Maternity Benefit
description: The "Maternity Benefit'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides maternity benefits up to two times in a lifetime to the eligible female beneficiaries or the wives of male beneficiaries.

name: Cost of Hearing Aid for the Construction Workers
description: The “Cost of Hearing Aid for the Construction Workers” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides reimbursement for purchasing Hearing Aids to each registered beneficiary if required.

name: Cost of Spectacle for the Construction Workers
description: The “Cost of Spectacle for the Construction Workers” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides reimbursement for purchasing spectacle to each registered beneficiary if required.

name: Tool Purchase Grant for the Construction Workers
description: “Tool Purchase Grant for the Construction Workers” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Dep.t, West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides one time reimbursement to each registered beneficiary who is with the Board for a period of at least 6 months for purchasing tools for his profession.

name: Funeral Expenses for the Construction Workers
description: The “Funeral Expenses for the Construction Workers” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for funeral expenses to the nominees of a deceased registered member.

name: Mahatama Gandhi Bunkar Bima Yojana
description: The Scheme “Mahatama Gandhi Bunkar Bima Yojana” was launched during 2005-06 by Handlooms, Textiles & Handicrafts Dept. of Govt. of Odisha to provide enhanced insurance cover to the handloom weavers in the case of natural as well as accidental death and in cases of total or partial disability.

name: Integrated Social Security Scheme: Pension to Physically Challenged Persons
description: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹1,000/- is provided to poor physically handicapped persons (including those who are blind, deaf, or dumb) with a degree of disability 40% or above and having no source of income.

name: Integrated Social Security Scheme: Old Age Pension
description: Under this scheme, pension is provided to old aged persons males (60 years & above) and females (55 and above) and who are destitute in the sense of having no means of subsistence from their own source of income or through financial support from family members or other sources.

name: Integrated Social Security Scheme: Pension for Women in Distress
description: The scheme is implemented by the Social and Tribal Welfare Department, Administration of Union Territory of Ladakh. Under this scheme, a financial assistance of ₹1,000/- per month is provided as a pension to destitute widows, divorced, or deserted women with no source of income.

name: Nirman Shramik Pucca Ghar Yojana
description: Labour and ESI Department, Government of Odisha has introduced a scheme "Nirman Shramik Pucca Ghar Yojana (NSPGY)" to meet the housing needs of the building and other construction workers in rural areas, registered under the Odisha Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (OB&OCWWB).

name: State Government SC Scholarship (Class 1 to 10)
description: The scheme was launched by School Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh, aims to improve educational status of SC students by providing scholarships. Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to SC girl students in Classes 1 to 5,and to both boys & girls in SC category in Classes 6 to 10.

name: Education Development Scholarship for Single Girl Child
description: The scheme was launched by School Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh to ensure continuity of education for girl students who are the only daughters of their parents. Under this scheme, eligible girl students who are only child of their parents receive a scholarship of ₹5,000/- per year.

name: Biju Patnaik Sports Award for Excellence in Sports Journalism
description: The award is given to the journalists who have done significant work in the sphere of journalism for the promotion and popularization of sports and games as well as fighting for the causes of sports and sportspersons in the State of Odisha.

name: General Poor Class Scholarship (Class 6 to 8)
description: Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to students studying in Classes 6 to 8 in government schools. Students whose annual family income is less than ₹1,00,000/- and who belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category are eligible for the benefits.

name: Banishree Scholarship
description: "Banishree Scholarship" Scheme was introduced by the Social Security and Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Department, Government of Odisha with the aim to assist and encourage them to study as well acquire technical/ professional/ vocational training.

name: Award Of Incentive For Marriage Between Persons With Benchmark Disabilities & Other Person
description: This scheme was introduced in 2018 by the Department of Social Security & Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Government of Odisha. The scheme's goal is to help people with disabilities live normal and dignified lives and to encourage others to marry people with disabilities.

name: Scholarship for Fatherless Girls
description: The objective of this scheme is to support the education of girls who have lost their fathers and are studying in government schools. Under this scheme, scholarships ranging from ₹350/- to ₹450/- are provided to eligible girls from Class 1 to Class 12.

name: Scholarship for Children of Deceased/Disabled/Retired Government Employees
description: The objective of this scheme is to motivate children of government employees who are deceased, retired, or disabled. Under this scheme, scholarships ranging from ₹50/- to ₹250/- are provided to children of these government employees who are studying in Class 1 to Class 12 in government schools.

name: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Meritorious Students Incentive Scheme (Class 12th Passed)
description: The objective of the scheme is to motivate students from the lower economic backgrounds & support them economically. Under this scheme, cash award of ₹5,000/- is given to the students who have obtained the highest marks in the 12th class examination in government schools within their district.

name: Sudama Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme (Class 9th to 10th)
description: Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to students studying in Class 9 and Class 10 in government schools, whose annual family income is less than ₹1,00,000/- and who belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category.

name: Swami Vivekananda Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme (Class 11th & 12th)
description: Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to students studying in Class 11 and Class 12 in government schools, whose annual family income is less than ₹1,00,000/- and who belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category.

name: Chief Minister Higher Education Encouragement Scholarship Scheme
description: Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to encourage meritorious students pursuing graduation or post-graduation in government colleges. The scheme started with the distribution of scholarships to students enrolled in the 2023-24 academic session.

name: Mukhyamantri Anusuchit Jati Evam Anusuchit Janjati Chhatrawas Anudan Yojana
description: The “Mukhyamantri Anusoochit Jaati Evam Anusoochit Janajati Chhatrawas Anudan Yojana” was launched by the SC and ST Welfare Department, Government of Bihar aims to provide financial assistance in every month to the students studying in Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe hostels.

name: IMA Nongthangleima Yaipha Tengbang Scheme
description: The "Ima Nongthangleima Yaipha Tengbang Scheme" provides support to approximately 4 lakh women in Manipur who are above the age of 40 years. The scheme aims to empower these women by offering crucial financial assistance, thereby aiding them in pursuing diverse livelihood options.

name: Poshan Aahaar- Madhya Pradesh
description: The scheme was implemented by the Women and Child Development Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. Under this scheme, children from 6 months to 6 years, pregnant women, and malnourished children are given nutritious food through Anganwadis.

name: Scheme for Supportive Money to the Parents of Transgender Children
description: The "Scheme for Supportive Money to the Parents of Transgender Children" aims to provide financial assistance of ₹1,000/- to the parents of transgender children. Transgender persons face stigma and discrimination in almost every sphere of their life including within the group, health facilities.

name: Scheme for Celebration of Birth/death Anniversary of Eminent Personalities
description: The "Scheme for Celebration of Birth/Death Anniversary of Eminent Personalities" scheme aims to provide financial assistance for the celebration of anniversaries/Jayanti's of Sant Kabir, Sant Gadge, and Sant Durbalnath and in addition to Anniversaries of DR. B.R. Ambedkar, etc.

name: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Sashaktikaran Yojana
description: Under this scheme, permanent training will be provided for the economic and social upliftment of women suffering from any form of violence and living in difficult circumstances so that they can get employment.

name: Marriage Grant for the Marriage of Daughters of Widows of Ex-servicemen (other than War Widows)
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹11,000/- is provided to the widows of ex-servicemen (other than war widows) for the marriage of their daughters, for up to two daughters who are at least 18 years old.

name: Marriage Grant to War Widows’ Daughters of Ex-Servicemen
description: The scheme is implemented by the Sainik and Ardh Sainik Welfare Department, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹21,000/- is provided to the war widows for marriage of their dependent daughters, for up to two daughters who are at least 18 years old.

name: Marriage Grant for the Marriage of the Daughter of War Disabled Ex-Servicemen above 50% Disability
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹21,000/- is provided for the marriage of each dependent daughter of war-disabled ex-servicemen whose disability has been assessed above 50%, for up to two daughters who are at least 18 years old.

name: Marriage Grant to Orphan Daughter of Ex-Servicemen
description: The scheme is implemented by the Sainik and Ardh Sainik Welfare Department, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹51,000 is provided for the marriage of each dependent orphan daughter of an ex-serviceman, for up to two daughters, who are at least 18 years old.

name: Swaran Jayanti Ashray Yojana - Himachal Pradesh
description: The "Swaran Jayanti Ashray Yojana" was launched by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of Himachal Pradesh aims to provide financial assistance for the construction of houses who are permanent residents of Himachal Pradesh belonging to Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, OBC

name: Indira Gandhi Pyari Behna Sukh-Samman Nidhi Yojana
description: The "Indira Gandhi Pyari Behna Sukh-Samman Nidhi Yojana" is an initiative by the Himachal Pradesh government. The scheme recognizes the significant contributions of women in household work, cultural preservation, and family economy by providing a monthly assistance.

name: Mukhyamantri Vidwa Evam Ekal Naari Awas Yojana
description: The "Mukhyamantri Vidwa Evam Ekal Naari Awas Yojana" was launched by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of Himachal Pradesh. The scheme aims to provide financial grants for the construction of houses to economically weak widows and single women.

name: Chanakya Swayam Upadhi Scheme for Micro Entrepreneurship - Transport Operator
description: The "Chanakya Swayam Upadhi Scheme for Micro Entrepreneurship - Transport Operator" provides subsidies for the purchase of Four-wheelers to unemployed youth for their livelihood. This scheme is applicable for economically weak Brahmins of Andhra Pradesh, who want to settle as transport operators.

name: Bharati Scheme for Education - Post-Graduation
description: The "Bharati Scheme for Education - Post-Graduation (Any course of 2 Years or more duration, after Graduation (10+2+3) will be considered under this category, i.e., M.Sc, M.Com, M.A., M.Tech, M.D., M.Pharm, MBA, etc.)" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education.

name: Bharati Scheme for Education Professional Education Course - Chartered Accountancy Final
description: The "Bharati Scheme for Education Professional Education Course - Chartered Accountancy Final" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education. Under this scheme, financial assistance for the academic year will be granted to eligible poor Brahmin students.

name: Bharati Scheme for Education Professional Education Course - Chartered Accountancy Intern
description: The "Bharati Scheme for Education Professional Education Course - Chartered Accountancy Intern (IPCC)" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education. Under this scheme, financial assistance for the academic year will be granted to eligible poor Brahmin students.

name: Maintenance Of Pregnant Desi/Indigenous Cow/Buffalo Ration Scheme For BPL Families Belonging To Scheduled Caste (SC) Category
description: A scheme had been launched by the Department of Animal Husbandry, Government of Himachal Pradesh with the aim to provides a 50% subsidy on a balanced ration for pregnant cows or buffalo during the last trimester of pregnancy.

name: Maintenance Of Pregnant Desi Indigenous Cows Ration For BPL Families
description: The Department of Animal Husbandry, Government of Himachal Pradesh had introduced a scheme with the help of which balanced ration at the rate 3kg/day/cow or buffalo for maximum of two animals for three months during the last trimester of pregnancy at 50% subsidy.

name: Scheme Of Provision Of Subsidized Rams To Sheep Breeders
description: The Department of Animal Husbandry, Government of Himachal Pradesh has introduced a scheme named "Scheme of provision of subsidized Rams to Sheep Breeders"  to improve the Quality and Quantity of Wool being produced in the state.

name: Krishak Bakri Palan Yojna
description: The Department of Animal Husbandry, Government of Himachal Pradesh has introduced a scheme named "Krishak Bakri Palan Yojna" with the aim to increase income generation opportunities for economically weaker segments of the society as well as to increase meat production.

name: Indira Gandhi Utkrisht Chattervriti Yojana
description: A merit-based scholarship scheme of ₹18,000 per annum by the Department of Higher Education, Government of Himachal Pradesh will be awarded to 10 toppers each from Class 12 (Arts, Science, and Commerce) and from the merit list of B.A., B.Sc. and B.Com

name: Bharati Scheme for Master’s Degree Overseas
description: The "Bharati Scheme for Master’s Degree Overseas" aims to provide financial assistance to Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh, who secured admission for any master's degree course overseas in reputed institutions for the year or students pursuing part of their course abroad.

name: Bharati Scheme for Education - Professional Education Course
description: The "Bharati Scheme for Education - Professional Education Course" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education. Under this scheme, financial assistance for the academic year will be granted to eligible poor Brahmin student applicants.

name: Bharati Scheme for Education - Graduation
description: The "Bharati Scheme for Education - Graduation (Any regular course of 3 years duration after 10+2 will be considered under this category. i.e., B.A., B.Com, B.Sc., etc., including B.Ed.)" provides financial assistance to encourage Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education.

name: Bharati Scheme for Education - Intermediate or Equivalent
description: The "Bharati Scheme for Education - Intermediate or Equivalent (ITI, Polytechnic, D.Ed, TTC, D.Pharmacy, etc.)" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education. Under this scheme, financial assistance for the academic year will be granted to eligible poor Brahmin student.

name: Bharati Scheme for Education - 6th Class to 10th Class
description: "The Bharati Scheme for Education - 6th Class to 10th Class" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education. Under this scheme, financial assistance for the academic year will be granted to eligible poor Brahmin student applicants.

name: Bharati Scheme for Education - 1st Class to 5th Class
description: "The Bharati Scheme for Education - 1st Class to 5th Class" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education.  Under this scheme, financial assistance for the academic year will be granted to eligible poor Brahmin student applicants.

name: Financial Assistance to WW II Veteran and Widows of WW II Veterans
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹10,000/- per month shall be given to Ex-servicemen of the Pre-Independence Era (World War II Veterans) & their widows, who are not in receipt of any kind of pension/financial assistance either from any Department of Government of India/State Government.

name: Financial Assistance to Ex-Servicemen of and above the Age of 60 Years and their Widows
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹3,000/- per month is given to ex-servicemen & widows of ex-serviceman of & above age of 60 years, who are not in receipt of any kind of pension/financial assistance or maintenance allowance either from any Department of Government of India/State Government.

name: Financial Assistance to War Widows of Defence Forces
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹3,000/- per month shall be granted to War Widows of Defence Force Personnel’s (Army, Navy & Air Force) who were killed in action during declared war of 1962, 1965 & 1971 in addition to family pension already getting from Government of India.

name: Financial Assistance to Para/Tetra/Hemi Plegic Ex-Servicemen
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹3,000/- per month shall be granted to Paraplegic, Tetraplegic, and Hemiplegic Ex-Servicemen who are bonafide residents of Haryana State and are not in receipt of any kind of financial assistance from any department of the Haryana Government.

name: Jharkhand Krishi Rin Mafi Yojana
description: The objective of the scheme is to provide relief from the debt burden to short-term agricultural loan holders in the state. Under this scheme, outstanding loan amounts of up to ₹50,000/- in standard crop loan outstanding accounts as of 31st March 2020, will be waived.

name: Jharkhand Rajya Fasal Rahat Yojana
description: The scheme was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Animal Husbandry & Cooperative, Government of Jharkhand. This scheme is mainly to provide financial assistance to the farmers in the event of crop damage due to any natural calamity and natural accidents.

name: Post Matric Scholarship Scheme For The Students Belonging To Scheduled Tribe For Studies In India
description: This is a centrally sponsored scheme by the Ministry of Tribal Affairs, for the students of Scheduled Tribe (ST) for studies in India. This scheme is for pursuing higher education starting from class XI to Post Graduation courses in India.

name: Modular Employable Skills
description: The SDIS is a government initiative for improving employability through vocational training. It's a partnership between government and industry to provide skills development programs for early school dropouts and workers in unorganized sector.

name: Unemployment Allowance Scheme
description: The Department of Labour and Employment, Government of Himachal Pradesh introduced Unemployment Allowance Scheme to provide allowance to eligible educated unemployed youth of Himachal, to enable them to sustain themselves for a certain period.

name: Aswachh Dhandha Chhaatravrtti
description: The objective of the scheme is to motivate students from marginalized sections of society, whose parents are involved in unclean & hazardous occupations, to pursue their education. Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹1,850/- per annum is provided to students from Class 1 to Class 10.

name: Financial Assistance to Blind Ex-Servicemen
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹3,000/‐ per month shall be granted to those Permanent Blind Ex-servicemen who are bonafide resident of Haryana & are not in receipt of any kind of pension/financial assistance either from Haryana Govt. or any other Department of Govt. of India.

name: Financial Assistance to Disabled Ex-Servicemen
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹3,000/- per month shall be granted only to those Disabled Ex-Servicemen who are bonafide residents of Haryana State, who were discharged from the Armed Forces on medical grounds, and whose disability is not attributable to service.

name: Skill Development Allowance Scheme
description: The Department of Labour & Employment, Government of Himachal Pradesh introduced a scheme of granting Skill Development Allowance to the unemployed youth aims at providing allowance to educated unemployed persons for their Skill upgradation.

name: Micro Credit Finance (NSFDC)
description: The scheme is implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. Under this scheme, loans are provided to individuals from the SC community for units costing up to ₹1,40,000/- for income-generating activities.

name: Assistance to Voluntary Organizations Working for Welfare of OBCs
description: The "Assistance to Voluntary Organizations Working for Welfare of OBCs" scheme aims to involve the voluntary sector in improving the educational and socio-economic conditions of the target group i.e. OBCs to upgrade skills to enable them to start income-generating activities on their own.

name: Education Loan Scheme (NSFDC)
description: The scheme implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. Under this Scheme, loan is provided for pursuing full-time Professional/Technical courses in recognized institutions as one time assistance.

name: H.P. Swaran Jayanti Middle Merit Scholarship Scheme
description: The “H.P. Swaran Jayanti Middle Merit Scholarship Scheme” scheme was launched by the Department of Elementary Education, Government of Himachal Pradesh for students studying in Class V is meant to identify the talent and nurture it at an early stage.

name: Bhargava Matching Scheme
description: The "Bhargava Matching Scheme" aims to encourage Brahmin Community members who would like to contribute by creating permanent Assets or take up socially relevant activities for the community viz. Andhra Kesari Bhavan (Community Hall), Viswanadha Aarama Kshetram, Old Age Homes, Skill Development, etc

name: Kalyanamastu Pathakam Scheme - Andhra Pradesh
description: The "Kalyanamastu Pathakam Scheme - Andhra Pradesh" aims to encourage girls to marry the boys living in Andhra Pradesh who are getting their livelihood through Vaidikam, a one-time financial assistance of ₹75,000/- will be granted. In order to encourage Vedic culture as well.

name: Garuda Scheme for Funeral Expense
description: The "Garuda Scheme for Funeral Expenses" aims to provide financial assistance for funeral expenses of a deceased Brahmin in their family, where the family has no other means to meet the same. This scheme covers Andhra Pradesh all 13 districts, to meet the funeral expenses of the deceased Brahmi.

name: Kashyapa Scheme for Food & Shelter
description: The "Kashyapa Scheme for Food & Shelter" aims to help poor, orphan children, differently-abled individuals, widows, destitute women separated from their husbands, and elderly Brahmins with financial assistance for meeting their food and shelter expenses. This scheme covers 13 districts of the state.

name: Veda Vyasa Scheme for Vedic Education
description: Andhra Pradesh Brahmin Welfare Corporation launched the “Veda Vyasa Scheme for Vedic Education” for the year 2019-20, to encourage Vedic Education in Andhra Pradesh.  Under this scheme, selected applicants will be granted Annual Financial Assistance.

name: Mukhya Mantri Gyandeep Yojna
description: A scheme to provide financial support in the form of interest subsidy on Educational Loans availed from Banks by Himachali Students for pursuing Higher Education in India and Abroad.

name: Financial Assistance to Orphan Children of Ex-Servicemen
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹3,000/‐ per month shall be granted to those Orphan Children of Ex-Servicemen only who are bonafide resident of the Haryana State and are not in receipt of any kind of financial assistance from any Department of Haryana Government.

name: Ex-Gratia Grant for Disability to CAPF Personnel
description: Under the scheme, ex-gratia grant will be given to those personnel of the CAPF hailing from Haryana who get disabled for life and are boarded out of service due to disability declared as in war/operation, in operational area, terrorist activities and natural calamities etc.

name: Ex-Gratia Grant for Disability to Defence Forces Personnel
description: Under the scheme, the ex-gratia grant will be given to those personnel of the Defence Forces hailing from Haryana who get disabled for life and are boarded out of service due to disability declared as in war/operation, in operational area, terrorist activities & natural calamities, etc.

name: Gayathri Scheme for Academic Excellence
description: The "Gayathri Scheme for Academic Excellence" scheme aims to provide awards to the topper of the recognized and reputed School/ College/ Institute for his/her academic excellence in SSC/ Intermediate or equivalent/ Graduation/ Professional Education Course for the Academic year.

name: Buffalo Entrepreneurship Development Scheme
description: The "Buffalo Entrepreneurship Development Scheme" aims to enhance livestock productivity, especially among marginalized farmers in Odisha. This scheme seeks to address protein deficiency, boost nutritional status, & promote livelihood through dairy farming.

name: National Centre for Earth Science Studies Internship Scheme
description: The “National Centre for Earth Science Studies Internship” scheme by the Earth System Science Organization, Ministry of Earth Sciences, provides various opportunities for school as well as college students to familiarise and/or pursue research on different branches of earth sciences.

name: Permanent Disability/ Death Benefit for the Construction Workers
description: The "Permanent Disability/ Death Benefit for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides financial assistance is provided to the nominees/ dependents of a member, in case of his/her death or Permanent Disability.

name: Additional Pension to Widow of Ex-Serviceman having No Child
description: Under the scheme, an additional amount of ₹100/- per month, in addition to the pension amount, is provided to the widow of an ex-serviceman who dies while in service but not in any battle.

name: Additional Pension to 100% Disabled Ex-Serviceman having No Child
description: The scheme provides an additional amount of ₹100/- p.m., in addition to pension amount, to 100% disabled ex-servicemen who were members of Armed Forces & have been released from service due to 100% disability/permanent incapacity to work, provided disability or incapacity is attributable to service.

name: Additional Pension to 100% Disabled Ex-Serviceman having Children
description: The scheme provides an additional pension to 100% disabled ex-servicemen who were members of the Armed Forces & have been released from service due to 100% disability or permanent incapacity to work, provided the disability or incapacity is attributable to service.

name: Lakshmir Bhandar Scheme
description: The "Lakshmir Bhandar" scheme is a flagship program to provide financial assistance to women from economically weaker sections of society, for the empowerment of women in the age group of 25-60 years, and enrolled in ‘Swasthya Sathi’.

name: The West Bengal Incentive Scheme: Waiver of Electricity Duty
description: “Waiver of Electricity Duty” incentives under “The West Bengal Incentive Scheme” scheme implemented by the Dept. of Tourism, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide waiver of electricity duty on the electricity consumed in its approved project.

name: The West Bengal Incentive Scheme: Additional Incentive on Generation of Employment
description: “Additional Incentive on Generation of Employment” incentives under “The West Bengal Incentive Scheme” scheme by the Dept. of Tourism, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement of expenditure incurred for paying contribution towards ESI and EPF.

name: The West Bengal Incentive Scheme: Additional Incentive for Adventure Tour Operators
description: “Additional Incentive for Adventure Tour Operators” incentives under the “WBIS” scheme by the Dept. of Tourism, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement incentives with SGST payments for purchasing tents, dinghies, adventure & sports equipment, and related accessories.

name: The West Bengal Incentive Scheme: Reimbursement of Stamp Duty and Registration Fee
description: “Reimbursement of Stamp Duty and Registration Fee” incentives under the “WBIS” scheme implemented by the Dept. of Tourism, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide a reimbursement of stamp duty and registration fee paid by the eligible units for the purpose of registration of documents.

name: The West Bengal Incentive Scheme: Interest Subsidy on Term Loan
description: “Interest Subsidy on Term Loan” incentives under “The West Bengal Incentive Scheme” scheme by the Dept. of Tourism, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide Interest Subsidy on annual interest liability on the Term Loan borrowed from a Bank to an approved project of an eligible unit.

name: The West Bengal Incentive Scheme: Subsidy for Quality Improvement
description: “Subsidy for Quality Improvement” incentives under the “WBIS” scheme aims to provide a reimbursement for the fixed capital investment expenditure incurred for quality improvement, modernization and installation of pollution control devices and for obtaining ISI/BIS/ISO certification.

name: The West Bengal Incentive Scheme: State Capital Investment Subsidy
description: “State Capital Investment Subsidy” incentives under “The West Bengal Incentive Scheme” scheme implemented by the Dept. of Tourism, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide a State Capital Investment Subsidy of the fixed capital investment.

name: Funeral Assistance for the Construction Worker
description: The "Funeral Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides funeral assistance to the nominees/ dependents, in case of death of the registered member.

name: Maternity Assistance for the Construction Worker
description: The "Maternity Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides maternity benefits in the form of financial assistance to the eligible  registered women members of the board.

name: Medical Assistance for the Construction Worker
description: The "Medical Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides medical expenses for the treatment of the registered beneficiary and /or his dependents.

name: Pension Benefit for the Construction Worker
description: The "Pension Benefit for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides pension to the registered beneficiaries of the Board who have completed the age of 60 years.

name: Marriage Assistance for the Construction Workers
description: The "Marriage Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides Marriage benefits in the form of financial assistance to the eligible registered women members & their immediate dependents of the board.

name: Partial Disability Benefit for the Construction Workers
description: The "Partial Disability Benefit for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides financial assistance is provided to the nominees/ dependents of a member, in case of his/her partial disability.

name: Internship Scheme
description: The aim of this scheme is to allow short-term exposure to youth about working of the different sections of the Department of Forests and Wildlife, GNCTD as ‘Interns’.

name: Saksham Yuva Scheme
description: The scheme “Saksham Yuva Scheme” was launched by the Employment Department, Government of Haryana on 1st November, 2016 on the occasion of Haryana Swarn Jyanti to provide unemployment allowance & honorarium to the eligible post-graduate youth of Haryana.

name: Sanctioning of M.C.R. Chappals to Senior Citizens
description: The "Sanctioning of M.C.R. Chappals to Senior Citizens" scheme aims to provide M.C.R. (Micro Cellular Rubber) chappals to senior citizens. This initiative ensures that eligible senior citizens receive the necessary support to improve their comfort and mobility.

name: Sanctioning Spectacles to Senior Citizens
description: The "Sanctioning Spectacles to Senior Citizens" scheme aims to provide spectacles to senior citizens. This initiative ensures that eligible senior citizens receive the necessary support to improve their vision and enhance their quality of life.

name: Dairy Farming Scheme (HSFDC)
description: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from Below Poverty Line (BPL) families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural and urban areas for self-employment income generating activities such as dairy farming.

name: Poultry Farming Scheme (HSFDC)
description: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from Below Poverty Line (BPL) families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural and urban areas for self-employment income generating activities such as poultry farming.

name: Sheep Rearing Scheme (HSFDC)
description: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from Below Poverty Line (BPL) families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural and urban areas for self-employment income generating activities such as sheep rearing.

name: Piggery Farming Scheme (HSFDC)
description: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from Below Poverty Line (BPL) families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural and urban areas for self-employment income-generating activities such as piggery farming.

name: Jhota Buggi/Camel/Mule Cart Scheme (HSFDC)
description: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans to individuals from Below Poverty Line (BPL) families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural and urban areas for purchasing animal-driven carts such as Jhota Buggis, camel carts, and mule carts.

name: Industrial Sector Scheme (HSFDC)
description: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from BPL families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural & urban areas for various self-employment income-generating activities such as carpentry, leather and leather goods manufacturing, etc.

name: Trade and Business Sector Scheme (HSFDC)
description: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from BPL families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural & urban areas for various self-employment income-generating activities such as running a stationery shop, kiryana shop, cloth shop, etc.

name: Professional and Self Employment Scheme (HSFDC)
description: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from BPL families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in rural & urban areas. These loans support self-employment activities in fields such as legal profession, Chartered Accountancy, medical practice etc.

name: Dwarf Pension Scheme
description: The Department of Social Welfare Department, Government of Uttarakhand introduced a scheme named "Dwarf Pension Scheme" to provide financial assistance to people suffering from dwarfism.

name: Mukhyamantri Udiyaman Khiladi Unnayan Yojana
description: Department of Sports, Government of Uttarakhand started a scheme named Mukhyamantri Udiyaman Khiladi Unnayan Yojana in 2022 for young budding children to encourage in Sports related activities.

name: Vice Chancellor Internship Scheme
description: The Vice Chancellor Internship Scheme (VCIS) by the University of Delhi aims to provide students with experiential learning opportunities, integrating academic knowledge with practical work experience. This initiative aligns with the objectives of "Samagra Shiksha" (holistic education) as outlined..

name: Mass Communication Internship Programme
description: The Mass Communication Internship Programme by the Department of Water Resources, River Development, and Ganga Rejuvenation. The intern program will offer work culture and environment knowledge about the functioning of the Government and its departments in information, education, and communication.

name: Comprehensive Educational Loan Scheme - Sikkim
description: The "Comprehensive Educational Loan Scheme" was launched by the Department of Personnel, and Reforms, Training, Public Grievances, Government of Sikkim. The scheme aims to provide loans free of interest for the duration of one particular course of study with one one-year moratorium period offered...

name: Chief Minister's Self Employment Scheme
description: The "Chief Minister's Self Employment Scheme" was launched by the Department of Personnel, and Reforms, Training, Public Grievances, Government of Sikkim. The scheme aims to provide loan to unemployed youth who belong below the poverty line.

name: Sikkim Grant of Scholarship to Students with Disabilities Scheme
description: The Government of Sikkim has introduced the Sikkim Grant of Scholarship to Students with Disabilities Scheme, 2014. This scheme aims to provide financial assistance to differently-abled students to help them secure academic education and technical or professional training.

name: Youth Hostel Scheme
description: The Youth Hostel Scheme is a joint venture of the Central and State Governments of India. It was launched in the early 1960s to promote youth travel within the country by providing low-cost budget accommodation and facilities to students and youth groups traveling on excursions or study tours.

name: Shilp Sampada Term Loan Scheme for Backward Classes- Haryana
description: The scheme provides loans of up to ₹10,00,000/- to artisans & handicraft persons from backward classes to preserve traditional arts and crafts. The scheme also offers training to upgrade their existing skills with the latest technological inputs, such as the use of computers, CAD, etc.

name: Term Loan under NSKFDC- Haryana
description: Under this scheme, loans are provided to Safai Karamcharis & their dependents for any viable income-generating activities with a maximum cost of up to ₹15,00,000/- per beneficiary. The beneficiary should be between 18 & 55 years of age and should be either Safai Karamchari or his/her dependent.

name: Mahila Adhikarita Yojana under NSKFDC- Haryana
description: Under this scheme, loan is provided to woman Safai Karamchari and their dependent daughters for projects with a maximum project cost of up to ₹2,00,000/- for small and petty trade/businesses, and various income-generating activities such as beauty parlors, boutiques, cosmetic shop, bangle shop, etc.

name: Micro Credit Finance under NSKFDC- Haryana
description: Under this scheme, loan is provided to Safai Karamchari and their dependents for projects with a maximum cost up to ₹1,00,000/- per beneficiaries for small and petty trade/business and various income generating activities.

name: Education Loan Scheme under NSKFDC- Haryana
description: This scheme offers educational loans of up to ₹10 lakhs for studies within India and up to ₹20 lakhs for studies abroad. These loans are available to eligible students pursuing regular full-time recognized professional/technical courses in India or abroad.

name: Good Samaritan Scheme
description: Launched on 3rd Oct 2021 by the MoRTH, the scheme grants an award to the good samaritan who has saved the life of a victim of a fatal accident (involving a motor vehicle) by administering immediate assistance and rushing to the Hospital/Trauma Care Centre within the Golden Hour of the accident.

name: Widow Daughter Marriage Scheme
description: Department of WCD, Delhi Government is implementing various Financial Assistance for the benefit of different sections through Financial Assistance Cell. Department of WCD is running Widow’s Daughter Marriage(WDM) for the benefit of widows/women in distress.

name: Education Loan Scheme under NSFDC- Haryana
description: This scheme offers educational loans of up to ₹10 lakhs for studies within India and up to ₹30 lakhs for studies abroad. These loans are available to eligible students pursuing regular full-time recognized courses in India or abroad.

name: Old Age Samman Allowance
description: "Old Age Samman Allowance" is a social security scheme implemented by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of Haryana. The scheme provides a pension of ₹ 3000/month to senior citizens (60 years of age or older) who are unable to sustain themselves with their own resource

name: Agricultural Activities for Persons with Disabilities
description: This scheme provides loans up to ₹10,00,000/- to the persons with disabilities for agricultural production, irrigation, horticulture, sericulture, the purchase of agricultural machinery and equipment for agricultural services, and the marketing of agricultural products etc.

name: Term Loan Scheme for Backward Classes
description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under this scheme, loans of up to ₹15,00,000/- are provided at an annual interest rate of 6% to 8% to individuals from the Backward Classes to enhance their employability.

name: Micro Finance Scheme- Credit Line 2 for Minority Community
description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes &d Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under the scheme, small loans of ₹1,50,000/- per beneficiary are provided to members of Self-Help Groups (SHGs), either directly or through the SHGs.

name: Term Loan Scheme- Credit Line 2 for Minority Community
description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes and Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under this scheme, loans of up to ₹30,00,000/- are provided at a concessional interest rate to individuals from minority communities to enhance their employability.

name: Kisan Pension Yojana
description: The Department of Social Welfare of Uttarakhand provides a pension to the old age farmers in the state, who have up to 2 hectares of land, cultivate their land, and are not receiving a pension from any other source.

name: Grant Scheme for Marriage of Daughters of Destitute Widow
description: “Grant Scheme for Marriage of Daughters of Destitute Widow” is a social security scheme by the Social Welfare Department, Government of Uttarakhand, that provides financial assistance to the destitute widows for the marriage of their daughters.

name: Term Loan Scheme- Credit Line 1 for Minority Community
description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes and Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under this scheme, loans of up to ₹20,00,000/- are provided at a concessional interest rate to individuals from minority communities to enhance their employability.

name: Divyang Pension Scheme
description: “Divyang Pension” scheme is a social security scheme by the Social Welfare Department, Government of Uttarakhand, that provides financial assistance to the specially abled people of the state.

name: Subsidy for Disabled Young Professionals
description: Under this scheme, loans up to ₹25,00,000/- are provided to professionally educated unemployed disabled youth who fall under the OH, VH, HH, or MR categories, at different interest rates ranging from 4.5% to 8% per annum.

name: Subsidy for Developing Business Premises for Persons with Disabilities
description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under this scheme, loans up to ₹3 lakh are provided to persons with disabilities to develop business premises on their own land & start self-employment activities.

name: Small Industries Unit for Persons with Disabilities
description: This scheme provides loan of up to ₹25 lakhs is provided to persons with disabilities for establishing small industrial units focused on manufacturing, fabrication, & production. Permanent residents of Haryana, aged 18 or older, with a disability of 40% or more, is eligible to avail the benefits.

name: Small Business in Service/Trading Sector for Persons with Disabilities (Divyangjan Swavalamban Yojana)
description: The scheme offers loans up to ₹50 lakhs for self-employment to disabled persons in sectors like Agriculture, Small Business/Artisan & Traditional Occupations, Transport & Service Sectors, etc. Eligible individuals can access loans with interest rates ranging from 5% to 9% per annum.

name: Saksham Scheme for Backward Classes
description: Under the scheme, loans of up to ₹10,00,000/- are provided to young professionals for setting up Doctors' Clinics, Nursing Homes, Physiotherapy Clinics, Bio-Medical Labs, Lawyers' Offices, Engineering Units, Chemist Shops, Architect Offices, and similar establishments.

name: Purchase of Vehicle for Commercial Hiring Purpose for Persons with Disabilities
description: Under the scheme, loans are provided to differently-abled persons for commercial hiring purposes up to ₹10.00 lakhs, and for the purchase of special category vehicles like JCBs, trucks, road rollers, etc., loans up to ₹25.00 lakhs are available.

name: Financial Assistive Devices for Persons with Disabilities
description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under the scheme, loans of up to ₹5 lakhs are provided to persons with disabilities who are either employed in reputable organizations or have received confirmed appointment letters.

name: Micro Finance Scheme- Credit Line 1 for Minority Community
description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes and Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under the scheme, small loans of ₹1,00,000/- are provided to members of SHGs, either directly or through the SHGs, to meet the needs of the poorest among the poor.

name: Education Loan Scheme- Credit Line 2 for Minority Community
description: The scheme is implemented by Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam, aims to provide education loans to sections of minority population on the basis of "Creamy Layer". These loans support pursuing general/professional/technical courses at graduate levels or higher.

name: Merit Cum Means Based Scholarship For Students Belonging To The Minority Communities
description: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Minority Affairs for students from minority communities pursuing technical and professional courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels in a listed institute. A total of 60,000 scholarships are targeted to be distributed as ‘Fresh’ Scholarships.

name: Education Loan for Persons with Disabilities- Haryana
description: Under this scheme, education loans of up to ₹50 lakhs are provided to persons with disabilities (OH/VH/HH/MR) for pursuing professional and technical education both in India and abroad.

name: Mahila Samiriddhi Yojana for Backward Classes- Haryana
description: This scheme, implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes and Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam, provides loans up to ₹1,25,000/- per beneficiary exclusively to women entrepreneurs of the target group, either directly or through self-help groups.

name: Education Loan Scheme- Credit Line 1 for Minority Community
description: The scheme, implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes and Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam, provides education loans for pursuing general, professional, and technical courses or training at the graduate and higher levels to minority communities as notified by the Government of India.

name: National Means-Cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme
description: A scholarship scheme by the Department of School Education & Literacy, Ministry of Education wherein 1,00,000 scholarships is offered to the gifted or meritorious students whose parental income is not more than ₹3,50,000/- per annum from all sources at the time of selection of awardees.

name: “Ishan Uday” Special Scholarship Scheme For North Eastern Region
description: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Education and the University Grants Commission. Taking special interest with regard to the promotion of higher education in the NER, i.e. for improving the GER, promoting higher education, and encouraging children belonging to the economically weaker sections.

name: National Scheme Of Incentive To Girls For Secondary Education
description: The National Scheme of Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education promotes the girl child's enrolment of 14-18 years age group at secondary stage, who passes class 8th and subsequently drops out for various socio-economic reasons.

name: Lakshmi Bai Samajik Suraksha Pension Yojana
description: Lakshmi Bai Social Security Scheme has been launched by the Bihar government for the widow women of the state.

name: Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme
description: The Bihar Government launched the Bihar Student Credit Card (BSCC) scheme to provide financial aid to applicants to complete their higher education.

name: Mukhyamantri Prakhand Parivahan Yojana
description: "Mukhyamantri Prakhand Parivahan Yojana" to provide transportation facilities connecting blocks & remote Panchayats with district headquarters. This scheme aims to encourage scheduled castes, scheduled tribes, backward classes entrepreneurship by providing financial support to purchase buses.

name: Bihar State Journalist Insurance Scheme
description: The Bihar State Journalist Insurance Scheme, 2014, is launched by the Information & Public Relations Department, Government of Bihar. It aims to provide financial benefits & facilities under a group mediclaim & personal accident insurance scheme to working media representatives in the state of Bihar

name: Scheme for Establishment of Hi-Tech and Mini Dairy Units
description: Under this scheme, unemployed persons will be assisted by way of providing financial assistance in form of subsidy for establishing dairy units of 4, 10, 20 & 50 milch animals like buffaloes, indigenous cows (Hariana, Sahiwal, Belahi, Red Sindhi, Tharparkar and Gir breeds only) and crossbred cows.

name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Diploma)
description: A scholarship scheme by AICTE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical diploma course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for a period of max. of 3 years for first-year students and a max. of 2 years for second-year admitted students (later entry).

name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Degree)
description: A scholarship scheme by MoE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical degree course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for max. 4 years for first-year admitted students and max. 3 years for second-year admitted students through lateral entry.

name: Scheme for Establishment of Hi-Tech and Mini Dairy Units under Mukhya Mantri Antyodaya Parivaar Utthan Yojana
description: Under this scheme, a resident of Haryana who is between 18 and 60 years of age can avail a 25% subsidy on the cost of two milch animals. The subsidy can be availed as a loan for the purchase of these milch animals by the beneficiary for the establishment of dairy units with two milch animals.

name: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities by Establishing Piggery, Sheep and Goat Units (General) under Mukhya Mantri Antyodaya Parivaar Utthan Yojana
description: Under this scheme, an unemployed resident of Haryana who is between 18 and 60 years of age can avail a 25% subsidy on the cost of livestock, provided they have taken a loan for establishing a 10+1 Piggery unit or a 15+1 Sheep/Goat unit.

name: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities to Scheduled Castes by Establishing Livestock Units under Mukhya Mantri Antyodaya Parivaar Utthan Yojana
description: Under the scheme, an unemployed resident of Haryana belonging to the Scheduled Caste category can avail a subsidy for purchasing livestock. This subsidy will be provided after the establishment of the livestock units and can be availed as a loan by the beneficiary.

name: Scheme for Establishment of Backyard Poultry Units under Mukhya Mantri Antyodaya Parivaar Utthan Yojana
description: Under this scheme, 50 chicks of 10 days of age from the Government Hatchery Farm along with two feeders and two water drinkers are provided free of cost to each beneficiary family at their doorstep.

name: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities by Establishing Piggery, Sheep and Goat Units (General)
description: This scheme is a credit linked scheme with a primary objective of providing self-employment opportunities, the unemployed persons will be assisted by way of establishing Sheep or Goat Units (15 female+1 male) and Piggery Unit (10 female+1 male).

name: Scheme for Establishment of Backyard Poultry Units
description: The objective of the scheme is to improve the socio-economic and nutritional status of the poor families, small farmers and landless agricultural labourers and other economically weaker section of the society.

name: Scheme for Conservation and Development of Indigenous Cattle and Murrah Development
description: The scheme is implemented by the Department of Animal Husbandry & Dairying, Government of Haryana with the objective of encouraging the farmers for conservation and development of the indigenous breeds of cows and buffaloes.

name: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities to Scheduled Castes by Establishing Livestock Units
description: This is a credit-linked scheme with a primary objective of providing self-employment opportunities to Schedule castes, the unemployed persons will be assisted by way of establishing Dairy units, Piggery units, and Sheep/Goat units.

name: Mukhyamantri Tirth Yatra Yojana
description: Under this scheme, members of families with an annual income of less than ₹1.80 lakhs who are over 60 years of age will be taken for pilgrimages to Ayodhya, Varanasi, and other sacred places. The state government will bear all the expenses for their travel.

name: One Family One Job Scheme
description: The scheme is implemented by the Directorate of Employment, Government of Haryana on 1st December, 1992 in Haryana State. Eligible applicants can register their names under this scheme, making them eligible for all benefits provided by the Employment Department.

name: Unemployment Allowance for the Educated Unemployed Youth Scheme
description: The scheme was introduced on 01.11.1988 which provides monthly unemployment allowance to the educated unemployed youth registered with the Employment Exchanges in Haryana.

name: Mukhyamantri Divyangjan Sashaktikaran Chhatra Yojana
description: "Mukhyamantri Divyangjan Sashaktikaran Chhatra Yojana" aims to provide comprehensive support to the disabled community in Bihar. A significant component of this scheme involves the distribution of battery-operated tricycles to beneficiaries to enhance their mobility and independence.

name: Old Age Homes - Tamil Nadu
description: The "Old Age Homes" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. This scheme is to bring qualitative improvement in the living standards of old people of the state.

name: Nehru Child Literature Prize
description: The Arts and Culture Department of Puducherry launched the "Nehru Child Literature Prize" scheme for authors/writers. Financial assistance with a certificate will be provided for their contribution to children's literature books published in Tamil.

name: Award of Puduvai Kalaimamani
description: The "Award of Puduvai Kalaimamani" scheme was launched by the Arts and Culture Department, Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide prizes and awards to artists or authors/writers in the fields of Literature, Music, Dance, Drama, Painting and Sculpture, and Folk arts.

name: Awarding of Tamil Mamani, Telugu Ratna and Malayala Ratna
description: The Arts and Culture Department of Puducherry launched the "Awarding of Tamil Mamani, Telugu Ratna and Malayala Ratna" scheme with the aims to provide a cash award to the author/writer who have published books.

name: Pradhan Mantri Uchchatar Shiksha Protsahan (PM-USP) Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University students
description: A scholarship scheme by the Dept. of Higher Education to provide financial assistance to meritorious students from poor families to meet a part of their day-to-day expenses while pursuing higher studies. The scholarships are awarded on the basis of results of Higher Secondary / Class 12th Board Exam

name: The Lokpal of India Internship Scheme
description: The Lokpal of India launched the Internship Scheme for the interns to learn about the implementation of the Lokpal & Lokayuktas Act, the Prevention of Corruption Act, the Central Vigilance Commission Act, & they can contribute towards the effective functioning of the Lokpal of India with fresh ideas

name: Deen Dayal Divyangjan Pension Scheme - Assam
description: The scheme "Deen Dayal Divyangjan Pension Scheme" was launched during 2018-19 by Social Welfare Department, Assam. The objective of the scheme is to provide a monthly pension of ₹1,000/- to each differently-abled person for taking care of their health.

name: Chief Minister Divyangjan Empowerment Scheme (Sambal)
description: The State government of Bihar launched the "Chief Minister Divyangjan Empowerment Scheme (Sambal) " scheme with the aim of improving the lives of Disable persons. Financial assistance is provided by the government through these schemes.

name: Chief Minister Nari Shakti Yojana
description: The State government of Bihar Started the "Chief Minister Nari Shakti Yojana" scheme with the aim of improving the lives of Disable persons. Financial assistance is provided by the government through these schemes.

name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Vivah Yojana
description: The purpose of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to poor families at the time of marriage, To encourage, encourage girl education and prevent child marriage.

name: Old Age Home (Sahara)
description: This scheme is to bring qualitative improvement in the living standards of old people of the state. Establishment and expansion of rehabilitation programs/ services and capacity building for strengthening the delivery of rehabilitation programs and services.

name: Mukhyamantri Samajik Samrasta Antarjatiya Vivah Shagun Yojana
description: The scheme is implemented by Welfare of Scheduled Castes & Backward Classes Dept., Govt. of Haryana to promote communal harmony by encouraging inter-caste marriages. The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹2.5 lakhs to couple when a Non-Scheduled Caste boy or girl marries with a SC girl/boy.

name: Financial Assistance (Kanyadaan) on the Occasion of Marriage of Daughter- Haryana Silicosis Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹51,000/- is provided to workers suffering from silicosis, as confirmed by the Silicosis Diagnosis Board, Haryana, for the marriage of up to three of their daughters.

name: Financial Assistance for Education- Haryana Silicosis Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹5,000/- to ₹12,000/- per year is given to the children of workers who are suffering from silicosis as confirmed by the Silicosis Diagnosis Board, Haryana.

name: Family Pension- Haryana Silicosis Board
description: Under this scheme, after the death of the worker due to Silicosis, financial assistance of ₹3,500/- per month is provided to the spouse of the worker until he/she remains alive. In the case of an unmarried worker, the financial assistance is provided to his/her living parents.

name: Silicosis Rehabilitation Pension- Haryana Silicosis Board
description: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹4,000/- is given to the Silicosis-affected worker categorized as category (A, B, or C) according to the ILO Classification, until he/she remains alive.

name: Assistance on Death- Haryana Silicosis Board
description: Under this scheme, in case of death of the Silicosis victim, financial assistance of ₹1,00,000/- will be payable to the widow or widower if the deceased was married, or to his/her nominee in case deceased was unmarried.

name: Funeral Assistance- Haryana Silicosis Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹15,000/- is given to the dependent/nominee of a deceased worker, who was confirmed to have Silicosis by the Silicosis Diagnosis Board, Haryana, for performing the funerary rituals.

name: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: State Capital Investment Subsidy
