description: “State Capital Investment Subsidy” incentives under “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide subsidy of the fixed capital investment made for its approved project.

name: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Interest Subsidy on Term Loan
description: “Interest Subsidy on Term Loan” incentives under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide subsidy on annual interest liability on the Term Loan borrowed from a Bank to an approved project.

name: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Waiver of Electricity Duty
description: “Waiver of Electricity Duty” incentives under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement of electricity duty on the electricity consumed for the manufacturing activity.

name: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Subsidy for Energy Efficiency
description: “Subsidy for Energy Efficiency” incentives under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide a reimbursement for the cost of energy audit and installations for energy conservation as per energy audit.

name: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Subsidy for State Goods and Services Tax (SGST)
description: “Subsidy for State Goods and Services Tax (SGST)” incentive under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide refund of Net SGST paid to the Government of West Bengal for its approved project.

name: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Subsidy for Water Conservation/ Environment Compliance
description: “Subsidy for Water Conservation/ Environment Compliance” incentive under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement for expenditure incurred towards cost of captive sound pollution control devices.

name: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Subsidy on Stamp Duty and Registration Fees
description: “Subsidy on Stamp Duty and Registration Fees” incentives under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement for stamp duty and registration fee paid by it for the purpose of registration of documents.

name: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Subsidy for Patent Registration
description: “Subsidy for Patent Registration” incentive under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal,  aims to provide reimbursement of expenditure incurred by it for obtaining Patent Registration.

name: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Work Force Welfare Assistance
description: “Work Force Welfare Assistance” incentive under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal,  aims to provide reimbursement of expenditure incurred for paying contribution towards ESI and EPF.

name: Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector: Subsidy for Standard Quality Compliance
description: “Subsidy for Standard Quality Compliance” incentive under the “Incentive Scheme for MSMEs in Powerloom Sector” scheme by the Dept. of MSME & T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement of the expenditure incurred for obtaining certification from approved Institutions/ Research Labs.

name: Tholkappiar Award
description: The scheme "Tholkappiar Award" was launched by the Arts and Culture Department, Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to writers and authors for outstanding research publications in Tamil literature.

name: Rehabilitation Assistance- Haryana Silicosis Board
description: Under this scheme, silicosis-affected workers confirmed by the Silicosis Diagnosis Board will receive a one-time assistance of ₹5,00,000. If the worker dies before receiving the assistance, the amount will be payable to the widow or widower if married, or to one of the living parents if unmarried.

name: Scheme of Financial Assistance for Cultural Organization for Holding Conference, Seminar, Symposium, Exhibition, Festival, Competition etc.
description: The Arts and Culture Department launched the "Scheme of Financial Assistance for Cultural Organization for Holding Conference, Seminar, Symposium, Exhibition, Festival, Competition etc." The scheme aims to provide annual grant to the institution/organization organizing a seminar, symposium.

name: Maintenance Grant to Institutions and Organizations Engaged in Cultural Activities
description: The "Maintenance Grant to Institutions and Organizations Engaged in Cultural Activities" scheme was launched by the Arts and Culture Department, Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide a maintenance grant to the organizations engaged in cultural activities.

name: Scheme of Financial Assistance for Dance and Drama Troupes/Associations
description: The "Scheme of Financial Assistance for Dance and Drama Troupes/Associations" was launched by the Arts and Culture Department, Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide a grant for dance and drama troupes/associations.

name: Scheme of Financial Assistance for Publication of Manuscripts/Research Journals
description: The "Scheme of Financial Assistance for Publication of Manuscripts/Research Journals" was launched by the Arts and Culture Department of Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for publishing manuscripts/research journals.

name: West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Cremation
description: "West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Cremation" is a social welfare scheme by the West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Government of West Bengal, that provides an one time assistance to the nominee of the worker for cremation when the worker dies.

name: AlCTE - Distinguished Professional Scheme
description: AICTE-Distinguished Professionals Scheme has been launched by the All India Council for Technical Education, Ministry of Education to improve the quality of Technical Education in India by utilizing the expertise of Professionals, Emeritus professors & Eminent Personalities to share their knowledge.

name: Solar Energy Corporation of India (SECI) Internship
description: The SECI Internship Policy is designed to provide practical experience to students in the renewable energy sector. The program aims to give interns exposure to SECI's various divisions, helping them understand the renewable energy sector.

name: Financial Assistance to Indigent Tamil Scholars
description: The scheme "Financial Assistance to Indigent Tamil Scholars" was launched by the Arts & Culture Department, Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹1,500 per month to indigent artists aged 58 years & above & contribution to Tamil language & literature must be of significance.

name: Kamban Pugazh Literary Prize
description: The scheme "Kamban Pugazh Literary Prize" was launched by the Arts and Culture Department, Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide prizes of ₹10,000/- and 10 awards to the author in the field of novels, short stories, drama, poems & prose in Tamil.

name: Financial Assistance to Indigent Artistes
description: The scheme "Financial Assistance to Indigent Artistes" was launched by the Arts and Culture Department, Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹1,000/- per month to indigent artists aged 50 years and above and contributions to music, dance, drama, folk, painting, sculpture.

name: Himachal Pradesh Patrakar Kalyan Yojana
description: The scheme "Himachal Pradesh Patrakar Kalyan Yojana" was launched by the Director of Information and Public Relations Department, Govt. of Himachal Pradesh aims to provide financial assistance to the serving accredited journalists & retired accredited journalists in adverse situations as accident.

name: LLB Internship Programme
description: Department of Justice introduced an Internship Programme for young law students. The purpose is to well acquaint law students in the field of research & referencing work, in various specialized areas of justice delivery, such as Tele-Law, Nyaya Bandhu etc.

name: Financial Assistance to Persons Suffering from Rare Diseases
description: The scheme “Financial Assistance to Persons Suffering from Rare Diseases” was launched by Social Justice & Empowerment Department, Govt. of Haryana. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹3000/- per month will be provided to all persons of Haryana domicile, who are suffering from Rare Diseases.

name: Financial Assistance for Stage III & IV Cancer Patients
description: The scheme “Financial Assistance for Stage III & IV Cancer Patients” was launched by the Social Justice & Empowerment Department, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, a monthly financial assistance of ₹3,000/- will be provided to Stage III & IV cancer patients of Haryana from 01.01.2024.

name: Child Adoption - Tamil Nadu
description: The "Child Adoption - Tamil Nadu" scheme aims to provide a family for orphaned, abandoned, destitute and neglected children. According to Central Adoption Resource Authority (CARA), “adoption is a process by which a child who is abandoned/separated from biological parents, becomes the legitimate.

name: Mukhyamantri Pragatishil Pashupalak Protsahan Yojana
description: The "Mukhyamantri Pragatisheel Pashupalak Protsahan Yojana" is an initiative under the "Nand Baba Milk Mission" aimed to encourage the trend of rearing indigenous breed of cows with high quality and productivity in the state & motivate cattle farmers for breed improvement of cows, their better care.

name: Right To Information Fellowship
description: Under this scheme, DOPT proposes to offer four short-term fellowships to researchers from the field of media / Civil Society professionals / RTI Trainers to conduct field-based research on themes relating to RTI. It is hoped that the research output will enhance their understanding of the RTI Act.

name: Mukhyamantri Svadeshi Gau Samvardhan Yojana
description: The "Mukhyamantri Svadeshi Gau Samvardhan Yojana" under the "Nand Baba Milk Mission" aims to enhance milk productivity and per capita milk availability in Uttar Pradesh by encouraging the purchase of indigenous improved breed cows from outside the state and employment opportunities in rural areas.

name: Sathya Ammaiyar Ninaivu Government Children Homes
description: The "Sathya Ammaiyar Ninaivu Government Children Homes" was launched by the Social Welfare and Nutritious Meal Programme Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide education to destitute, deserted and abandoned children by giving free food, clothing, shelter and medical care.

name: Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme - II
description: The scheme "Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme - II" was launched by the Social Welfare and Nutritious Meal Programme Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to assist poor parents in getting their daughters married & to promote education status.

name: Destitute Agricultural Labourers Pension Scheme
description: The "Destitute Agricultural Labourers Pension Scheme" was launched by the Social Welfare and Nutritious Meal Programme Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to give pensions of ₹1,000/- to destitute agricultural labourers of 60 years and above and dhoti, saree supplied on festivals.

name: Destitute Differently Abled Pension Scheme
description: The "Destitute Differently Abled Pension Scheme" was launched by the Social Welfare and Nutritious Meal Programme Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to give a pension of ₹1,000/- to destitute differently-abled persons aged 45 years and above with disability level of 60% and above.

name: Free Supply of Note Books to the Children of Poor Widows
description: The Social Welfare and Nutritious Meal Programme Department, Government of Tamil Nadu launched the "Free Supply of Note Books to the Children of Poor Widows" scheme to supply notebooks to children of poor widows studying up to higher secondary courses and govt. children homes and service homes.

name: West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme: Power Subsidy
description: “Power Subsidy” incentives under “West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME&T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide power subsidy on electricity consumption for 5 years from the date of commencement of production.

name: West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme: State Capital Investment Subsidy
description: “State Capital Investment Subsidy” incentives under “West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME&T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide a State Capital Investment Subsidy of the fixed capital investment.

name: West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme: Waiver of Electricity Duty
description: “Waiver of Electricity Duty” incentives under “West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME&T, Government of West Bengal,  aims to provide waiver of electricity duty on the electricity consumed in its approved project.

name: West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme: Incentive for Energy Efficiency
description: “Incentive for Energy Efficiency” incentives under “West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME&T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide a reimbursement for the cost of energy and installations for energy conservation as per energy audit.

name: West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme: Reimbursement of Stamp Duty and Registration Fee
description: “Reimbursement of Stamp Duty and Registration Fee” incentives under “West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME&T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide a reimbursement of stamp duty and registration fee paid by the eligible textile sector enterprises for

name: West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme: Waiver of Fees for Land Conversion and Mutation
description: “Waiver of Fees for Land Conversion and Mutation” incentives under “West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme” scheme implemented by the Dept. of MSME&T, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide a waiver of fees for conversion and mutation of the land as approved in the project.

name: West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme: Subsidy for Water conservation/ Environment Compliance
description: “Subsidy for Water Conservation/ Environment Compliance” incentives under “West Bengal Textile Incentive Scheme” scheme by the Dept. of MSME&T , Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement of expenditure incurred by it towards the cost of captive Effluent Water Treatment Plant.

name: West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme: Facilitation Supports
description: “Facilitation Supports” is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme 2024”, implemented by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal. It aims to provide various types of facilitation support to the artisans and Industrial Cooperative Societies.

name: West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme: Support for Digital Marketing
description: “Support for Digital Marketing” is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme”, by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide access to digital markets and e-commerce to the artisans.

name: Monetary Relief to the Victim of Atrocities- Haryana
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance ranging from ₹85,000/- to ₹8,25,000/- is provided to the members of Scheduled Caste who become victims of atrocity by Non-Scheduled Caste persons for various acts like damage & loss of properties, grievous hurt, temporary/permanent incapacitation, Murder, etc.

name: Shilpi Samridhi Yojana
description: "Shilpi Samridhi Yojana" is an economic empowerment scheme by the Haryana Scheduled Castes Finance and Development Corporation, Govt of Haryana. Through this scheme, loans/benefits are provided to the families of the scheduled caste artisans to pursue various economic development activities.

name: Laghu Vyavassay Scheme
description: "Laghu Vyavassay Scheme" is an economic empowerment scheme by the Haryana Scheduled Castes Finance and Development Corporation, Govt of Haryana. In this scheme, loans are provided to individuals from Scheduled Castes for self-employment/ income-generating activities.

name: Mahila Kisan Yojana
description: The scheme "Mahila Kisan Yojana" is an economic empowerment scheme by the Scheduled Castes Finance and Development Corporation, Government of Haryana. Through this scheme, loans are provided to the women from Scheduled Castes for the betterment of their economic status through self-employment.

name: Financial Assistance for Professional/Technical Courses (HBOCWWB)
description: This scheme is implemented by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department Haryana. Under this scheme, the full educational expenses of the children of registered workers in professional/technical courses are reimbursed by the Board.

name: Medical Assistance/Wage Compensation during Illness (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, wage compensation or financial assistance is provided to registered workers if they are admitted to any government or empanelled private hospital for treatment for a minimum of 4 days and a maximum of 30 days.

name: Financial Assistance To Kashmiri Migrants Families Scheme
description: Through the “Financial Assistance To Kashmiri Migrants Families Scheme” by the Dept of Social Justice and Empowerment, Govt of Haryana, financial assistance of ₹1,250/- per month per family member is provided for five years to the Kashmiri families which have migrated from J&K to Haryana.

name: Financial Assistance To Women And Girl Acid Attack Victims
description: The scheme “Financial Assistance to Women and Girls Acid Attack Victims” by the Govt. of Haryana, provides financial assistance in the form of a monthly pension to the women/girls residing in Haryana who have suffered disfigurement of any part of the body or have become disabled due to acid attack.

name: Widow Pension (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹3,000/- is given to the widow of a registered construction worker who is not receiving a similar benefit from any other Government/ Department/ Board/ Corporation /PSU.

name: Financial Assistance for Hostel Facility in Professional/Technical Institutions (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, the Board provides financial assistance of up to ₹1,20,000/- to the children of construction workers for hostel facilities while they pursue technical/professional courses in recognized institutes.

name: Incentives for Meritorious Children (Students) of Workers (10th and 12th Class) (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, the scholarship (prize money) in the form of fixed deposit will be provided to meritorious children of construction workers who have achieved academic excellence in Class X/XII examination.

name: Supporting Community Radio Movement in India
description: The GOI has a policy for grant of License to eligible organisations for setting up of Community Radio Stations. To support the Sector, the Scheme provides financial assistance once the Community Radio is made operational by eligible organisation. The Scheme also has components for capacity building.

name: "Outstanding SC/ST Entrepreneur" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises”
description: "Outstanding SC/ST Entrepreneur" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises” is a scheme by the Industries and Commerce Dept, UT of Puducherry, formulated to award the best SC/ST entrepreneurs.

name: "Outstanding Entrepreneur" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises”
description: "Outstanding Entrepreneur" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises” is a scheme by the Industries and Commerce Dept, UT of Puducherry, formulated to award the best entrepreneurs.

name: "Subsidy to Pollution Control Equipment" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Capital Intensive Industries"
description: Through "Subsidy to Pollution Control Equipment", the units which are installing pollution control equipment will be granted subsidy @ 25% up to a max. of ₹5,00,000/-. The applications are accepted offline in the prescribed form available on the Official Website of the Department.

name: Financial Support Scheme
description: With a view to extend the benefits of equity and access to quality education to the economically weak students, the University has introduced a financial support scheme for such students which will include fee waiver of all components of fee paid by students (except examination fee & hostel fee).

name: Incentive for Purchase of Electric Scooter for the Daughter of a Registered Construction Worker (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, an incentive of ₹50,000/- or the actual ex-showroom price of electric scooter, whichever is lower, will be provided by the Board through e-RUPI to the daughter of a registered construction worker to facilitate her mobility while pursuing higher education.

name: West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024: Support for One Time Settlement (OTS) of NPA Accounts of PWCS
description: “Support for One Time Settlement (OTS) of NPA Accounts of PWCS" is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024” by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal aims to make PWCS debt free by providing financial support for OTS of NPA accounts.

name: West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme 2024: Grant to Industrial Cooperative Society
description: “Grant to Industrial Cooperative Society” is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme 2024”, by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal. It aims to create, support and sustain an enabling ecosystem for strengthening creativity and capacity of the artisans.

name: West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme 2024: Grant to Individual Artisans
description: “Grant to Individual Artisans” is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme 2024”, by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal, aims to create, support and sustain an enabling ecosystem for strengthening creativity and capacity of the artisans.

name: West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024: Assistance to Individual Handloom Weaver
description: “Assistance to Individual Handloom Weaver" is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024”, implemented by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal aims to  provide one-time financial assistance to the individual Handloom weavers.

name: West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024: Supply of Yarn to Societies etc. at Subsidized Rate
description: “Supply of Yarn to Societies etc. at Subsidized Rate" is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024”, by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal aims to  provide supply of subsidized yarn to the PWCS, Khadi Weavers' Societies etc.

name: West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024: Assistance to Viable and Potentially Viable PWCS
description: “Assistance to Viable and Potentially Viable PWCS" is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Handloom and Khadi Weavers Financial Benefit Scheme 2024”, by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal aims to provide financial assistance to the societies who will fulfill the criteria of viability.

name: Scheme of Death Benefit for Weavers & Artisans of West Bengal
description: "Scheme of Death Benefit for Weavers & Artisans of West Bengal" is a social welfare scheme implemented by the Department of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises and Textiles, Government of West Bengal aims to provide financial assistance to the family of the deceased weaver /artisan.

name: Journalists’ Family Benefit Fund
description: The Tamil Development, Religious Endowments, and Information Department scheme was launched by the "Journalists’ Family Benefit Fund". The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to families of journalists who died in harness with a minimum of 20 years of service as editor, sub-editor, reporter.

name: Pension Scheme for the Journalists
description: The "Pension Scheme for the Journalists" was launched by the Tamil Development, Religious Endowments, and Information Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to give a monthly pension to retired journalists.

name: Pension for Journalists’ Family
description: The "Pension for Journalists’ Family" was launched by the Tamil Development, Religious Endowments, and Information Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to give a monthly pension to the wife of a deceased journalist pensioner.

name: Financial Assistance for Purchasing School Uniforms, Books and Notebooks from Class 1st to 12th for Children of Workers- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, one-time financial assistance is provided to the children (2 boys & 3 girls) of workers employed in industrial and commercial establishments of the state of Haryana at the time of admission to continue their studies.

name: Scholarship Scheme for Worker's Children- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Labour Welfare Board, Labour Department, Government of Haryana. The objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to children of workers & workers employed in industrial and commercial institutions of Haryana state to continue their studies.

name: Assistance for Delivery of a Child or the Miscarriage of Pregnancy or the Termination of Pregnancy
description: The scheme "Assistance for Delivery of a Child or the Miscarriage of Pregnancy or the Termination of Pregnancy" was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to give financial assistance for the delivery of a child, miscarriage, or termination of pregnancy

name: Pension Scheme - Folk Artist
description: The "Pension Scheme" was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a pension to the registered folk artists.

name: Natural Death and Funeral Assistance
description: The Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu was launched the scheme "Natural Death and Funeral Assistance". This scheme provides financial assistance for the funeral and natural death of registered folk artistes to support their families during difficult times.

name: Education Assistance - Folk Artist
description: The "Education Assistance - Folk Artist" scheme was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme provides financial assistance for the education of children of registered folk artistes.

name: Bicycle Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹5,000/- is provided to the workers employed in the industrial and commercial establishments of the state of Haryana for the purchase of a new bicycle for commuting on duty from their residence to the establishments.

name: Assistance for Purchase of Spectacles - Folk Artists
description: The "Assistance for Purchase of Spectacles" scheme was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, the Tamil Nadu Folk Artiste's Welfare Board provides financial assistance for the purchase of spectacles to registered folk artists.

name: Leave Travel Concession Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, an amount of ₹1,500/- is provided to the workers employed in the industrial and commercial institutions of the state of Haryana in the form of Leave Travel Concession (LTC) for travel once in a block of 4 years.

name: Financial Assistance for Artificial Limbs to Workers and their Dependents- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided for artificial limbs upto rates fixed by Saket Hospital, Chandimandir(Panchkula). This assistance is available to workers employed in industrial &commercial units in Haryana and their dependents, who become disabled due to the loss of vital organs.

name: Mukhya Mantri Sharmik Surksha Yojana- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹5,00,000/- will be provided to the widows/dependents of workers employed in industrial and commercial institutions in Haryana, in the event of the worker's death while working at the workplace.

name: Financial Assistance of Hearing Machine/Hearing Aid to Workers and their Dependents- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹5,000/- or the actual cost of the hearing aid, whichever is less, is provided to workers employed in industrial and commercial establishments in the state of Haryana and their dependents for the purchase of a hearing aid machine.

name: Financial Assistance for Try Cycle to Workers and their Dependents - Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹7,000/- or the actual price, whichever is less, will be provided to workers and their dependents employed in industrial and commercial units of Haryana for purchasing a tricycle if they lose their legs in an accident or due to any other reason.

name: Financial Assistance in Marriage of Women Workers or Daughters of Workers- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹51,000/- is provided to workers employed in the industrial & commercial establishments of the state of Haryana for the marriage of their daughters and for the self-marriage of the working women workers as Kanyadaan.

name: Financial Assistance for Encouraging Worker's Children's Participation in Sports Activities- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to the children of the workers working in the industrial and commercial establishments of the state of Haryana for participating in sports competitions so that the children of the workers can also become good sportspersons.

name: Dental Care Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this Scheme, workers & their dependents are entitled to receive financial assistance of upto ₹4,000/- or the actual expenditure, whichever is less, for dental care. Furthermore, assistance of upto ₹10,000/- or the actual expenditure, whichever is less, is provided for fixation of full denture.

name: Spectacles Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of up to ₹1,500/- is provided to workers employed in the industrial and commercial establishments of the state of Haryana for the purchase of spectacles in case of visual impairment.

name: Sewing Machine Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹4,500/- is provided to women workers employed in Industrial and Commercial Establishments in the state of Haryana for the purchase of sewing machines for their domestic use.

name: Financial Assistance for Coaching- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: The objective of the scheme to provide financial assistance up to ₹20,000/- for coaching of entrance examinations for professional courses and ₹1,00,000/- to the children of workers for preparing for the main examination on passing the preliminary examination of UPSC and HPSC.

name: Financial Assistance for Encouraging Worker's Children's Participation in Cultural Activities- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to the children of the workers working in the industrial and commercial establishments of the state of Haryana for participating in cultural competitions so that the children of the workers can also become good artists.

name: Disability (Due to Accident or Other Reason) Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to workers employed in industrial and commercial establishments in Haryana based on their percentage of disability, whether the disability occurs due to an accident or other reasons inside or outside the workplace.

name: Financial Assistance to Workers with a Visually, Physically or Mentally Disabled Child- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to the disabled (blind, mentally retarded, mute and deaf) children of registered workers employed in industrial and commercial establishments in the state of Haryana.

name: Financial Assistance for Working Women Workers or Wives of Male Workers for Maternity- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹10,000/- is provided to female workers and wives of male workers working in industrial and commercial establishments in the state of Haryana for the delivery of up to two children (three girls or two boys).

name: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Subsidy for Work Force Welfare Assistance (WWAS)
description: “Subsidy for Work Force Welfare Assistance (WWAS)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement of expenditure incurred for paying contribution towards Employees State Insurance (ESI) and Employees Provident.

name: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Subsidy for State Goods and Services Tax (SGST)
description: “Subsidy for State Goods and Services Tax (SGST)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, aims to provide refunds for net SGST paid to the Government of West Bengal.

name: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Subsidy for Water Conservation/Environment Compliance (WCS)
description: “Subsidy for Water Conservation/Environment Compliance” incentives  by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement of expenditure incurred by it towards the cost of captive Effluent Water Treatment Plant for wastewater recycling and/ or other pollution control devices.

name: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Subsidy for Patent Registration (PRS)
description: “Subsidy for Patent Registration (PRS)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement of expenditure incurred for obtaining Patent Registration.

name: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Subsidy for Standard Quality Compliance (SCCS)
description: “Subsidy for Standard Quality Compliance (SCCS)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, aims to provide reimbursement of the expenditure incurred for obtaining certification from approved Institutions/ Research Laboratories.

name: Dhobhi Hetu Avashyak Upkaran Sahayata Yojana
description: The Labor Department of Chhattisgarh initiated this scheme on January 10, 2018, under the "Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board." This scheme aims to provide equipment support to dhobis.

name: Mukhyamantri Nirman Shramikon Ke Bachon Hetu Nihshulk Coaching Sahaayata Yojana
description: The Labor Department of Chhattisgarh started this scheme on March 1, 2023, under the "Building and Construction Workers Welfare Board." The scheme provides free coaching assistance for children of construction workers.

name: Minimata Mahtari Jatan Yojana
description: The Labor Department of Chhattisgarh started this scheme on March 4, 2010, under the "Building and Construction Workers Welfare Board" for female construction workers. Under the scheme registered female construction workers will receive benefits during pregnancy.

name: Financial Assistance to Widow/Dependent in case of Death of a Worker- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹2,00,000/- is given to the widow or dependent of the worker working in the industrial and commercial establishments of Haryana state in case of his death due to any reason.

name: Financial Assistance to Non Governmental Organisations
description: The "Financial Assistance to Non Governmental Organisations" scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to the NGO run a school for children with intellectual disability.

name: Early Intervention Centre for Children with Cerebral Palsy in SRTC, Chennai and Tiruchirapalli Districts
description: The "Early Intervention Centre for Children with Cerebral Palsy in SRTC, Chennai and Tiruchirapalli Districts" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, stimulation training is given to the children affected with cerebral palsy.

name: Early Intervention Centres for Children with Autism
description: The "Early Intervention Centres for Children with Autism" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, Early intervention programme emphasizes attending to social stimuli, imitation skills, language comprehension and usage.

name: Early Intervention Center for the Children with Intellectually Disabled
description: The "Early Intervention Center for the Children with Intellectually Disabled" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu.

name: Early Intervention Centre for the Visually Impaired
description: The "Early Intervention Centre for the Visually Impaired" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, visually impaired children are identified, assessed and prepared to join main stream education in 6 districts.

name: Old Age Pension
description: In 2010, the Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department of the West Bengal State Government introduced the "Old Age Pension" scheme.

name: Mukhya Mantri Shramyogi Prathibhavan Vidyarthi Yojana (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, the Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board provides financial assistance for books, stationery, hostels, and laptops/computers for higher education to the meritorious children of registered construction workers.

name: Financial Assistance for Self-Marriage of Registered Women Workers (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹50,000/- is provided to registered women workers for arranging their own marriage who have a minimum one-year regular membership.

name: Financial Support Scheme for Farm Mechanization (FSSM)
description: "Financial Support Scheme for Farm Mechanization (FSSM)" by the Agriculture Department, Government of West Bengal aims to provide financial support as subsidy to the small and marginal farmers of the State for purchase of power operated farm equipment/ machinery.

name: One Time Assistance to Small and Marginal Farmers for Purchase of Small Farm Implements (OTA-SFI)
description: “One Time Assistance to Small and Marginal Farmers for Purchase of Small Farm Implements (OTA-SFI)”  by the Agriculture Department, Government of West Bengal aims to aid the farmers in procuring manually operated small farm implements necessary for agricultural operations.

name: Farm Machinery Bank (FMB)/Farm Machinery Hub (FMH)
description: “Farm Machinery Bank (FMB)/Farm Machinery Hub (FMH)”  by the Agriculture Department, Government of West Bengal aims to facilitate end-to-end (from land development to residue management) use of farm machinery which can be within the reach of the small and marginal farmers at reasonable charges.

name: Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme for Rural Entrepreneurs to set up Custom Hiring Centres (CHC) of Farm Machinery
description: “Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme for Rural Entrepreneurs to set up Custom Hiring Centres (CHC) of Farm Machinery”  by the Agriculture Dep, Government of West Bengal aims to provide opportunity to rural entrepreneurs for setting up of Custom Hiring Centres.

name: West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Repatriation of Dead Body
description: "West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Repatriation of Dead Body" is a social welfare scheme implemented by the West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Board, that provides an one time assistance to the nominee for bringing the dead body of the registered migrant worker in case of death.

name: West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Death Assistance
description: "West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Death Assistance" is a social welfare scheme by the West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Government of West Bengal, that provides an one time assistance to the nominee in case of natural death/accidental death of the migrant worker.

name: West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Accidental Disability
description: "West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Accidental Disability" is a social welfare scheme by the West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Board, that provides one-time assistance to the registered Migrant Worker in case of disability arising out of accidents during work.

name: Financial Assistance for Coaching Classes (HBOCWWB)
description: The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹20,000/- for coaching classes for admission of children of registered workers in professional/technical courses and ₹1,00,000/- for preparation of Main Examination on passing Preliminary Examination of UPSC/HPSSC.

name: Vishvakarma Durghatana Mrtyu par Antyeshti Evan Anugrah Raashi Bhugataan Yojana
description: Chhattisgarh state Government started a scheme "Vishvakarma Durghatana Mrtyu Par Antyeshti Evan Anugrah Raashi Bhugataan Yojana" for labor workers.

name: Book Binder Training by Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons
description: The 'Book Binder Training by Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide book binder training to visually impaired candidates.

name: Special Education - Tamil Nadu
description: The scheme 'Special Education by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide free special education, & vocational training to the visually impaired, hearing-impaired person.

name: Government Institute for the Mentally Retarded - Tamil Nadu
description: The 'Government Institute for the Mentally Retarded,Chennai' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, children with intellectual disability are given special education, vocational training, food, uniforms etc.

name: Tricycles - Tamil Nadu
description: The Department launched the 'Tricycles by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' scheme for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to distribute tricycles to deserving orthopedically differently abled persons affected by both lower limbs for their easy mobility

name: Retrofitted Petrol Scooters - Tamil Nadu
description: The 'Retrofitted Petrol Scooters by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a retrofitted petrol scooter to orthopedically differently-abled persons.

name: Calipers and Crutches - Tamil Nadu
description: The 'Calipers and Crutches by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Tamil Nadu. In this scheme, calipers & crutches are given to the needy & deserving orthopedically differently-abled persons for their easy mobility.

name: Walking Device - Tamil Nadu
description: The 'Walking Device by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a rollator/walker to orthopedically differently abled children having difficulties in walking.

name: Magnifiers - Tamil Nadu
description: The Department launched the "Magnifiers by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department" scheme for differently-abled persons. Under this scheme, magnifiers are distributed to needy students with low vision to enable them to read books.

name: E-Rikshaw Sahayta Yojana
description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "E-Rikshaw Sahayta Yojana" for unorganized worker in 20 December 2016.

name: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: State Capital Investment Subsidy (CIS)
description: “State Capital Investment Subsidy (CIS)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Department, Government of West Bengal, aims to provide Capital Investment Subsidy for its approved project to an eligible micro or small enterprise.

name: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Subsidy on Stamp Duty and Registration Fee (SDRFS)
description: “Subsidy on Stamp Duty and Registration Fee (SDRFS)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, provides a reimbursement of stamp duty and registration fee paid by the eligible enterprises for the purpose of registration of documents.

name: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Subsidy for Energy Efficiency (EES)
description: “Subsidy for Energy Efficiency (EES)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, aims to provide a reimbursement for the cost of energy and installations for energy conservation as per energy audit.

name: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Power Subsidy (PS)
description: “Power Subsidy (PS)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, aims to provide power subsidy on the electricity consumed for the manufacturing activity to an eligible micro or small enterprise.

name: Banglashree for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises: Interest Subsidy on Term Loan (IS)
description: “Interest Subsidy on Term Loan (IS)” incentives under “Banglashree for MSMEs” scheme implemented by the MSMEs Dept., Government of West Bengal, aims to provide Interest Subsidy on annual interest liability on the Term Loan borrowed from a Commercial Bank to an eligible micro or small enterprise.

name: Early Intervention Centre for Infants and Young Children with Hearing Impairment
description: The "Early Intervention Centre for Infants and Young Children with Hearing Impairment" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, Infants and young children with hearing impairment are given training to develop speech.

name: Widow Pension-West Bengal
description: The West Bengal government's Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department launched the "Widow Pension" scheme in 2010. This program aims to support widows facing economic hardship within the state.

name: Mukhya Mantri Samajik Suraksha Yojana: Death & Funeral Assistance (HBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, the Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board provides financial assistance of ₹5 lakhs to the nominee or legal heir in the event of a registered worker's death due to an accident at the workplace. Additionally, ₹15,000/- will be provided for funeral expenses.

name: Multimedia Training - Tamil Nadu
description: The Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu, launched the "Multimedia Training Program" for people with locomotor and hearing impairments.

name: Scholarship (Above VIII Standard) - Tamil Nadu
description: The 'Scholarship (Above VIII Standard) by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide scholarships to differently-abled students studying in government school/colleges/training centre

name: Smart Phone for Hearing and Visually Impaired Persons
description: The scheme 'Smart Phone for Hearing and Visually Impaired Persons' was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to distribute smart phone to needy visually impaired & hearing impaired students, unemployed youth, self-employed.

name: Behind the Ear Hearing Aids by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons
description: 'Behind the Ear Hearing Aids by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to encourage hearing-impaired students to wear hearing aids to increase their speech capacity.

name: Scholarship (I to VIII Standard) by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons
description: The 'Scholarship (I to VIII Standard) by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide scholarships to purchase notebooks for differently-abled students studying in government school.

name: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Nirman Shramik Sammaan Yojana (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, registered female workers, who have minimum one-year’s regular membership, are being provided financial assistance of ₹5100/- for the purchase of Saree, Suit, Slippers, Raincoat, Umbrella, Sanitary Napkin and Kitchen utensil etc.

name: Braille Watches by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department
description: The 'Braille Watches by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, braille watches are distributed to working visually impaired persons.

name: Goggles by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department
description: The 'Goggles by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to distribute goggles to needy visually impaired persons to enable them to protect themselves from sunlight.

name: Death Assistance For Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)
description: The scheme “Death Assistance for Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

name: Fare for Visiting Home Town (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, a free traveling facility to visit the hometown once in a year for a family not exceeding 5 members is provided to the registered construction workers who have a minimum of two year’s regular membership of the Board.

name: Funeral Assistance (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, the “Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board” (HBOCWWB) provides financial assistance for funeral expenses to the nominee or legal heir of a registered worker in the event of their death.

name: Family Pension (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, on the death of a pensioner worker who is being given pension by the Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, half of his/her pension is given to his/her spouse (as the case may be).

name: Pension Scheme (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, a member of the fund who has been working as a building worker for not less than three years shall on completion of sixty years of age be eligible for a pension of ₹3,250/- per month.

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme-2
description:
To promote apprenticeship training in the country, by providing partial stipend support
to the apprentices engaged under the Apprentice Act, 1961, undertaking capacity building of the apprenticeship ecosystem, and providing advocacy assistance to the stakeholders.

name: Free Travelling Facility (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, the amount spent by registered workers and 4 family members for visiting famous religious/historical places once in four years will be paid at the rates prescribed by Haryana Roadways (ordinary fare) or actual railway fare (Second Class).

name: Disability Assistance For Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)
description: The scheme “Disability Assistance for Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

name: Disability Pension For Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)
description: The scheme “Disability Pension for Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

name: Financial Assistance To Disabled Children (HBOCWWB)
description: The scheme “Financial Assistance to Disabled Children (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

name: Financial Assistance For Education Of Children Of Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)
description: The scheme “Financial Assistance for Education of Children of Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

name: Grant For Purchase Of Tools (HBOCWWB)
description: The scheme “Grant for Purchase of Tools (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

name: Financial Assistance for Treatment of Chronic Diseases (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹1,00,000/- is provided to registered workers for indoor treatment of chronic diseases like Cancer, TB, AIDS, etc. as per government rules.

name: Kanyadaan Scheme (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, the Board provides financial assistance of ₹51,000/- in the form of Kanyadaan to registered construction workers on the occasion of the marriage of their daughters. This assistance is available for up to three daughters of the worker.

name: Assistance for Purchase of House (HBOCWWB)
description: Under this scheme, interest free loan is provided to registered construction workers, who have minimum five year’s regular membership, for purchase or construction of their houses. This facility is available once in lifetime.

name: Sewing Machine Scheme (HBOCWWB)
description: This scheme aims to encourage registered women construction workers and to enable them to mend their clothing at their homes. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to registered women construction workers to purchase a Sewing Machine.

name: Award of Puducherry State Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
description: The scheme make sure that no brilliant student is prevented on the grounds of poverty alone from pursuing the academic career. Scholarship is awarded to students in 11th & 12th standards who have secured promotion to the next higher class with 60% & 50% marks in 10th & 11th standard respectively.

name: Award of Scholarship to the Cadets Belonging to UT of Puducherry and Studying in Rashtriya Indian Military College, Dehradun
description: The objective of this scheme is to extend scholarships worth of ₹20,000/- per annum to the cadets belonging to the Union Territory of Puducherry who come from economically weak backgrounds and have been selected for admission into the Rashtriya Indian Military College, Dehradun.

name: Grant of Annual Scholarship to the Students Belonging to UT of Puducherry Selected and Studying in the Sainik School, Amaravathi Nagar, Tamil Nadu
description: "Grant of Annual Scholarship to the Students Belonging to UT of Puducherry Selected and Studying in the Sainik School, Amaravathi Nagar, Tamil Nadu" is a Scholarship Scheme by the Directorate of School Education, Puducherry. A scholarship of ₹10,000/- per annum per student is provided.

name: Award of Scholarship to the Children who are Recipients of National Child Award for Exceptional Achievements and Other National / International Merit Awards
description: The objectives of this scheme are to recognize the talents of children who are recipients of the National Child Award for Exceptional Achievements and other National/International Merit Awards and to recognize the talents of children who are pursuing outstanding achievements in different fields.

name: Award of Scholarships to Outstanding NCC Cadets of the UT of Puducherry
description: The scheme aims to recognize and support outstanding NCC cadets. The scheme offers scholarships to eligible candidates in various divisions: Senior Division Boys (Up to graduation), Senior Wing Girls, Junior Division Boys (Up to 12th Standard), and Junior Wing Girls.

name: Internship Programme for Women Students / Scholars / Social Activists / Teachers
description: The Ministry of Women and Child Development launched the Internship Programme aims to harness the talent of the trainees, giving them an opportunity to work towards bringing more efficiency in the implementation of the schemes.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
description: The scheme is to provide maternity benefits to women belonging to socially and economically disadvantaged sections of society. For first child the maternity benefit of ₹5,000 is provided in two instalments under PMMVY and second child, it is ₹6,000 is to be provided subject to second child is girl.

name: Matrimonial Incentives
description: In this scheme, if a Person with Disability (PwD) gets married to a non-disabled person, then the couple is provided a marriage incentive of up to ₹ 50,000. Only citizens who are permanent residents of the state of Maharashtra are eligible to apply for this scheme.

name: Post-matric Scholarship Scheme- Uttar Pradesh
description: The UP scholarship program was started by the state of Uttar Pradesh to increase literacy rates and generate a skilled youth force to boost social and economic growth.

name: Book Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)
description: "Book Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows" is a Welfare Scheme by the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, the wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM studying in Government-recognized Institutions are provided allowances towards the purchase of books.

name: Reimbursement of Tuition Fees to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)
description: "Reimbursement of Tuition Fees to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)" is a Welfare Scheme by the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. The wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM studying in Government-recognized Institutions are provided reimbursement of their tuition fees.

name: Grant to Meritorious Wards of Ex-Servicemen in Academics (Lump Sum Grant)
description: Through this scheme, the academically meritorious wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM who have secured the top three ranks in academics are provided with lump sum grants of upto ₹18,000. The application should be submitted within three months from the date of publication of the result.

name: Cash Incentive to Wards of ESM (Academic Scholarship)
description: Through this scheme, the academically meritorious wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM pursuing higher education are provided cash incentive of ₹1,000 per month. The application should be submitted within three months from the date of publication of the result of the respective exam.

name: Uniform Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)
description: "Uniform Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)" is a Welfare Scheme by the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. The wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM studying in Government-recognized Institutions are provided allowances towards purchase of their uniform.

name: Karma Sathi Prakalpa
description: The Government of West Bengal has taken remarkable initiatives in employment generation for the promising youth through opening new doors to help intending or prospective entrepreneurs and make them self-dependent, those who are interested in new ventures.

name: SVAMITVA Yojana (Survey of Villages and Mapping with Improvised Technology in Village Areas)
description: SVAMITVA, a Central Sector scheme of Ministry of Panchayati Raj to provide ‘Record of Rights’ to village household owners with issuance of legal ownership cards (Property cards/Title deeds) to the property owners by mapping of land parcels using drone technology.

name: Accidental Death Assistance for the Construction Workers
description: "Accidental Death Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance of ₹2,00,000/- to the nominees/dependents of the members in case the death is due to an accident.

name: Ex-gratia Payment for the Construction Workers
description: The "Ex-gratia Payment for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme for the registered workers of the board that provides an ex-gratia amount of ₹1,00,000/- in case of permanent disability.

name: Education Assistance for the Construction Workers
description: The "Education Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides scholarship to the childrens of the construction worker of the board.

name: Financial Assistance for Miscarriage for the Construction Workers
description: "Financial Assistance for Miscarriage for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides an amount of ₹3,000/- as financial assistance in case of miscarriage.

name: Grant for the Purchase of Work Related Tools for the Construction Workers
description: "Grant for the Purchase of Work Related Tools for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides an amount of ₹5,000/- as grant to the members of the Fund, for the purchase of work related tools.

name: Natural Death Assistance for the Construction Workers
description: "Natural Death Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance of ₹1,00,000/- to the nominees/dependents of the members in case of natural death of the worker.

name: Funeral Assistance for the Construction Workers
description: The "Funeral Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides funeral assistance of ₹10,000/- in case of death of a member to their nominees/dependents.

name: Loan for the Purchase of Work Tool for the Construction Workers
description: "Loan for the Purchase of Work Tool for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides an amount not exceeding ₹20,000/- as loan to the members of the fund, for the purchase of work related tools.

name: Yatra Pass in DTC non AC Buses for the Construction Workers
description: The "Yatra Pass in DTC non AC Buses for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides a pass of ₹ 2400/- per three months for non AC DTC bus to the registered workers for purchasing.

name: Financial Assistance for Marriage for the Construction Workers
description: The "Financial Assistance for Marriage for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme  that provides financial assistance for marriage of self and for upto 2 children.

name: Maternity Assistance for the Construction Workers
description: The "Maternity Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme  that provides maternity benefits of ₹ 30,000/- to the registered women members and wives of male members for upto 2 children.

name: Disability Pension for the Construction Workers
description: The "Disability Pension for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides monthly disability pension of ₹3000/- to the permanently disabled member due to paralysis, leprosy, T.B and accidents.

name: Pension Benefit for the Construction Workers
description: The "Pension Benefit for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme for the registered workers of the board with a pension benefit of ₹ 3000/- per month after completion of 60 years.

name: Medical Assistance for the Construction Workers
description: "Medical Assistance for the Construction Workers" was launched by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept, Delhi. The registered workers are given medical assistance upto ₹ 10,000/- in case of being hospitalized for 5 or more days due to an accident or disease.

name: Purchase/Construction of House for the Construction Workers
description: The "Purchase/Construction of House for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board is a welfare scheme for its registered workers. An advance amount of ₹3,00,000/- to ₹5,00,000/- is provided for the purchase/construction of a house.

name: Readers Allowance to Visually Impaired Persons
description: 'Readers Allowance to Visually Impaired Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide readers allowance to visually impaired students, specific allowance rates based on the education level.

name: Assistance to Law Graduates
description: The "Assistance to Law Graduates" scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹50,000 will be given to the differently abled Law graduates for enrolment in the Bar Council as lawyer.

name: Fitter Training to Hearing Impaired Persons
description: The scheme "Fitter Training to Hearing Impaired Persons" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to give fitter training to the hearing-impaired candidates at the ITI, Guindy for two years and a stipend of ₹300 per month.

name: Establishing Aavin Parlour for Differently Abled Persons
description: The 'Establishing Aavin Parlour for Differently Abled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to create self-employment avenues for differently abled persons, the govt. has issued orders to establish Parlour.

name: Scheme of Personal Assistance Allowance to Differently Abled Persons with High Support Need
description: The "Scheme of Personal Assistance Allowance to Differently Abled Persons with High Support Need" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a personal assistance allowance of ₹1,000 to differently abled person.

name: Modular Functional Artificial Limbs
description: The 'Modular Functional Artificial Limbs' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, modular functional artificial limbs are provided for orthopedically differently-abled students, employed or self-employed.

name: Assistance for Marriage
description: The scheme "Assistance for Marriage" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, a sum of ₹2,000/- is given to meet the marriage expenses of the differently abled person or his son or daughter.

name: AGR-50 Scheme-Assistance To Purchase Tractors
description: The scheme “AGR-50 Scheme-Assistance to Purchase Tractors” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat in the year 2011-12. The scheme was implemented for the farmers to help in buying the tractor in the state.

name: Scheme For Subsidy On Interest For Establishment Of 1 To 20 Milch Animal Farm For Scheduled Caste
description: The scheme “Scheme for Subsidy on Interest for Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm for Scheduled Caste” was started by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

name: Scheme For Subsidy On Interest For Establishment Of 1 To 20 Milch Animal Farm For Scheduled Tribe
description: The scheme “Scheme for Subsidy on Interest for Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm for Scheduled Tribe” was started by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Govt. of Gujarat.

name: Pilgrimage Rejuvenation and Spiritual Augmentation Drive (PRASHAD)
description: Launched in 2014–2015, the scheme "Pilgrimage Rejuvenation and Spiritual Augmentation Drive (PRASAD)" is a Central Sector Scheme by the Ministry of Tourism, Government of India. The scheme focuses on developing and identifying pilgrimage sites across India to enrich the religious tourism experience.

name: HRIDAY: Heritage City Development & Augmentation Yojana
description: Launched on 21st January 2015, the scheme "National Heritage City Development and Augmentation Yojana", also known as "HRIDAY" is a central sector scheme by the Ministry of Tourism. The scheme was introduced to bring together urban planning, economic growth, and heritage conservation.

name: Post Graduate Scholarship for GATE/GPAT Qualified Students for Pursuing M.Tech/M.E./M.Pharm-UGC
description: University Grants Commission is implementing the scheme of Post Graduate Scholarship for GATE/GPAT Qualified Students for Pursuing M.Tech/M.E./M.Pharm courses (including integrated dual degree courses).

name: Dr. Ambedkar Awas Yojana
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹1,20,000/- is provided to Scheduled Caste individuals who do not own a residential home, have an old rough residential home, or own a plot for residence, and who belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category for the construction of a house.

name: Marriage Assistance to Differently Abled Persons Marrying Differently Abled Persons
description: The scheme 'Marriage Assistance to Differently Abled Persons Marrying Differently Abled Persons' was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to differently-abled couple.

name: Maintenance Allowance for Persons Affected with Muscular Dystrophy
description: The 'Maintenance Allowance for Persons Affected with Muscular Dystrophy' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a maintenance allowance to the person affected with muscular dystrophy.

name: Modular Reflective Folding Sticks (Smartcane)
description: The 'Modular Reflective Folding Sticks (Smartcane)' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to distribute modular reflective folding sticks to needy visually impaired persons for self-orientation & independent mobility.

name: Modified Special Wheel Chairs for Persons Affected with Cerebral Palsy
description: The 'Modified Special Wheel Chairs for Persons Affected with Cerebral Palsy' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of differently abled Persons, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide modified special wheel chairs to cerebral palsy affected differently abled persons.

name: Marriage Assistance to Normal Persons Marrying Orthopedically Differently Abled Persons
description: The scheme 'Marriage Assistance to Normal Persons Marrying Orthopedically Differently Abled Persons' was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide marriage assistance to a normal person.

name: Maintenance Allowance for Leprosy Affected Persons
description: The 'Maintenance Allowance for Leprosy Affected Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a maintenance allowance to leprosy-affected persons.

name: Marriage Assistance to Normal Persons Marrying Visually Impaired Persons
description: The scheme 'Marriage Assistance to Normal Persons Marrying Visually Impaired Persons' was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide marriage assistance to a normal person marrying a visually Impaired Person.

name: Maintenance Allowance to Intellectually Disabled Persons
description: The 'Maintenance Allowance to Intellectually Disabled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Govt of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a maintenance allowance to intellectually disabled persons.

name: Maintenance Allowance to Severely Affected Persons
description: The 'Maintenance Allowance to Severely Affected Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons. The scheme aims to provide a maintenance allowance to the severely affected persons who cannot be rehabilitated by any other assistance.

name: Unemployment Allowance to Differently Abled Persons
description: The scheme "Unemployment Allowance to Differently Abled Persons" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide unemployment allowance to differently-abled persons.

name: Marriage Assistance to Normal Persons Marrying Speech and Hearing Impaired Persons
description: The scheme 'Marriage Assistance to Normal Persons Marrying Speech and Hearing Impaired Persons' was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to differently-abled couple.

name: Maternity Benefit Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to women registered construction workers during the maternity period, subject to the conditions specified by the Board. This assistance will only be provided upon the birth of two children.

name: Housing Assistance Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, an advance loan is provided to registered construction workers for the purchase or construction of a house, subject to the conditions specified by the Board.

name: Sanitary Napkin Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, sanitary napkins will be provided to the daughters of registered construction workers and women construction workers, subject to the conditions specified by the Board.

name: Umbrella Assistance Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, an umbrella will be provided free of cost to registered building & construction workers to protect them from rain and sun. No financial assistance will be paid to the beneficiary, and the benefit will be given only once in their lifetime.

name: Bicycle/Sewing Machine Assistance Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, bicycles are provided to registered building & construction workers in plain areas, while sewing machines are provided to registered workers or their dependents in mountainous/hilly areas. These benefits are granted only once in a lifetime.

name: Child Benefit Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to the children of registered building & construction workers who are enrolled in classes ranging from Class I to higher education levels or professional courses.

name: Toolkit Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to the registered building & construction workers for the purchase of tool-kits. The assistance will be given only once throughout the lifetime.

name: Solar Energy Assistance Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, Solar Light/Lantern (LED/CFL) will be provided to registered building & construction workers. The beneficiary will receive the benefit only once in their entire lifetime, even if both spouses are registered under the Board.

name: Pension Benefit (GBOCWWB)
description: "Pension Benefit (GBOCWWB)" is a Welfare Scheme by the Goa Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Goa. A member of the Fund who has been working as a building worker for not less than one year, be eligible for a pension of ₹300/- per month, on completion of sixty years of age.

name: Free Bus Pass for Media Persons
description: "Free Bus Pass for Media Persons" scheme by the Dept of Information & Publicity, Puducherry, aims to provide a free bus pass facility to media persons working in Puducherry in Puducherry Road Transport Corporation buses (except town buses) to undertake journeys for their professional requirements.

name: Scheme for Grant of Pension Benefits to Journalists
description: The scheme "Scheme for Grant of Pension Benefits to Journalists" offers a monthly pension of ₹6,000/- to qualified journalists who are 58 years or above in age, and have served for a minimum of 20 years in roles such as Full-time Editor, Reporter, Sub-Editor, Press Photographer/Videographer, etc.

name: Grant of Financial Assistance to the Press Reporters of Puducherry
