description: Launched in June 2019, the scheme "YSR RYTHU BHAROSA” is being implemented by the Dept. of Agriculture, Govt. of Andhra Pradesh since 15th October 2019 for providing financial assistance to the farmer families including tenant farmers across the state @ ₹ 13,500/- per farmer family per year.

name: Double Bedroom Housing Scheme (2BHK Scheme)
description: The Govt. of Telangana formulated the 2BHK Scheme in Oct'2015 to provide 100% subsidized housing to the poor. The "Double Bedroom Housing" provides two bedrooms, a hall, a kitchen, and two toilets covering the 560 Sqft plinth area. The plot area is 125 sq yd for an independent house in a rural area.

name: Delhi Ladli Scheme
description: Delhi Ladli Scheme was launched by the Department of Women & Children Development, Government of the National Capital Territory (NCT) of Delhi on 1st January 2008 to empower girl children born in Delhi. The State Bank Life Insurance Co. Ltd. (SBIL) is the scheme's Fund Manager.

name: Delhi Pension Scheme To Women In Distress (Widow Pension)
description: Delhi Pension Scheme to Women in Distress is a welfare scheme to provide social security by way of financial assistance to widows, divorced, separated, abandoned, deserted or destitute women in the age group of 18 years of lifelong who do not have adequate means of subsistence and are poor & needy.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha Evam Utthan Mahabhiyan Scheme For Farmers.
description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Surakshaevam Utthaan Mahabhiyan Yojana (PM-KUSUM Scheme) was launched in March 2019 by the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE), to subsidize farmers to install solar irrigation pumps for cultivation. Each farmer will receive a 60% subsidy.

name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Pension For Transgender
description: ISSS (Integrated Social Security Scheme) is a State Sponsored Scheme by the Social Welfare Department of the Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir where financial assistance is provided to Old Age Persons, Widows, Divorcees, Women in Distress, Transgenders, and Physically Handicapped Persons.

name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Women In Distress
description: ISSS (Integrated Social Security Scheme) is a State Sponsored Scheme by the Social Welfare Department of the Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir where financial assistance is provided to Old Age Persons, Widows, Divorcees, Women in Distress, Transgenders, and Physically Handicapped Persons.

name: Integrated Sheep Development Scheme
description: ISDS was launched in the year 2020-21 by the J&K Govt. to promote income generation through the establishment of sheep & goat units. This scheme is innovative & self-sustaining as fresh units shall be established in a continuous cyclic manner from the retrieved livestock of previous beneficiaries.

name: Internship Programme By The Ministry Of External Affairs
description: The Ministry of External Affairs launched the first edition of the Internship Programme in 2022. The internship policy aims to take foreign policy closer to the people. A total of 75 internships will be offered in the year 2022 in a single term of three months during April to June 2022.

name: National Youth Corps
description: A volunteership scheme by Ministry of Youth Affairs And Sports to tap the potential of the disciplined and dedicated youth In the age group of 18 to 29 years who have the inclination and spirit to engage in nation building exercises, to serve up to two years in Nation Building activities.

name: National Scheme Of Welfare Of Fishermen
description: The National Scheme of Welfare of Fishermen provides financial assistance to fishermen. They can use these for constructing houses and community halls for both recreation and work purposes. Further, through the amount availed under this scheme, fishermen can install tube wells.

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: The Kisan Credit Card (KCC) scheme was introduced in 1998 for issue of Kisan Credit Cards to farmers on the basis of their holdings for uniform adoption by the banks so that farmers may use them to readily purchase agriculture inputs and draw cash for their production needs.

name: Sub-mission On Agriculture Mechanization
description: The Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization was launched in 2014-15 by the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers’ Welfare.

name: AICTE - Research Promotion Scheme (RPS)
description: The scheme "AICTE - Research Promotion Scheme (RPS)" was introduced by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), Department of Higher Education (DoHE) in order to promote research in identified thrust areas of technical education. The maximum limit of funding is ₹ 25,00,000.

name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme
description: Prime Minister’s Scholarship Scheme (PMSS) was introduced in the academic year 2006-07 by the Department of Ex-servicemen Welfare, to encourage higher technical and professional education for the dependent wards of Ex-Servicemen / Ex-Coast Guard personnel and their widows.

name: Pre Matric Scholarship For Scheduled Tribe Students
description: A scholarship scheme by Ministry of Tribal Affairs for regular, full time students from Scheduled Tribe studying in Class 9th and 10th, in a Government School or in a School recognized by Govt. or a Central/State Board of Secondary Education.

name: Ladli Beti Scheme
description: A social assistance scheme sponsored by the J&K Govt. for newborn girl children born on or after 01/04/2015. The objective is to arrest the declining female sex ratio. The scheme ensures that the girl child does not become a burden for the parent or guardian at the time of her marriage.

name: Modernisation And Removal Of Obsolescence
description: MODROB scheme, one of the AICTE Quality Improvement Scheme (AQIS), intends to support the development of laboratories with appropriate equipment/ technology/ tools/ software and encourages financial contribution from the industry.

name: Boarding House Stipend Scheme (Tripura Govt.)
description: The scheme of "Boarding House Stipend" was introduced by the Tribal Welfare Department, Directorate of Tribal Welfare, Govt. of Tripura to improve educational scenario among Scheduled Tribes people.

name: Savitribai Jyotirao Phule Fellowship For Single Girl Child
description: Savitribai Jyotirao Phule Fellowship for Single Girl Child (SJSGC) is a Fellowship Scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education, for pursuing research work leading to the award of a Ph.D. degree. The target group of this scheme is the ‘single girl child'.

name: Post Graduate Merit Scholarship Scheme For University Rank Holders At Under-Graduate Level Applicable
description: UGC, Dept. of Higher Education introduced a Post-Graduate Merit Scholarship Scheme for University rank holders both in General and Honours Courses at the UG level. The scholarship may be tenable for a period of two years.

name: Fellowship For Superannuated Faculty Members
description: The "Fellowship for Superannuated Faculty Members" scheme is a fellowship scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education to provide opportunities to superannuated faculty members of Universities/Institutes/Colleges, hereinafter “Institutions” to pursue research.

name: Rajiv Gandhi National Fellowship For Scheduled Caste Candidates
description: The Rajiv Gandhi National Fellowship (RGNF) Scheme for Scheduled Caste is formulated and funded by the Ministry of Social Justice &Empowerment. The scheme is open to candidates who belong to Scheduled Caste and are pursuing higher studies such as regular and full-time M.Phil.and Ph.D.degrees.

name: Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) And Research Associateship (RA) For Foreign Nationals
description: The scheme was initiated keeping in view the political and cultural bilateral relations of India with other developing countries: Asia, Africa, Latin America. The scheme has opened new vistas for foreign students and teachers, enable them to come to India and undertake advanced studies and research.

name: Research Fellowship In Sciences For Meritorious Students
description: The Research Fellowship in Sciences for meritorious students (RFSMS) scheme of the UGC is open to candidates who have registered for Ph.D. in Science in Universities with Potential for Excellence/Centres with Potential for Excellence/Centres of Advance Studies and Department of Special Assistance.

name: Tenzing Norgay National Adventure Award
description: MYAS confers the Tenzing Norgay National Adventure Award in order to recognize the achievements of persons associated with the field of adventure and to encourage young people to develop the spirit of endurance, risk-taking, cooperative teamwork, and quick, ready, and effective reflexes.

name: MeitY - Visvesvaraya PhD Scheme For Electronics & IT
description: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology with an objective to enhance the number of PhDs in Electronics System Design & Manufacturing (ESDM) and IT/IT Enabled Services (IT/ITES) sectors in the country.

name: Pradhan Mantri Formalisation Of Micro Food Processing Enterprises
description: Launched on 29th June 2020, PMFMPE is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme by the MoFPI, designed to address the challenges faced by the micro enterprises and to tap the potential of groups and cooperatives in supporting the upgradation and formalization of these enterprises.

name: Vanchit Ikai Samooh Aur Vargon Ko Aarthik Sahayata Yojana
description: The VISVAS (Vanchit Ikai Samooh aur Vargon ko Aarthik Sahayata) Scheme aims to provide interest subvention to OBC/SC Self Help Groups (SHGs) or individuals. It is being implemented by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment.

name: Post Graduate Indira Gandhi Scholarship For Single Girl Child
description: A scholarship scheme by the University Grants Commission for Girl students who are admitted in the first year of PG courses in any designated university or a postgraduate college, and happen to be the only girl child in the family. The amount of fellowship is ₹ 36,200/- per annum.

name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana
description: With the objective of providing rural connectivity, the Government of India launched the Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (referred to as PMGSY-I hereinafter) on 25th December 2000 to provide all-weather access to eligible unconnected habitations.

name: Saansad Adarsh Gram Yojana
description: Saansad Adarsh Gram Yojana aims to translate the comprehensive vision of Mahatma Gandhi about an ideal Indian village into reality, keeping in view the present context. Each Member of Parliament adopts a Gram Panchayat and guides its holistic progress giving importance to social development.

name: Tejaswini-the Radiant
description: A scheme to provide financial assistance to the young women for setting up gainful self-employment ventures, suited to their skills, training, aptitude and local conditions.

name: AICTE - Distinguished Chair Professor Fellowship
description: A Fellowship Scheme by AICTE, MoE. The Distinguished Chair Professor Fellowship intends to utilize the expertise of highly qualified and experienced superannuated professionals who have made an unparalleled, exceptional professional contribution to society in their respective fields/disciplines.

name: Emeritus Fellowship
description: A fellowship scheme by University Grants Commission to provide an opportunity to superannuated teachers to pursue active research in their respective field of specialization in Indian Universities/Colleges/ Institutions.

name: AICTE – Mitacs Globalink Research Internship (GRI) Scheme
description: AICTE, on 23rd February 2018, entered into a Memorandum of Understanding with Mathematics of Information Technology and Computer Systems (MITACS) Canada for AICTE – MITACS Globalink Research Internships (GRI) Program to foster cross-border partnerships.

name: AICTE-INAE Travel Grant Scheme For Engineering Students From AICTE Approved Engineering College/Institution
description: A Travel Grant Scheme by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and by the Indian National Academy of Engineering (INAE), for the students from AICTE approved Engineering College/institutions. The scheme aims at enhancing the quality of engineering education in the country.

name: Tripura Scheme For Incentive To Girl Child
description: An Incentive Scheme by the Directorate Of Social Welfare & Social Education, Tripura, for the girl child born on or after 01/06/2009 to the parents who are cardholders of listed BPL households. ₹300 per head per month up to the month the girl child attains the age of 15 years.

name: Tripura Pension Scheme For Providing Pension To The Retired Home Guard / Women Home Guard Volunteers
description: Effective from 1st December 2012, this is a pension scheme for the Retired Home Guard / Women Home Guard Volunteers. The Rate of Pension shall be ₹750 per head per month (without any allowances whatsoever). Arrears shall not be payable.

name: Tripura Journalist Health Insurance Scheme
description: A Health Insurance Scheme by the Directorate of Information & Culture Affairs, for Journalists who are permanent residents of the state of Tripura. The applicant must be an accredited journalist by the state government or PIB. The age must be in between 21-65 years.

name: Prime Minister’s Special Scholarship Scheme For The Students Of Union Territories Of Jammu & Kashmir And Ladakh
description: PMSSS is a scholarship scheme by AICTE for the students who are domicile of the UTs of J&K and Ladakh who, after passing Class 12th or equivalent examination, secure admission in government colleges/institutions and other select institutions outside the UTs of J&K and Ladakh.

name: Credit Card Scheme For Artisans And Weavers Of Handicrafts And Handloom Sector
description: The Credit Card Scheme for Artisans & Weavers is a loan scheme by the Department of Handicraft & Handloom (Govt. of Jammu & Kashmir) under which adequate and timely assistance from the financial institutions is provided to the Artisans and Weavers.

name: CBSE Merit Scholarship Scheme For Single Girl Child
description: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Education for meritorious Single Girl Students, who are the only child of their parents; and have passed the CBSE Class 10th Examination with 60% or more marks and are continuing their further school education of Class 11th and 12th.

name: Senior Citizens Saving Scheme
description: Introduced in 2004 by the Govt. of India, SCSS offers a steady stream of income for individuals over 60 years old. As it is a government-backed scheme, there is minimal risk associated with SCSS. Individuals can apply for this scheme in post offices and public and private banks.

name: Post Office Monthly Income Scheme
description: POMIS is an investment scheme recognized and validated by the Ministry of Finance. It is one of the highest-earning schemes with an interest rate of 6.6%. The interest in this scheme is disbursed monthly. After opening a POMIS account, individuals can invest a minimum amount of ₹1500.

name: Scheme For Award Of Financial Assistance For Education To The Wards Of Beedi/Cine/IOMC/LSDM Workers – Pre & Post-Matric
description: A scholarship scheme by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Ministry of Labour and Employment wherein financial assistance for education is provided to the Wards of Beedi/IOMC/LSDM Workers, varying from ₹1,000/- to ₹25,000/- per student per annum. The benefits are transferred through the DBT system.

name: Financial Support To The Students Of N.E.R For Higher Professional Courses (NEC Merit Scholarship)
description: A scholarship scheme by the North Eastern Council (NEC), Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region for the students of the North Eastern States undergoing studies in different disciplines at different levels in Institutions inside as well as outside the North-East but within the country.

name: Revised Education Scheme For Children Of Artisans/Weavers Of Handicrafts And Handloom Departments
description: A scholarship scheme by the Industries and Commerce Dept., Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir to provide financial support to the children of Artisans/Weavers of Handicrafts and Handloom Depts. in completion of education. The scholarship shall be provided to a maximum of two children of Weaver/Artisan.

name: Karkhandar Scheme For Development Of Craft Sector
description: A training and skilling upgradation scheme by the Dept. of Industries & Commerce and implemented by the Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom, Govt. of Jammu & Kashmir wherein passout meritorious trainees and ex-trainees from departmental training centers are are provided skill upgradation training.

name: RMEWF-Financial Assistance To 100% Disabled Child Of Ex-Servicemen
description: A scheme to provide financial assistance to Ex-Servicemen or their widows for their 100% disabled child.

name: State Marriage Assistance Scheme For Poor Girls
description: A social welfare scheme by the Social Welfare Department of the Government of Jammu & Kashmir, for Poor Girls of Marriageable Age who belong to either AAY (Antyodaya Anna Yojana) or PHH (Priority Households) ration card holder families. The scheme is operational in all the districts across the UT.

name: AICTE – Saksham Scholarship Scheme For Specially-Abled Student (Diploma)
description: Saksham is a Scholarship Scheme by the Ministry of Education, implemented by AICTE, aimed at providing encouragement and support to specially-abled children to pursue technical education. This is an attempt to give every young specially-abled student the opportunity to study further.

name: AICTE – Saksham Scholarship Scheme For Specially-Abled Student (Degree)
description: Saksham is a Scholarship Scheme by the Ministry of Education, implemented by AICTE, aimed at providing encouragement and support to specially-abled children to pursue technical education. This is an attempt to give every young specially-abled student the opportunity to study further.

name: AFFDF-Financial Assistance For Treatment Of Serious Diseases To Non Pensioner Ex-Servicemen (All Ranks)/Widows
description: A scheme to provide financial assistance to a non-pensioner Ex-Servicemen of all ranks and widows to meet medical expenses related to treatment of approved serious diseases like cancer, renal failure, knee replacement and heart surgery.

name: National Overseas Scholarship For Students With Disabilities
description: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment for regular, full-time students with disabilities to obtain higher education viz., Master's degree, or Ph.D. courses from foreign universities, in one of the specified fields of study.

name: Financial Assistance Under The National Fund For Persons With Disabilities
description: A scheme by DoEPwDs for providing financial assistance to the Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) in support of various livelihood activities. The objective of these guidelines is to provide a framework to support financial assistance under the Fund for relevant core areas  for empowerment of PwDs.

name: Top Class Education For Students With Disabilities
description: A scholarship scheme by DoEPwDs for Students with Disabilities (SwDs) pursuing studies beyond class 12th admitted in a full-time course in one of the 'notified institutions'.

name: Pre Matric Scholarship For Students With Disabilities
description: A scholarship scheme by DoEPwDs for Students with Disabilities (SwDs) studying in class 9th and class 10th in a government school or a school recognized by the government or CBSE or State Board. This includes persons with visual, hearing, speech, loco-motor, mental retardation & other disabilities.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana - Special Projects
description: A skill development scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship for Marginalized or vulnerable groups which may not meet all the parameters as laid down in the Guidelines of ShortTerm Training (STT) of PMKVY 3.0

name: Credit Enhancement Guarantee Scheme For The Scheduled Castes
description: a loan scheme by the Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Entrepreneurs of Scheduled Caste Category.

name: NBCFDC General Loan Scheme
description: A general loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice for Indian citizens from backward classes for various income-generating activities. Loan up to ₹15 Lakh per beneficiary for pursuing income-generating activities.

name: Top Class Education For Scheduled Caste Students
description: A scholarship scheme by Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment for Scheduled Caste students pursuing studies beyond class 12th admitted in a full-time course in one of the notified institutions. The total annual family income from all sources must be less than or equal to Rs. 8.00 lakh.

name: New Swarnima Scheme For Women
description: A term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment for women entrepreneurs from backward classes to obtain a loan of up to ₹2,00,000/- @ 5% per annum, thereby providing them social & financial security.

name: RMEWF-Financial Assistance For Medical Treatment Of Ex-Servicemen
description: A scheme to provide financial assistance to a non-pensioner Ex-Servicemen/widows of ranks up to Havildar/equivalent to meet routine medical expenses.

name: Garima Greh Shelter Homes For Transgender Persons
description: Garima Greh aims to provide shelter to Destitute & abandoned Transgender persons with basic amenities like shelter, food, medical care and recreational facilities.

name: Khadi Karigar Janashree Bima Yojana
description: A group insurance scheme by MoMSME for khadi artisans (spinners and weavers). The scheme provides insurance cover against normal death, accidental death and disability of the insured member.

name: Pravasi Bharatiya Bima Yojana
description: A mandatory insurance scheme by Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) for safeguarding the interests of Indian emigrant workers falling under Emigration Check Required (ECR) category going for overseas employment to ECR countries.

name: Women Scientist Scheme-A
description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates to pursue research in frontier areas of science and engineering, preferably those having a break in career (minimum two years) and not having regular employment, to explore possibility of re-entry into the profession.

name: Women Scientist Scheme-C
description: A scheme by MoST for female candidates with a break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. 1-year training is provided in Intellectual Property Rights (IPRs), patent search, know-how, drafting, filing, trademarks, trade secrets, and copyright.

name: Women Scientist Scheme-B
description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates with break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. Women scientists who wish to apply under this scheme are required to develop their own project/proposals for scientific and technological solutions

name: Central Assistance For One Time Settlement Of Displaced Families From PoK And Chhamb Under Prime Minister's Development Package
description: A relief and rehabilitation scheme by the Ministry of Home Affairs provides central assistance to the displaced families from PoK And Chhamb and settled in the state of Jammu & Kashmir. The amount of Central Assistance of Rs. 5,49,692/- per family will be distributed through Direct Benefit Transfer.

name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - General Term Loan (GTL)
description: A general term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Safai Karamchari, Manual Scavengers, and their dependants aged 18 years and above.

name: Jal Jeevan Mission
description: Jal Jeevan Mission, is envisioned to provide safe and adequate drinking water through individual household tap connections by 2024 to all households in rural India.

name: Skill Loan Scheme
description: A Skill loan scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship to provide loan upto Rs. 1,50,000 to student who has secured admission in a course run by Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs), Polytechnics or in a school recognized by Central or State education Boards or in a college affil

name: Credit Based Schemes For SC - Term Loan (TL)
description: A loan scheme by Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Entrepreneur of Scheduled Caste Category.

name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - Swachhta Udyami Yojana – Swachhta Se Sampannta Ki Aur
description: A general term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Safai Karamchari, Manual Scavengers and their dependants aged 18 years and above for procurement of sanitation-related vehicles.

name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - Sanitary Marts Scheme
description: A  contributory Loan scheme by Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for individual beneficiaries/self help groups of Liberated Safai Karamchari, Manual Scavengers and their dependants aged 18 years and above, for setting up A Sanitary Marts (SM) is a one-stop-shop for all things for sanitation

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana - Recognition Of Prior Learning
description: A skill development scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship that enables Indian youth with prior learning experience or skills to obtain industry-relevant skill certification.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana - Short Term Training
description: A skill development scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship for school/college dropouts/unemployed aged 15-45 at PMKVY Training Centres (TCs).

name: RMEWF-Financial Assistance For Education Of Children & Widows Of Ex-Servicemen
description: A scheme to provide financial assistance to Ex-Servicemen and their widows for helping them in educating their child (for maximum two children) up to graduation and also for widows to pursue Post Graduation degree.

name: RMEWF-Financial Assistance For Vocational Training Of Widows Of Ex-Servicemen
description: A scheme to provide financial assistance to a widow of Ex-Servicemen to settle in life through vocational training.

name: Deployment of Prantiya Rakshak Dal (PRD) Volunteers
description: Under this scheme, PRD volunteers deployed to assist the police and serve in various government offices receive a daily honorarium. In cases of death, disability, or injury occurring during duty, financial assistance is provided to their legal dependents based on the nature and severity of incident.

name: Mukhyamantri Alp-Shankhyak Protsahan Yojana
description: The "Mukhyamantri Alp-Shankhyak Protsahan Yojana" aims to provide financial incentives to minority community candidates from Uttarakhand who clear preliminary exams and/or interviews for various competitive examinations like UPSC, Uttarakhand PSC, and national-level institutions (IITs & IIMs).

name: N/A
description: N/A

name: N/A
description: N/A

name: N/A
description: N/A

name: N/A
description: N/A

name: N/A
description: N/A

name: Swachh Bharat Mission (Grameen) Phase II
description: A sanitation scheme for Visual cleanliness through Open Defecation Free (ODF) sustainability and effective management of solid and liquid waste in villages.

name: Alpshankhyak Vikas Nidhi
description: The scheme establishes a ₹4 crore fund to support marginalized minorities in Uttarakhand, targeting gaps in existing central/state welfare programs through district-level initiatives.

name: PMMSY: Inputs for Saline /Alkaline Water Aquaculture - Haryana
description: The subsidy for Inputs for Saline /Alkaline Water Aquaculture under Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) provides input cost subsidy for saline/alkaline water aquaculture in newly created water bodies to expand fisheries production in Haryana.

name: PMMSY: Inputs for fresh water Aquaculture including Composite fish culture, Scampi, Pangasius, Tilapia etc - Haryana
description: The scheme under Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) provides input cost subsidy for freshwater aquaculture in newly constructed ponds to expand fisheries production in Haryana.

name: PMMSY: Ice Plant/Cold Store of Minimum 30-Ton Capacity - Haryana
description: The subsidy for 30-ton capacity ice plants/cold storage units under Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) supports the establishment of ice plants or cold storage facilities with a minimum capacity of 30 tons to improve fish preservation and cold chain infrastructure in Haryana.

name: PMMSY: Ice Plant/Cold Store of Minimum 20-Ton Capacity - Haryana
description: The subsidy for 20-ton capacity ice plant/cold storage units under Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) supports the establishment of ice plants or cold storage facilities with a minimum capacity of 20 tons to improve fish preservation and cold chain infrastructure in Haryana.

name: PMMSY: Ice Plant/Cold Store of minimum 10-ton capacity Haryana
description: The subsidy for 10-ton capacity ice plant/cold storage units under Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) supports the establishment of ice plants or cold storage facilities with a minimum capacity of 10 tons to improve fish preservation and cold chain infrastructure in Haryana.

name: PMMSY: Ice Plant/Cold Storage of Minimum 50-Ton Capacity - Haryana
description: This scheme provides financial assistance for setting up ice plants or cold storage units with a minimum capacity of 50 tons, supporting cold chain infrastructure under PMMSY.

name: Varanasi and Amritsar Yatra Scheme
description: This scheme aims to facilitate pilgrimages to Varanasi and Amritsar for individuals belonging to the Scheduled Castes category. The scheme provides financial reimbursement for second-class train travel, enabling eligible beneficiaries to undertake these religious journeys with ease.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Medium Fish Feed Mill of Production Capacity of 8 Ton/Day
description: The scheme aims to promote fish feed self-sufficiency and affordability among fish farmers. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided for setting up medium-sized fish feed mills with a production capacity of 8 tons per day, benefiting entrepreneurs and fish farmers.

name: National Agriculture Market
description: Launched on 14th April 2016, e-NAM is a pan-India electronic trading platform that links existing mandis to create a unified online market for agricultural commodities, promoting “One Nation One Market” and enabling transparent, efficient, and nationwide agri-trade.

name: DEMO8
description: m

name: Technology Infusion : Custom Hiring Centre / Farm Mechanization for Traditional Area, Non Traditional Area and North Eastern Region
description: To extend financial incentives to growers and Custom Hiring Centers towards mechanization of farm operations to increase the labour efficiency and to facilitate timely cultural operations thereby contributing to overall farm productivity and sustainability of coffee farming

name: Market Development and Export Promotion : Digital and Social Media Campaign and associated activities for the promotion of Indian Coffee including Branding and Development of Promotional materials - Films, CDs, Pamphlets etc
description: To portray core strength of Indian Coffee to create a premium positioning in the global and domestic market by highlighting the uniqueness of Coffees of India

name: Financial Incentive to SC Meritorious Boy Students
description: The scheme provides a financial incentive of ₹5,000/- to the meritorious boys from Scheduled Castes who have secured 80% or above marks in the HSSLC examination. The objective is to motivate and encourage SC students to pursue higher studies and bring them at par with the rest.

name: Financial Assistance to OBC Students Appearing in the Mains Examination of UPSC
description: The scheme provides financial grants to the OBC students for appearing in the UPSC Mains Exam. An amount upto ₹50,000/- is provided to each beneficiary. The assistance is extended depending on the applicant meeting the eligibility criteria and the documents submitted.

name: Market Development and Export Promotion : Participation in Domestic Fairs / Coffee Festivals etc. including support to Roasters & others for participation in the events
description: To increase per capita consumption on one hand, and convert more consumers from occasional drinkers to regular drinkers

name: Coffee Development Programme in Non-Traditional Areas (NTA) : Market Support
description: The objective of the scheme is to extend support to the tribal growers, for taking up marketing of their coffee on community based approach, through suitable financial incentives

name: Development Support for Coffee growers of North- Eastern Region (NER) : Market Support
description: The Extension Officer will collect coffee in the form of either parchment or cherry from the growers and store at the collection centres / temporary godown which are hired for a temporary period.

name: Development Support for Coffee growers of North- Eastern Region (NER) : Drying yards
description: To facilitate improvement of quality of coffee produced by the growers by encouraging them to put up infrastructure for quality improvement and also facilitate them to obtain certification of their coffees, so as to enable them to earn better returns.

name: Technology Infusion : Drone Technology
description: To validate the prospects of ‘Drone technology’ for multiple applications in coffee cultivation with Public- Private partnerships. Support will be extended for the growers who adopts the technology

name: Development Support for Coffee growers of North- Eastern Region (NER) : Support for Organic / Eco Certification
description: To encourage coffee growers to improve quality for higher returns and improve access to high value specialty markets through production of organically certified coffees.

name: Development Support for Coffee growers of North- Eastern Region (NER) : Support for Quality upgradation / Eco Certification / FPOs
description: To facilitate improvement of quality of coffee produced by the growers by encouraging them to put up infrastructure for quality improvement and also facilitate them to obtain certification of their coffees, so as to enable them to earn better returns.

name: Technology Infusion : Block Chain Technology
description: To enable coffee growers to establish direct contact with larger exporters and buyers for higher returns

name: Development Support for Coffee growers of North- Eastern Region (NER) : Support for Group Nurseries
description: To provide the growers with good quality coffee seedlings to ensure proper establishment of plantation

name: Development Support for Coffee growers of North- Eastern Region (NER) : Water Augmentation
description: To improve the production and quality of coffee by facilitating the creation of infrastructure for water augmentation for irrigation and wet processing of coffee.

name: Support to children of labourers working in coffee plantation / curing works in Traditional Areas, Non-Traditional Area and North Eastern Region
description: Labourers working in coffee plantations and curing establishments are the important stakeholders of the industry

name: Coffee Development Programme in Non-Traditional Areas (NTA) : Construction of Cement Drying Yards
description: To facilitate improvement of quality of coffee produced by the tribal growers by encouraging them to put up infrastructure for quality improvement and also facilitate them to obtain organic certification of their coffees, so as to enable them to earn better returns.

name: Coffee Development Programme in Non-Traditional Areas (NTA) :  Support for Organic Certification
description: To encourage coffee growers to improve quality for higher returns and improve access to high value specialty markets through production of organically certified coffees.

name: Development Support for Coffee growers of North- Eastern Region (NER) : Support for Coffee Expansion
description: To facilitate afforestation in the Jhum lands and help to settle the tribal holdings on permanent footing and also to increase the production.

name: Development Support for Coffee growers of North- Eastern Region (NER) : Support for Consolidation of Coffee
description: To increase the productivity of the existing coffee holdings by gap filling / rejuvenation followed with improved cultivation methods like application of compost, bush management, shade management, pest & disease control etc.

name: Coffee Development Programme in Non-Traditional Areas (NTA) : Support for Quality-Up-Gradation / Eco Certification / FPOs
description: To facilitate improvement of quality of coffee produced by the tribal growers by encouraging them to put up infrastructure for quality improvement and also facilitate them to obtain organic certification of their coffees, so as to enable them to earn better returns.

name: Coffee Development Programme in Non-Traditional Areas (NTA) : Support for Mixed Shade Tree saplings
description: To encourage planting of mixed species of native trees / fruit yielding trees like mango, jack, syzygium, orange etc, in new coffee holdings so as to establish good evergreen shade canopy to increase soil fertility, moisture retention capacity and thereby increasing productivity

name: Intensive Fisheries Development Programme - Subsidy on Commercial Four-Wheeler Vehicles
description: The scheme aims to strengthen the fisheries value chain by providing transportation support to fish farmers. Under this scheme, eligible fish farmers receive a subsidy of 25% of the actual cost on the purchase of a commercial four-wheeler vehicle used for fisheries-related activities.

name: Market Development and Export Promotion : Development of Coffee eco-tourism
description: To provide encouragement for tourism in coffee growing regions of India and to provide an experiential learning opportunity to Explore, Engage and Enjoy coffees of India.

name: Market Development and Export Promotion : Barista Training Programme
description: This programme is a significant skill development initiative aimed at empowering youth, entrepreneurs, and coffee professionals with practical knowledge and expertise in espresso-based beverage preparation, milk steaming, and latte art.

name: Market Development and Export Promotion : National Coffee Competitions
description: To cater to the need of the coffee industry by providing a training platform for coffee start-ups with hands on training in Roasting, Grinding and Packaging of coffee

name: Market Development and Export Promotion : Kaapi Shastra Training Programme
description: A distinguished programme aimed at providing a great learning opportunity for those who are passionate about coffee and coffee entrepreneurship. It is conducted in house at Coffee Quality Division of the Coffee Board, Bengaluru.

name: PMMSY: Fish Feed Plants of Production Capacity of at least 100 Ton/Day - Haryana
description: This scheme provides capital subsidy for setting up fish feed plants with a minimum production capacity of 100 tons per day, under the Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) to general , schedule caste and women beneficiaries .

name: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas and Non Tribal growers of Non-Traditional Area : Support for wrapping material for White Stem Borer affected plants
description: To encourage the coffee growers by providing 50% subsidy on material cost so that the technology will be adopted on a massive scale which will contribute to great extent in minimizing the pest load in field and for effective management of the dreaded pest, CWSB in Arabica plantations.

name: Coffee Development Programme in Non-Traditional Areas (NTA) : Support for Coffee Consolidation
description: The main objective of consolidation is to improve the productivity of existing coffee holdings by gap filling/ rejuvenation followed with improved cultivation methods like application of compost, bush management, shade management, pest& disease control etc.

name: Coffee Development Programme in Non-Traditional Areas (NTA) : Support for Coffee Expansion
description: To increase the area and production of Arabica coffee in association with the State level Nodal agencies in Andhra Pradesh and Odisha, so as to facilitate afforestation in the Podu lands and to help settle the tribals on a permanent footing.

name: Intensive Fisheries Development Programme - Subsidy on Purchase of Fishing Nets (Scheduled Caste)
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to individuals from Scheduled Caste families engaged in fishing activities for the purchase of fishing nets. Under this scheme, a 60% subsidy or up to ₹24,000, on the purchase of fishing nets worth ₹40,000/- will be provided to eligible beneficiaries.

name: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas, Non-Traditional Area and North Eastern Region : Farmers Producer Organizations (FPOs)
description: To provide broad-based supportive ecosystem to facilitate development of vibrant, socially and economically sustainable coffee communities.

name: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas and Non Tribal growers of Non-Traditional Area : Organic Certification / Eco certification / Natural farming
description: To encourage coffee growers to improve quality for higher returns and improve access to high value specialty markets through production of organic certified coffees.

name: Market Development and Export Promotion : Post Graduate Diploma Course in Coffee Quality Management
description: To meet the ever evolving needs of Indian Coffee industry for professional cup tasting and coffee quality management, an one year “Post Graduate Diploma course in Coffee Quality Management” was introduced for the first time in Coffee Board.

name: Market Development and Export Promotion : Know your Kaapi – Let The Cups Speak: A cup quality evaluation Program & Flavour of India, the fine cup award
description: The "Know Your Kaapi" initiative by the Coffee Board of India is a nationwide cup quality evaluation drive aimed at enhancing the quality and marketability of Indian coffee.

name: Market Development and Export Promotion : Assistance for Coffee Exports
description: The objective of the scheme is to maximize export earnings by enhancing the market share of value-added coffees as Made in India Brand and high value differentiated green coffees in important high value far-off markets.

name: Market Development and Export Promotion : Support for Value Addition (R&G)
description: To enhance quality of coffee product and achieve value addition through roasting, grinding and packaging which will result in boosting domestic coffee consumption and entrepreneurship in the coffee sector.

name: Market Development and Export Promotion : Support to Coffee Curing Units
description: To enhance quality of coffee product and achieve value addition and efficiency through introduction of improved technologies in coffee processing at the curing stage

name: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas and Non Tribal growers of Non-Traditional Area : Eco Pulpers
description: To provide support towards protection of environment in the coffee areas throughavoidance of pollution by adopting eco-friendly pulpers (or) by implementation of pollution abatement measures as per Pollution Control Board norms.

name: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas and Non Tribal growers of Non-Traditional Area : Quality Up-gradation (QUP)
description: To extend incentives to coffee holdings for creation of infrastructure facilities for production of quality coffee

name: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas and Non Tribal growers of Non-Traditional Area : Water Augmentation (WAS)
description: The scheme "Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Water Augmentation" by the Coffee Board, Department of Commerce, aims to improve the production and productivity of coffee plantations by encouraging water augmentation in traditional areas.

name: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas and Non-Tribal growers of Non-Traditional Area : Replantation
description: To improve the production and productivity of coffee plantations by encouraging replantation of old / senile and unproductive plantations.

name: PMMSY: Establishment of small RAS /Biofloc culture system - Haryana
description: The scheme provides capital assistance for setting up small-scale Recirculatory Aquaculture Systems (RAS) and Biofloc culture systems to promote high-yield, sustainable fish farming.

name: PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc culture system - Haryana
description: The scheme provides capital assistance to fish farmers and entrepreneurs for establishing medium-scale Recirculatory Aquaculture Systems (RAS) and Biofloc systems.

name: PMMSY: Establishment of large RAS / Biofloc culture system - Haryana
description: The scheme provides capital assistance for setting up large-scale Recirculatory Aquaculture Systems (RAS) and Biofloc culture systems to promote high-yield, sustainable fish farming.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Refrigerated Vehicles – Haryana
description: The scheme aims to enhance cold chain infrastructure & ensure hygienic and efficient fish transportation. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to fishers for purchasing refrigerated vehicles to maintain the freshness & quality of fish during post-harvest handling & transportation.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Establishment of Backyard mini RAS Units - Haryana
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance in the form of subsidies is provided to eligible beneficiaries for establishing these units. Various surface and groundwater sources such as canals, rivers, springs, open wells, and tube wells can be utilized for operating RAS units.

name: Pradhan Mantri Adarsh Gram Yojana
description: With a view to enabling an area-based development approach, a new scheme Pradhan Mantri Adarsh Gram Yojana (PMAGY) was launched during 2009-10. The Scheme aims at the integrated development of Scheduled Castes majority villages.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Motor Cycle with Ice Box - Haryana
description: The scheme aims to strengthen fish transportation infrastructure and ensure the freshness and quality of fish during transit. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to fishers for purchasing motorcycles equipped with ice boxes, ensuring efficient and hygienic fish transport.

name: Financial Assistance for funeral and other activities in case of death of a worker's - Haryana Labour Welfare Board
description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to the family or dependent of a deceased worker to cover funeral and related expenses. Under this scheme, an assistance amount of ₹15,000/- is provided to the dependent/family of the deceased worker.

name: PM POSHAN - Prime Minister's Overarching Scheme For Holistic Nourishment
description: PM POSHAN is a centrally sponsored scheme by the Department of School Education & Literacy, Ministry of Education. Under this scheme, one hot cooked meal will be provided to the children studying in Government and Government – aided schools. The Scheme is implemented by the Ministry of Education.

name: Intensive Fisheries Development Programme - Subsidy on Solar System for fish/shrimp culture
description: Under this scheme, subsidies on solar systems for fish/shrimp culture are provided to eligible fish and shrimp farmers. The subsidy is given at 60% of the total project cost, or ₹30,000 per kW, whichever is lower. The maximum subsidy is limited to 30 kW for shrimp farmers and 10 kW for fish farmers.

name: Export Promotion Capital Goods Scheme
description: The objective of the EPCG Scheme is to facilitate import of capital goods for producing quality goods and services and enhance India’s manufacturing competitiveness. EPCG scheme allows import of capital goods for pre-production, production and post-production at zero customs duty.

name: Advance Authorisation(AA)
description: Advance Authorisation scheme enables duty free import of inputs for export production, including replenishment of inputs or duty remission Advance Authorisation covers manufacturer exporters or merchant exporters tied to supporting manufacturer(s).

name: Amended Technology Upgradation Fund
description: The Ministry of Textiles introduced the Amended Technology Upgradation Fund Scheme (ATUFS). This scheme aims to facilitate investment, employment, productivity, quality and import and export substitution in the textile industry.

name: Subsidy on Rehri alongwith (Stove, Gas Chulha, Utensil etc.) for the Fish/Fish Product Sale
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance will be provided for purchase of a handcart along with essential items such as stove, gas chulha, utensils, etc., for fish and fish product sales. A subsidy of 60% on the total project cost of ₹60,000/- will be granted, amounting to ₹36,000/- per beneficiary.

name: Capacity Building For Service Providers - Skill Testing & Certification
description: The scheme "Skill Testing & Certification" is a Suo-Moto Sub-Category of Programmes under the Umbrella Scheme of "Capacity Building for Service Providers", Ministry of Tourism. In this scheme, financial assistance is provided to conduct Skilling and Re-Skilling Programmes.

name: Infrastructure and Technology Support
description: The sub-scheme “Infrastructure and Technology Support” aims to develop world-class infrastructure in the country to support handicraft production, enhance product quality, and reduce costs to enable it to compete in the global market.

name: Jute Resource-Cum-Production Centre
description: Jute Resource-Cum-Production Centre (JRCPC) will be set up in the local clusters and localities across the country in collaboration with bonafide Agencies who have adequate experience in training and skilling programs and have required training cum-production infrastructure.

name: Jute Raw Material Bank Scheme
description: Jute Raw Material Bank Scheme (JRMB) will be set up in the local clusters across the country in collaboration with bonafide Agencies who have adequate experience in similar activities and have the required storage, display, and selling infrastructure.

name: New Charkha-Loom Scheme
description: The scheme provides 65% financial assistance for purchasing Amber Charkhas (₹13,000/-) and looms (₹30,000/-) to registered Khadi spinners and weavers, promoting sustainable livelihoods.

name: Dulari Scheme
description: The DULARI Scheme was implemented by the Directorate of Health Services in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands to provide incentives for newborn baby girls and to the girl children who pass Classes VIII, X, and XII.

name: Handicraft Mela Participation
description: The scheme enables artisans and handicraft organizations to participate in government-sponsored melas across Gujarat and other states, fostering market access and preserving traditional crafts. Benefits include subsidized stall fees, promotional support, sales opportunities for handmade products.

name: Death Benefit (ANBOCWWB)
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to the nominees or dependents of workers engaged in Building or Other Construction Works in Andaman & Nicobar Islands in the event of their natural or accidental death.

name: Uniform Assistance for Scheduled Tribe Students
description: The scheme "Uniform Assistance for Scheduled Tribe Students" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, provides ₹900/- for three pairs of uniforms to ST students in government and aided primary schools studying in Classes 1 to 8.

name: Uniform Assistance for Other Backward Classes (Minority) Students Studying in Standard 1st to 8th
description: The scheme "Uniform Assistance for Other Backward Classes (Minority) Students Studying in Standard 1st to 8th" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, aims to promote educational inclusivity among minority OBC students by providing financial assistance of ₹900/- for uniforms.

name: Uniform Assistance for Notified Tribes and Denotified Tribes Castes students Studying in Class 1st to 8th
description: The scheme "Uniform Assistance for Notified Tribes and Denotified Tribes Castes students Studying in Class 1st to 8th" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, provides ₹900/- for three pairs of uniforms to students from NT/DNT Castes in government and aided primary schools.

name: Uniform Assistance for Economically Backward Class Students Studying in Class 1st to 8th
description: The scheme "Uniform Assistance for Economically Backward Class Students Studying in Class 1st to 8th" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, provides ₹900/- for three pairs of uniforms to students from economically weaker sections in government and aided primary schools.

name: Stipends to Students of Socially and Educationally Backward Classes for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC
description: The scheme “Stipends to Students of Socially and Educationally Backward Classes for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC” by the Social Justice and Empowerment Dept., Gujarat, supports education for Socially and Educationally Backward Classes students by providing a monthly stipend of ₹400/-.

name: Mill Gate Price Subsidy Scheme
description: The scheme provides 15% subsidy on yarn purchases from NHDC depots to handloom weavers, cooperatives, and NGOs, along with freight reimbursement (1–8.5%). Intended beneficiaries include weavers below the poverty line.

name: Veer Chandra Singh Garhwali Paryatan Swarojgar Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide self-employment in the tourism sector. Financial assistance & subsidies are provided to permanent residents. Through this scheme, financial assistance and subsidies are provided to the permanent residents of Uttarakhand state for tourism-related infrastructure development.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyay Grah Aawas Vikas Yojana
description: The Scheme aim to provide an unprecedented experience to domestic and foreign tourists visiting Uttarakhand, as well as for the prosperity of the local people. Now you can improve your financial condition by using your home as a tourist resting place.

name: Solar Water Heater Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide clean and affordable energy, reduce electricity bills, and contribute to environmental protection. Through this scheme, free electricity and a reduction in carbon emissions are provided to the residents of Uttarakhand.

name: Indira Amma Bhojanalya
description: The primary objective of the scheme is to provide nutritious and affordable food to the poor and needy sections of society and to economically strengthen rural women's self-help groups (SHGs) by providing continuous income-generating employment through the operation of these canteens.

name: Mahila Udhyami Vishesh Protsahan Yojana
description: Under this scheme, a capital subsidy of up to 25% of the total fixed capital investment and an interest subsidy of 6% on bank-approved loans are provided to women entrepreneurs for setting up micro and small enterprises in the manufacturing and service sectors.

name: Uttarakhand Startup Policy
description: The scheme aims to foster innovation and entrepreneurship, supporting scalable business models in Uttarakhand. Through this scheme, monthly allowances, seed funding, patent assistance, and other benefits are provided to entrepreneurial startups.

name: Uttarakhand Tourism Entrepreneur Promotion Scheme
description: The scheme aims to aims to encourage and financially strengthen permanent residents/entrepreneurs of the state who invest ₹1 crore to ₹5 crore in the tourism sector.

name: Operation of River Rafting / Kayaking Activities
description: The scheme aims to promote adventure tourism by regulating and authorizing rafting and kayaking operations in the state. Under this scheme, rafting companies are granted permission to operate, and licenses are issued to qualified river guides.

name: Jyoti Gramodyog Vikas Yojana
description: The scheme provides margin money subsidies (25–30%) for new rural industrial projects (₹1,00,000/- to 25,00,000/-) to artisans, entrepreneurs, and SHGs, leveraging a 24-hour electricity supply in villages. Beneficiaries must be aged 25–50 years with a Class 10th education.

name: Self-Employment Scheme for Scheduled Castes and Tribes
description: The scheme aims to support scheduled castes and scheduled tribes families below the poverty line through concessional loans and subsidies for self-employment in various sectors.

name: Printing and Free Distribution of Sanskrit Textbooks
description: The scheme aims to support sanskrit school students by providing annual textbook financial aid ranging from ₹250 to ₹700.

name: Scholarship for Poor Students
description: The scheme aims to support poor students in sanskrit education. One student per class receives a scholarship equal to the class tuition fee.

name: Manav Kalyan Yojana
description: The scheme provides toolkit assistance (e-vouchers) to economically weak individuals (annual income ≤ ₹6,00,000/-) for self-employment in 10 trades like dairy, plumbing, and beauty parlors. Beneficiaries include SC/ST, nomadic tribes, and BPL families.

name: Grant to Films - Foreign Language Films
description: Under this scheme, financial grants of up to 50% of in-state production expenditure or ₹3 crore are provided to foreign language films shot in Uttarakhand, provided they have incurred a minimum in-state expenditure exceeding ₹3 crore & accurately depict shooting locations within the state.

name: Sanskrit Research Scholarship Scheme
description: The scheme provides an annual scholarship of ₹40,000/- for up to three years to selected students pursuing Ph.D. research in Sanskrit.

name: Grant to Films - Films Shot in Uttarakhand with a Budget of Minimum ₹50 Crores or More
description: The scheme aims to promote film shooting in the state, generate employment, support local and regional films and artists, and generate revenue for the state. The scheme offers up to ₹3 crore as financial assistance to film producers who shoot major parts of their films in Uttarakhand.

name: Grant to Films - Regional Dialects of Uttarakhand
description: Under this scheme, grants and subsidies are provided to filmmakers and producers to cover expenses incurred during film production. Additional incentives are available for children’s films, and OTT-based projects are also eligible under specific conditions.

name: Grant to Films - Films in Hindi and the Languages Listed in 8th Schedule of the Constitution of India
description: Under this scheme, financial grants and performance-based incentives are provided to the film producers who shoot films in Hindi or in the languages listed in the 8th Schedule of the Indian Constitution within Uttarakhand.

name: Free Training for Vehicle Drivers
description: Under this scheme, free driving training is provided to scheduled caste and scheduled tribe candidates to improve driving skills and promote self-employment.

name: Organization of Sports Competitions and Training Programs
description: Under this scheme, cash prizes and free training are provided to talented players and encourage participation at multiple levels like Gram Panchayat, Development Block, District, and state while providing an opportunity for free training to meritorious players before competing at the state level.

name: Uttarakhand State Andolankari Pension to the Dependants (For Other State)
description: "Uttarakhand State Andolankari Pension to the Dependants (For Other State)" is a social welfare scheme implemented by the Department of Home that provides a monthly pension to the dependents of the injured/jailed agitators from other states during the Uttarakhand State Movement.

name: Uttarakhand State Andolankari Pension (For Other State)
description: "Uttarakhand State Andolankari Pension (For Other State)" is a social welfare scheme implemented by the Department of Home, Government of Uttarakhand, that provides a monthly pension to the injured/jailed agitators from other states during the Uttarakhand State Movement.

name: Uttarakhand State Andolankari Pension
description: "Uttarakhand State Andolankari Pension" is a social welfare scheme implemented by the Department of Home, Government of Uttarakhand, that provides a monthly pension to the injured/jailed agitators during the Uttarakhand State Movement.

name: Financial Assistance to Mangal Dals
description: Under this scheme, Mangal Dals affiliated with the department are given monetary assistance to start employment-oriented projects in 18 identified business sectors such as dairy, electronics, tent services, beauty parlors, and more.

name: Free Travel in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation Buses to Widowed Daughters-in-law of Freedom Fighters
description: "Free Travel in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation Buses to Widowed Daughters-in-law of Freedom Fighters" is a social welfare scheme that provides free transport services in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation Buses to the widowed daughters-in-laws of the Freedom Fighters of the state.

name: Samman Pension
description: "Samman Pension" is a social welfare scheme that provides a monthly pension to all the first generation living legal heirs of a freedom fighter of the state.

name: Monthly/ Family Pension to the Freedom Fighters and their Widows
description: "Monthly/ Family Pension to the Freedom Fighters and their Widows" is a social welfare scheme that provides a monthly/ family pension to the freedom fighters and their widows domiciled in the state of Uttarakhand.

name: Rural Sports and Health Promotion Scheme
description: The scheme promotes fitness among rural youth by providing financial assistance to the mangal dals for setting up open gyms in each Gram Panchayat.

name: Mukhyamantri Nishulk Gas Refill Yojana
description: "Mukhyamantri Nishulk Gas Refill Yojana" is a social welfare scheme implemented by the Department Of Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs, Government of Uttarakhand, that provides 3 free gas refills in 1 year to the Antyodaya families.

name: Yuvak Mangal Dal and Mahila Mangal Dal Self-Reliance Scheme
description: Under this scheme, each group is provided financial assistance of ₹14,268/- for the purchase of essential materials for community use, with the aim of making them self-reliant.

name: State Food Yojana (Yellow Ration Card)
description: "State Food Yojana (Yellow Ration Card)" is a social welfare scheme implemented by the Department Of Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs, Government of Uttarakhand, that provides food per month at a nominal rate to the yellow ration card holder of the state.

name: Adventure Training for Youth
description: Under this scheme, free training is provided to the youth in various adventure-based activities such as White Water River Rafting Guide training, disaster management and rescue, Burma Bridge, trekking, and other high-endurance courses.

name: Kailash Darshan Yatra
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to pilgrims from Gujarat undertaking the Kailash Darshan Yatra. To be eligible, the applicant must be a selected pilgrim from Gujarat and submit proof of yatra completion within 90 days. Applications for this scheme are accepted offline.

name: Sindhu Darshan Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹15,000/- to pilgrims from Gujarat undertaking the Sindhu Darshan Yatra in Leh-Ladakh, fostering national unity. Intended beneficiaries include native Gujaratis who complete the yatra and apply within 60 days.

name: Shravan Tirthdarshan Yojna
description: The scheme aims to facilitate pilgrimage travel for senior citizens of Gujarat by providing financial assistance for travel expenses. It benefits eligible senior citizens through reimbursements or direct arrangements with authorized travel agents.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
description: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY) is  a flagship scheme of Government of India. It facilitates micro credit/Loan upto Rs. 20 lakhs to income generating micro enterprises engaged in the non farm sector in manufacturing, processing, trading or service sector including activities allied to agriculture

name: Personal Interest Subsidy Scheme
description: The scheme aims to support rural entrepreneurs in setting up industries using local resources. Through this scheme, interest subsidy on bank-financed projects up to ₹5,00,000 is provided.

name: Financial Assistance to Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand for Religious Pilgrimages
description: The scheme aims to promote religious tourism by supporting eligible residents who complete the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra. Financial assistance is provided upon completion.

name: Establishment of Broiler Farms
description: The primary objective of the scheme is to meet the growing demand for poultry production, generate employment opportunities, and ensure access to protein-rich food for the growing population.

name: Goat Valley Scheme
description: The objective of the scheme is to establish Goat Valleys as clusters for organized goat rearing, promote youth self-employment, transform traditional goat rearing into profit-oriented enterprises, and organize the sector to enhance year-round livelihood opportunities for farmers.

name: Chief Minister State Livestock Mission: Draft Animal Entrepreneurship Development Scheme
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment at local level by providing interest subsidies on bank loans for setting up mule units for transport & related activities. Under this scheme, residents of Uttarakhand are eligible for a 90% interest subsidy on loans taken to establish unit with 1 or 2 mule.

name: Chief Minister State Livestock Mission: Dairy Entrepreneurship Development Scheme
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment at the local level by offering interest subsidies on bank loans for setting up various livestock units. Under this scheme, residents of Uttarakhand are eligible for a 90% interest subsidy on loans taken for the purchase of livestock.

name: Quality Certification Assistance Scheme
description: This scheme provides financial assistance to Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) in Haryana for obtaining quality certifications such as ISO, HACCP, BSI, WHO-GMP, ZED, TS, and Hallmark. It aims to promote quality standards and enhance competitiveness among MSMEs.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Kisan Samridhi Sah-yojana (PM-MKSSY): COMPONENT 1B: One-Time Incentive for the Adoption of Aquaculture Insurance
description: The Component 1B of PM-MKSSY provides a one-time incentive to eligible applicants who have availed institutional credit for fisheries-related activities. The objective is to encourage formal credit adoption and support the repayment capacity of fisheries microenterprises.

name: Financial Assistance to Scheduled Tribe (Plains) Students for Coaching for Getting Admission into Medical/Engineering/IIT/etc.
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to ST (P) students for coaching to qualify for Medical, Engineering, and IIT entrance exams. It benefits eligible students by reimbursing coaching expenses, with selection based on merit from matriculation exam scores.

name: Financial Assistance for UPSC/APSC Mains Exam
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to ST and OBC/MOBC students of Assam who have cleared the APSC/UPSC preliminary exam and are appearing for the mains exam in the current year.

name: Promotion of Tribal Culture
description: The scheme provides financial grants (up to ₹3,00,000/- per organization) to registered NGOs/Trusts/Voluntary Organizations for promoting tribal culture among ST(P) communities in Assam's plain districts (outside BTC).

name: Special Incentive to ST (P)/OBC/MOBC Meritorious Students
description: The scheme aims to provide financial grants to meritorious ST (P)/OBC/MOBC students in Assam who secure high marks in Matriculation, 10+2, Graduation, or Post Graduation. Benefits include fixed monetary assistance ranging from ₹10,000/- to ₹25,000/- based on educational level.

name: Pension Scheme for Elderly and Destitute Artists/Writers/Authors of Uttarakhand State
description: The scheme aims to financially support senior contributors in the arts and literature. It provides a monthly pension to eligible beneficiaries.

name: Organisation of Cultural Programs
description: The scheme aims to promote regional and national cultural programs. It offers financial assistance and travel allowances to listed cultural artists and troupes.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Kisan Samridhi Sah-yojana (PM-MKSSY): COMPONENT 1A: Formalization of Fisheries Sector and Facilitating Access of Fisheries Microenterprises to Government of India Programs for Working Capital Financing
description: The scheme aims to formalise fisheries microenterprises and facilitate their access to institutional working capital finance through small grants and credit intermediaries. It benefits fisheries sector stakeholders registered on NFDP with verifiable credit needs and valid bank accounts.

name: Uttarakhand Unn Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide spinning and weaving work, fostering employment in the wool industry. Through this scheme, payment for spinning and weaving work, along with pension benefits and an annual bonus, is provided to weavers.

name: Madho Singh Bhandari Cooperative Collective Farming Scheme
description: The scheme aims to uplift the living standards of the cooperative society and committee members by enabling large-scale production, storage, and release of finished products. Through this scheme, integrated farming models, increased production, and livelihood opportunities are provided.

name: Mukhyamantri Swarojgar Yojna
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for new projects and for upgrading small-scale existing industries. Through this scheme, bank loans with subsidies are provided to eligible state residents.

name: IT Incubation Center
description: The scheme "IT Incubation Center" by the Information Technology Development Agency, Government of Uttarakhand aims to support registered startups in developing their businesses and resolving associated challenges.

name: Drone Policy
description: The scheme "Drone Policy" by the Information Technology Development Agency, Government of Uttarakhand aims to promote drone-based service delivery, innovation in drone technology, and development of a supportive drone ecosystem.

name: CSIR (PhD) Fellowship
description: "CSIR Fellowship (PhD)" scheme by the Council of Scientific and Industrial Research, Government of India aims to support science research through financial assistance. Scholars receive a ₹31,000 monthly stipend for 2 years, directly transferred to their bank accounts.

name: Student Program Under AcSIR
description: The scheme "Student Program Under AcSIR" implemented by the Academy of Scientific and Innovative Research (AcSIR), aims to promote high-quality research and leadership development in Earth Sciences through doctoral education. It provides research opportunities to geoscience postgraduate students.

name: Freeship less than ₹1,00,000 (UG students only)
description: The scheme "Freeship Less than ₹1,00,000 only for UG students" by the Dean Student Welfare, GBPUAT, Pantnagar aims to support meritorious undergraduate students from low-income families. This Freeship scheme provides full tuition fee exemption to eligible students.

name: Training and Tour Unit
description: "Training and Tour Unit" scheme by the Department of Agriculture Extension, Government of Uttarakhand aims to provide agricultural training to farmers, rural youth, and extension workers through university-led programs and field tours.

name: Freeship less than ₹1,00,000 (UG students only)
description: The scheme "Freeship Less than ₹1,00,000 only for UG students" by the Dean Student Welfare, GBPUAT, Pantnagar aims to support meritorious undergraduate students from low-income families. This Freeship scheme provides full tuition fee exemption to eligible students.

name: Rural Technology Complex
description: The scheme "Rural Technology Complex" by the Programme Implementation Department, Government of Uttarakhand, aims to enhance livelihood opportunities in the Himalayan region through the use of local, need-based and environment-friendly technologies.

name: Green Skill Development Programme (GSDP)
description: The scheme "Harit Kaushal Vikas Karyakram" implemented by the Govind Ballabh Pant National Institute of Himalayan Environment (NIHE), aims to impart eco-based livelihood skills to youth and communities in the Himalayan regions.

name: S.P. Nautiyal Museum
description: The scheme “S.P. Nautiyal Sangrahalaya” implemented by the Wadia Institute of Himalayan Geology, provides insights into the Great Himalayas through geological maps, charts, models, and educational exhibits, displaying rock, mineral, and fossil samples from the entire Himalayan region.

name: Deendayal Upadhay Sahkarita Kisan Kalyan Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide economic facilities to farmers to double their agricultural production income. Through this scheme, interest-free loans for individuals and for Self-Help Groups are provided to the general, small, marginal, and Below Poverty Line farmers.

name: Motorcycle Taxi Scheme
description: The scheme is aimed at enabling individuals to operate motorcycle taxis, offering a low-cost, efficient solution for short-distance travel, especially in congested or remote areas.

name: E-Rickshaw Kalyan Yojana
description: The scheme focuses on providing financial assistance and incentives to individuals and entrepreneurs who wish to operate electric rickshaws in urban and semi-urban areas. The primary objective is to reduce air pollution, promote cleaner transportation, and generate employment opportunities.

name: Assistance for Purchase of Traditional Musical Instruments and Costumes for Scheduled Caste/Tribe Individuals
description: The scheme aims to support scheduled caste/tribe individuals whose livelihood depends on traditional arts by providing them with essential musical instruments & costumes. Under this scheme, traditional musical instruments & traditional costumes are provided free of cost to folk artists & performers.

name: Financial Assistance to Authors for Book Publication
description: The scheme aims to support the state's eminent litterateurs, writers, poets, and authors by providing aid up to ₹2,00,000/- whose literary works remain unpublished due to financial constraints.

name: Our Tree Our Wealth Scheme
description: The scheme aims to promote tree plantation on private land by providing an incentive of ₹300 per plant, which is disbursed after three years based on the survival rate of the plants. Each applicant or family is eligible for support for up to 100 plants per year.

name: Mahila Nursery Yojana
description: The scheme aims to promote nursery establishment by providing women's groups with high-quality seedlings or saplings from certified sources, along with a fixed grant, technical support, and training to ensure effective nursery operations.

name: License for Repairers of Weights-Measures and Weighing Instruments
description: Under this scheme, a government-approved license is issued to repairers of weights and measuring instruments, enabling them to repair such instruments used by traders as a means of self-employment and to ensure their livelihood.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Accident Insurance Scheme - Uttarakhand
description: Under this scheme, fish farmers are provided insurance coverage of ₹5 lakh in case of accidental death/total permanent disability, ₹2.5 lakh for partial disability, & ₹50,000 for hospitalization. No premium is required to be paid by fish farmers, entire cost of the insurance is fully borne by Dept.

name: Scheduled Tribe/Scheduled Caste Sub Plan
description: The scheme aims to support fish production among Scheduled Caste/ Scheduled Tribe communities. The scheme offers a 60% subsidy on pond construction and related investments to eligible beneficiaries.
